**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Hey Peter,

My name is Amy Kate Budd, and my husband, Ted, is fighting to save the soul of America.

[](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=bd074a81b8f74bdbb74e7fd530c7055d&_e=dlm6G4cVPOa1YDaCqqvLUSJrUTNTo2OKEIB1B1fsilmhuOquG5-25I27lm4i7VvnuvDBwFZFOVtYA3dZg-AvbL9ewMkgI-URfGBp1s1XwSdPuyt5qc8DZdAWZtAFJ09dSl6D1Tf3wxhRDUGaUSggJ85wV42-hqNGROpFqqQ7Ze3zDZa0x92wU9e1nEk_NInLveUawfRmzPGKvMAA1UdofuZuzvqUdbdP8rF1upUh8xyrS4YwnsCJtSUmKNK2DoxAv63H9jZNRI-w2cHrKJmvQC1FzSo19kShj_q_T-r0wSkIiQNT6feVxsWUdGUInO1aFJPDKLDcxxsFAuTJfLXA5aEVL2Mxqm-J4LWru2HcsgveU0tc83zLk7Mw0UtUl7hnSf7PsBxoyUWWwL7Ujssktdf6aLlbwBVikLyB1A9pO6S8rrlurBCfQ-OcjeSWSDo07a-w-f5iwyRVELGumm_VhG_P8WlCerxMnVS3XiBRmDc%3D)

Ted is a Trump-endorsed conservative and proud of it. He’ll stand up to the woke mob and cancel culture, so let me set the record straight:

He is PRO America.
He is PRO life.
He is so PRO Second Amendment, he owns a gun store.
He is ANTI open borders and ANTI censorship.
He believes that PARENTS deserve to have a say in what their children are taught.

**[Ted will fight to preserve the values and freedoms that I know you hold dear, Peter.](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=bd074a81b8f74bdbb74e7fd530c7055d&_e=dlm6G4cVPOa1YDaCqqvLUSJrUTNTo2OKEIB1B1fsilmhuOquG5-25I27lm4i7VvnuvDBwFZFOVtYA3dZg-AvbL9ewMkgI-URfGBp1s1XwSdPuyt5qc8DZdAWZtAFJ09dSl6D1Tf3wxhRDUGaUSggJ85wV42-hqNGROpFqqQ7Ze3zDZa0x92wU9e1nEk_NInLveUawfRmzPGKvMAA1UdofuZuzvqUdbdP8rF1upUh8xyrS4YwnsCJtSUmKNK2DoxAv63H9jZNRI-w2cHrKJmvQC1FzSo19kShj_q_T-r0wSkIiQNT6feVxsWUdGUInO1aFJPDKLDcxxsFAuTJfLXA5RmNk-6CHdp9_ry6g6WQarKd_aC50X_Hpn2sst-ykAvh8oaFeHXcG3lAfiZUAOus2XbhNFcp5FbfLOiyTCzG8P4py9nXRGMqXEl535hmDy_LiHDuBelRSeAShgkv-XNarAQNCRSNruuFBLIrrfMQc1M%3D)**

clean_body: Together, we can crush the liberal agenda | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey Peter, My name is Amy Kate Budd, and my husband, Ted, is fighting to save the soul of America. Ted is a Trump-endorsed conservative and proud of it. He’ll stand up to the woke mob and cancel culture, so let me set the record straight: He is PRO America. He is PRO life. He is so PRO Second Amendment, he owns a gun store. He is ANTI open borders and ANTI censorship. He believes that PARENTS deserve to have a say in what their children are taught. If you care about preserving our conservative values, I need you to step up and FIGHT with us. We are forever grateful for your support. | | ---|--- | | \- Amy Kate Budd | Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Team Wiley
subject: circling back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Team – Did you see Wiley’s message from yesterday? February is a critical month for this campaign. We are heading into the final month of Q1, and since we showed up BIG time in November to elect Wiley and flip this seat, we have to continue to show up big. Since Wiley’s email yesterday, we have raised $435 dollars. If we can hit $1k by the end of the day today, we’ll be on track to reach our February goal. Can you rush in $35 right NOW to help us get to where we need to be? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230226-email&amount=35] Thanks, team. —- Original Message — https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230226-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230226-email]Friend – We are nearing the end of the shortest month of the year. With just 3 days left, I have a really important ask: can you chip in just $5 to help us reach our end-of-month goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230226-email&amount=5] My team and I have worked hard to make this short month as strong as possible, but with less time to fundraise, we are falling short. That is why I’m reaching out to you all directly. So far, I have loved representing our community in DC. We have gotten off to a great start in Congress, and I know that we’ll be able to accomplish so many important things for the families of North Carolina. But, as you all know, Bo Hines has officially announced that he is running against me in 2024. We flipped this seat together last November, but we can not let that momentum die down. We have to show up strong each and every month, because with Bo Hines officially back in this race, there is just too much at stake. So, can you help us get closer to our February fundraising goal by chipping in right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230226-email] Thank you for being here. Wiley Nickel Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230226-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

| Hi — Dan has always fought for mid-Michigan, and now we need to have his back as he prepares for another tough race. Our district will always be competitive (and expensive), and your early support helps us keep up our around-the-clock organizing.

**[Make a contribution of any amount today to stand with Dan ahead of Tuesday’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59321324/393832476/-630486075?amount=15&contactdata=JQFYQMfSXn1E/Is5b5snW+MKZU29duJv8TyStxEOaDpvg02vlhRQUmZX4VbkoonQfwbE3eFZs/CWJS9LbBb/IlN7WQR7CWhOwwntiO0Gmif4JpjpFuy+h0A4R44CkkS9I9ckShrRoKDsIa83rVeHjg==&refcode2=fad97f5f-32b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230226_FR_2.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWQ5N2Y1Zi0zMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SchA5Jw0yQl886EMS2nEcg2NMQ7JweENv24b5FoNu30=)**

* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Hi there,

I ran for Congress to deliver for my hometown communities and the Heartland. That’s why I’m proud to have brought home new funding to invest nearly $2 million in extracurricular educational opportunities for young people in mid-Michigan.

**Helping our children learn and succeed is crucial, and one of the reasons I will work with anyone — Republicans, Democrats, and Independents — to deliver for working families.**

Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. **Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.**

**[February is a shorter month, so we have fewer days to hit our monthly fundraising goal. Will you chip in $15 or any amount to help us raise the last $8,000 we need to stay on track ahead of Tuesday’s deadline? Click here to contribute.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59321326/393832478/-630486075?amount=15&contactdata=JQFYQMfSXn1E/Is5b5snW+MKZU29duJv8TyStxEOaDpvg02vlhRQUmZX4VbkoonQfwbE3eFZs/CWJS9LbBb/IlN7WQR7CWhOwwntiO0Gmif4JpjpFuy+h0A4R44CkkS9I9ckShrRoKDsIa83rVeHjg==&refcode2=fad97f5f-32b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230226_FR_2.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWQ5N2Y1Zi0zMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SchA5Jw0yQl886EMS2nEcg2NMQ7JweENv24b5FoNu30=)**

I’m working with members of both parties to find common ground on important issues like addressing inflation, creating jobs, investing in manufacturing, and economically competing with China.

Growing up, my parents — a union lineman with the local utility company and an automobile tire factory worker — taught me the value of hard work. Families in New Mexico and across the country are working hard every day and deserve to see that hard work rewarded. That's why I work daily to improve lives — working to pass legislation to lower everyday prices, keep our air and water clean, and create more good-paying jobs. Meanwhile, Republicans like Mike Pence are saying that Congress should consider cutting Medicare and Social Security, critical programs that hard working Americans pay into. _We can’t afford to let Republicans take back the Senate and enact an extreme agenda._ **As I work to deliver more results in the Senate, I need your help to defend our Senate majority as Democrats face a tough Senate map. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: You have to see this headline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends, I wanted you to see this headline:
The 19th: 1 in 4 parents report being fired for work interruptions due to child care breakdowns [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/19th-ChildCare-Headline.png]OK, what was your first reaction?
Mine was: Yeah, that sounds about right .
Every conversation I’ve had with my friends, my family, and my constituents about navigating child care over the past few years paints a picture of nightmare after nightmare, of astronomical costs and insufficient options, all leading to this full-blown child care crisis. And this isn’t an issue of millennials not knowing how to budget (or eating too much avocado toast 🙄). The problem is that the cost of child care has skyrocketed.
And now we have clear stats (not to mention an enormous $122 billion price tag!) to illustrate just how bad it’s gotten, validating every person who’s been shouting into the void for years about this growing disaster.
Creating child care that’s affordable and accessible and reimagining the social safety net is a top priority of mine. The free market hasn’t fixed this crisis, and small or temporary changes won’t be enough. The truth is, we need BIG, wholesale changes to our social safety net if we’re going to truly support kids and families - and we need people in Congress who are willing to go big, or go home.
If you’re able, please consider making a donation to my re-election campaign right now so that I can keep fighting on this issue and working towards BIG solutions. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230226_em_sjj_childcare]
One of the solutions I have in mind is a bill that I introduced earlier this month: the Child Care for Every Community Act . This bicameral legislation would guarantee child care that’s affordable for every family and support child care providers in their incredibly important work.
This issue goes beyond exorbitant child care costs - there are devastating trickle-down effects. 85% of primary caregivers report that problems with child care hurt their efforts or time commitments at work - ultimately resulting in unprecedented levels of women and people from minority backgrounds leaving the workforce to provide care in their homes.
For years, Congress refused to address this - and now my generation, the American economy, and our collective future are paying the price. That’s a reality I won’t accept, and it’s why I’m working every day to ensure all Californians and Americans have access to the care and support they need.
If you agree that this issue needs champions in Congress, I hope you’ll make a donation of any amount today. Your support truly makes a difference in the work I’m able to do. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230226_em_sjj_childcare]
Thanks so much.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Setting the record straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
If you want to stop Biden and his far-left allies from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then we MUST take control of the Senate.
Peter,

Democrats are breaking records left and right.

📈 Record spending.
📈 Record inflation.
📈 Record debt.
📈 Record crime.
📈 Record illegal immigration.

Despite their unacceptable track record, the Democrats still BEAT us in 2022.

_**HOW?**_ I'll tell you, Peter...

The Democrats’ grassroots supporters are more motivated and willing to engage than ours. They have donors who are eager to chip in early and often to support battleground races, and if we want to win, we need to do the same thing - scratch that, **__we need to do it BETTER.__**

[**JOIN OUR GRASSROOTS TEAM >>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_m=1c8079fdee21490b8fef08ce0ab408c6&_e=s0cHtKeIe9kd4AE42NUsFAxadEyTjy2zDRdNKvC96ADSST56LYs13FUG2otb9ZfCyWM9KiXdM0M49UmhBbfj4VhIIK8h5lx_BvBbCzMaN9zJ5Ej3v93AJ61E9149ces2UNu7rogUBzZJExTVCXCYnx_WzKWHcIkapR76pqFFH56LtgRJvSaDlKxhIiCuoNuTLgj2az2TC1hv5cx5vYvPl07IaaENEld92Iu4hK31R4bUzS6ySSxzxLXpWz3fdvaFFUxcZX-PbU0V3f3WCtKAvrSxexFcO34Vd0BvTVmAVnCguF2DrHBA0f32MyvQcCqvu3v9S-ft0-Gso8K8SHp3rxOvrOonaFFOzBQiOGoc50sntMpP9oCe_LoPJR4Q4HznUfdvfFb3gI9liwUwWyhSsv-NbDm_o55WHUc87T8gkOjNMGToDIaO6T38UmMG-NgT)
Peter, we are facing a critical moment in the fight to secure a Republican majority in the Senate and turn America around.

At this very moment, early into the 2024 cycle, we are in the position to build a grassroots movement capable of ending the Democrats' Senate Majority. But this opportunity is fleeting. [**Our chances of victory diminish every day we go without your support.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_m=1c8079fdee21490b8fef08ce0ab408c6&_e=s0cHtKeIe9kd4AE42NUsFAxadEyTjy2zDRdNKvC96ADSST56LYs13FUG2otb9ZfCyWM9KiXdM0M49UmhBbfj4VhIIK8h5lx_BvBbCzMaN9zJ5Ej3v93AJ61E9149ces2UNu7rogUBzZJExTVCXCYnx_WzKWHcIkapR76pqFFH56LtgRJvSaDlKxhIiCuoNuTLgj2az2TC1hv5cx5vYvPl07IaaENEld92Iu4hK31R4bUzS6ySSxzxLXpWz3fdvaFFUxcZX-PbU0V3f3WCtKAvrSxexFcO34Vd0BvTVmAVnD2CwfLUCY1SqxtR3dZeyJI8TGfMEowGmSnGVeTKZ-ili6mIhu9nrD2Y9ZeSA8EcXBWkg6_lt45S0B61QXph3eOmSaeyNaGEMCSImaJusRAE3GqC75WOZkjh3qfIasENPnxYU9cBk2nWu9eugoDDjnd)

[**REFUSE TO FAIL DONATE NOW >>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_m=1c8079fdee21490b8fef08ce0ab408c6&_e=s0cHtKeIe9kd4AE42NUsFAxadEyTjy2zDRdNKvC96ADSST56LYs13FUG2otb9ZfCyWM9KiXdM0M49UmhBbfj4VhIIK8h5lx_BvBbCzMaN9zJ5Ej3v93AJ61E9149ces2UNu7rogUBzZJExTVCXCYnx_WzKWHcIkapR76pqFFH56LtgRJvSaDlKxhIiCuoNuTLgj2az2TC1hv5cx5vYvPl07IaaENEld92Iu4hK31R4bUzS6ySSxzxLXpWz3fdvaFFUxcZX-PbU0V3f3WCtKAvrSxexFcO34Vd0BvTVmAVnAVjq4SDO63JZMreJIWNY6b3OQukZpvV6HPMNauPgmGxAWO6EH_4A0KrXECtaWTS-IiY8UGsUZwDoOqVTg20QF7PsQrXLmTZlmR2RTJVmie4TildVs5ZwouToXIeHDbF-BKhNtO6fx1enAOxsZk0diQ)
We see first-hand the pitfall of being outspent in critical battleground races last election: **Senate Democrats retained their power to obstruct and nix ANY conservative bill passed through the House.**

If you want to stop Biden and his far-left allies from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then [**we MUST take control of the Senate.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_m=1c8079fdee21490b8fef08ce0ab408c6&_e=s0cHtKeIe9kd4AE42NUsFAxadEyTjy2zDRdNKvC96ADSST56LYs13FUG2otb9ZfCyWM9KiXdM0M49UmhBbfj4VhIIK8h5lx_BvBbCzMaN9zJ5Ej3v93AJ61E9149ces2UNu7rogUBzZJExTVCXCYnx_WzKWHcIkapR76pqFFH56LtgRJvSaDlKxhIiCuoNuTLgj2az2TC1hv5cx5vYvPl07IaaENEld92Iu4hK31R4bUzS6ySSxzxLXpWz3fdvaFFUxcZX-PbU0V3f3WCtKAvrSxexFcO34Vd0BvTVmAVnCZDdL-wehMQnCzuJGQydl24cK-rh3y9GXAVYzQd9-3lXNDI_Bz-sckcXhC64aYlEuuH2OAVCxSjSa8vpeTN1sqxN5NviBRLIoF76HHRpYUQGDqkv6F3fkSWLKMWICBRcE3a-8KfRARb0EWz8hjPo6n)

If we fail, the Senate Democrats will continue to block conservative victories - whether out of incompetence or spite - and America will increasingly deteriorate. [**That alone should be enough of a reason to donate to our efforts right now.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=2c14620ecdec4ac49c939e95a5f44a57&_m=1c8079fdee21490b8fef08ce0ab408c6&_e=s0cHtKeIe9kd4AE42NUsFAxadEyTjy2zDRdNKvC96ADSST56LYs13FUG2otb9ZfCyWM9KiXdM0M49UmhBbfj4VhIIK8h5lx_BvBbCzMaN9zJ5Ej3v93AJ61E9149ces2UNu7rogUBzZJExTVCXCYnx_WzKWHcIkapR76pqFFH56LtgRJvSaDlKxhIiCuoNuTLgj2az2TC1hv5cx5vYvPl07IaaENEld92Iu4hK31R4bUzS6ySSxzxLXpWz3fdvaFFUxcZX-PbU0V3f3WCtKAvrSxexFcO34Vd0BvTVmAVnA5DxFUwuN9dsu2lJP1MkKTwr1txnQW_DKxOOBoxhdKFiNcnu-SSsF5s2dfJEn76S1IPOJl1bkmMt62Mz_L-bbMogFV6MuuajI-1vfGw_FsCDCvb7mY8N6czwqQ80wHvIkJHXA_QinSYSDMLNlKhssl)

clean_body: If you want to stop Biden and his far-left allies from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then we MUST take control of the Senate. Peter, Democrats are breaking records left and right. 📈 Record spending. 📈 Record inflation. 📈 Record debt. 📈 Record crime. 📈 Record illegal immigration. Despite their unacceptable track record, the Democrats still BEAT us in 2022. HOW? I'll tell you, Peter... The Democrats’ grassroots supporters are more motivated and willing to engage than ours. They have donors who are eager to chip in early and often to support battleground races, and if we want to win, we need to do the same thing - scratch that, we need to do it BETTER. Peter, we are facing a critical moment in the fight to secure a Republican majority in the Senate and turn America around. At this very moment, early into the 2024 cycle, we are in the position to build a grassroots movement capable of ending the Democrats' Senate Majority. But this opportunity is fleeting. We see first-hand the pitfall of being outspent in critical battleground races last election: Senate Democrats retained their power to obstruct and nix ANY conservative bill passed through the House. If you want to stop Biden and his far-left allies from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then If we fail, the Senate Democrats will continue to block conservative victories - whether out of incompetence or spite - and America will increasingly deteriorate. As one of my top supporters, I am asking you to Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. P.S. When Republicans work together, there is no limit to what we can achieve. We can and WILL take back the Senate Majority in 2024 by way of the strongest grassroots movement America has ever seen. Are you ready to be a part of it? | | **⏰In two days, there are THREE special elections in the Connecticut House. ⏰** **FIRST:** State Democrats secured a major victory in the Virginia Senate, **THEN:** In special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire, Democrats showed up to the polls and elected more state legislators, **NOW: We are gearing up to continue our winning streak in the Connecticut House!** Every single special election is important, **_even in blue states._** These races are underfunded, overlooked, and only come down to a few votes. But when grassroots Democrats like you stay focused, we’re able to expand our Democratic power in states across the country and protect abortion access, voting rights, and the environment. clean_body: ⏰In two days, there are THREE special elections in the Connecticut House. ⏰ | | | | | ⏰In two days, there are THREE special elections in the Connecticut House. ⏰ FIRST: State Democrats secured a major victory in the Virginia Senate, THEN: In special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire, Democrats showed up to the polls and elected more state legislators, NOW: We are gearing up to continue our winning streak in the Connecticut House! Every single special election is important, even in blue states. These races are underfunded, overlooked, and only come down to a few votes. But when grassroots Democrats like you stay focused, we’re able to expand our Democratic power in states across the country and protect abortion access, voting rights, and the environment. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t win races like this without your grassroots support – it’s that simple. Holding onto every seat in these elections will bolster our Democratic power in Connecticut and keep our majority strong, so we can’t sit this one out. Thank you for all you do, DLCC Special Elections Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | | **We’re counting on YOU to help defend President Biden's Senate majority** \-- _but your donation is missing ahead of TUESDAY’s end-of-month fundraising deadline!_

**3X-IMPACT MATCH OFFER: ACTIVE**
**SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 (BECOMES $15)**

**[Will you help us answer the call and chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to defend the Senate? Your donation will be TRIPLED to stop McConnell from regaining power! >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12239?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230226-UrgentAlert-ObamaTIMFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230226-UrgentAlert-ObamaTIMFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9918%2E9716520%2EtEmwJ_)**

Team -- Last year, THOUSANDS of Democrats donated to make history and expand our Senate majority after President Obama _personally_ reached out and asked for help.

**But now, the Democratic Senate that we worked so hard for is IN DANGER of falling _back_ into Mitch McConnell's hands. Here’s what we’re up against:**

* Republicans are pushing SHOCKING voter suppression laws across the country.
* Republicans are launching MAJOR attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and reproductive rights.
* **And even though our TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH offer is active, not enough Democrats in Pennsylvania are helping us fight back.**

This needs to be your top priority today because we are NOT on track to raise the funds required to defend our Senate majority and re-elect Democrats in key states.

**[Please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ or even more to help Democrats hit Tuesday’s CRUCIAL fundraising goal and save our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12239?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230226-UrgentAlert-ObamaTIMFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230226-UrgentAlert-ObamaTIMFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9918%2E9716520%2EtEmwJ_)**

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: My Houston Roots: Texas Southern University
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Dear Friend,
As Black History Month comes to a close, we are releasing a collection of videos entitled My Houston Roots . This first video is focused on the role that Texas Southern University plays in the history of Houston and in my family history. TSU has educated so many leaders in our community and so many TSU students helped lead sit-ins to desegregate Houston. Check out this video where I discuss all things TSU - ranging from the media black out of the sit-ins during desegregation to how my parents met!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qoiCxH2hLhg [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qoiCxH2hLhg]
I hope you enjoy this story as much as I enjoyed sharing it. Please click here [https://youtu.be/qoiCxH2hLhg] to watch it.
Onward,
Amanda K. Edwards
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]

subject: Derek, I cannot emphasize this enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m reaching out to ask you if you’d be one of the supporters from your area to chip in to the DNC ahead of Tuesday’s deadline. Here are a few reasons why your donation right now matters: | |
---
Derek, I’m reaching out to ask you if you’d be **[one of the 13 more supporters from Manassas to chip in to the DNC ahead of Tuesday’s deadline.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJyiQ9xlRKidRCjgQ5y1hMhXVOhh2z9ALQg4zpXIJKjTCsMramt9X4KAvBJewfl5s3X04oIPLnJQyBq8-IGXsWVzSFy2Q_idCxLZlr0F_QhISAM2h0-3k0Ro25b9zCAt3Uk5p4YDDCBumC4AYJ8zJGqOW2CZwWwBtWejJSP54PEsrM1BX4IeTPyo7TlkK9lquWuTcMARWBus8pO6SNEjNSV3rR2m1kUzM6HyidomOzMhJPfFJynGLy7gBf1LqAnSGx49bHKV1k8mAoIAA5JeO7n_PyBm_hfrMnIUntYOFjdWqHvk9Luc23F7ZzKXDy9cwN96w3rjgrqh-LdLDdEn2GCjgMpH50E_p_xTuiq7nFkIygDGyKqorcEEYa3rMQ1O7dfB8fNH9uzfikxrh_B7X2Wr00fHuZC_ARsXKnjG4jzWHMOnBiU5og0FE0JUlHXLCL2Hq4zwnaqSfFcSRauJi7utT_8KEeKaTZPeMlvN3_2I7HdhX3D-qGFc482S_8t09_BaTH9ebeODhrxpg4MYae1Ag-Xgvf9LMMYLgTYcKkz-gnQIV_2zowTAv0dd2WvWKikC7_s4DjzdVY40c-yt5G5LWsWxoqFYxT5GlDeSyMgb8/3u2/Qt95gKNSSW2A1hc7MGTv_A/h0/cM5sBPOUPom1BHvq7DsA5Mfel19TNT5j4PrmlXoNyk4)** Here are a few reasons why your donation right now matters: Just last year, Democratic candidates like myself had a successful midterm election thanks to the work of the DNC and this grassroots team. I cannot emphasize enough how much grassroots donations contributed to my victory and the victory of Democratic candidates nationwide. Year-round support from folks like you helps build the political infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot election after election. clean_body: I’m reaching out to ask you if you’d be one of the supporters from your area to chip in to the DNC ahead of Tuesday’s deadline. Here are a few reasons why your donation right now matters: | | Derek, I’m reaching out to ask you if you’d be Here are a few reasons why your donation right now matters: Just last year, Democratic candidates like myself had a successful midterm election thanks to the work of the DNC and this grassroots team. I cannot emphasize enough how much grassroots donations contributed to my victory and the victory of Democratic candidates nationwide. Year-round support from folks like you helps build the political infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot election after election. But we need to continue that work by helping the DNC meet their end-of-month goal. You haven’t chipped in to the DNC yet this year, so I’m asking for your help. Will you donate $7 to help the DNC meet their end-of-month deadline before Tuesday? Hitting this goal is no joke, Derek. The successes Democrats have had over the last few years wouldn’t have been possible without this grassroots team. If we’re going to continue making progress for working families and keep holding the GOP accountable, Democrats need all the support they can get. Thank you for all that you do. Raphael Sen. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: We have to stop Biden’s Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Peter-

Biden's Border Crisis is impacting Americans everywhere.

That's why the House Judiciary Committee held a field hearing to expose what the Biden administration and Democrats have been lying about over the past two years.

They want to hide the fact that over 671,000 lbs. of drugs have crossed the southern border since Biden took office and that each day, THOUSANDS of illegal immigrants are crossing into America thanks to his dangerous open border policies.

And it's time for the new House Republican Majority to take a stand.

**This is our opportunity to put America First and protect our nation's sovereignty and secure our southern border.**

**[Please take a minute to sign my petition demanding Republicans to fight and Stop Biden's Border Crisis](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61542474:WSTpV-DNb:m:1:2365227053:8EFAA75B89F28A1F80AB96D970AC09F3:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61542474:WSTpV-DNb:m:1:2365227053:8EFAA75B89F28A1F80AB96D970AC09F3:r) Peter, this is a crucial moment in our nation's history.

We can no longer let Democrats destroy our country and put us in harm's way by allowing waves of illegals freely cross into America unchecked.

_Now I need your help to fights to slam the brakes on Biden's open borders agenda._

If enough American citizens sign this petition, Republicans will be forced to respond and take action. | | | | [STOP BIDEN'S BORDER CRISIS, Sign NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61542474:WSTpV-DNb:m:1:2365227053:8EFAA75B89F28A1F80AB96D970AC09F3:r)
---
_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a former Congressional Candidate (CO-7), West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.

subject: the shortest month of the year

body:
| | |
---
Friend, there are less than 48 hours until my end-of-month deadline, and I'm still $5,293 short of my $25,000 end-of-month goal.
I know that $25,000 is a bold, ambitious goal for the shortest month of the year. **But, friend, during this moment, we cannot afford to be _anything other than bold._**_ _
Election experts at FiveThirtyEight are already saying that Mitch McConnell has a "clear path" to destroying our Senate majority. And after New York Republicans won enough races to flip the House red, they're targeting my seat to take back the Senate.
There are only two Senate seats sitting between American families and the GOP's radical agenda. And the GOP's megadonors will spend _hundreds of millions_ of dollars to flip those seats red so they can destroy our reproductive rights, our Social Security benefits, and all the rights we hold dear.
**Unlike Mitch McConnell and his cronies, I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs. So I'm counting on grassroots people like you to help me make up the gap before our midnight deadline tomorrow.[Please, friend, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare to defend our Senate majority and stop the GOP's dangerous agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59330321/393887754/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3952-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTU5ZTFlNy1hYmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPTEOCBpKwuTmWh2HB7MyMn6JAKRnsQqygyYGcCjjQk=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. subject: Easiest new mag/ammo speed loaders in stock - just cover cost of shipping!
body:
I've got a little present for you...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11710/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/a2114a7cef8ea60a2b7c27ad35c3ce5548689514). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11710/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/a2114a7cef8ea60a2b7c27ad35c3ce5548689514?message_id=ImMzZjhhN2MwLTk4ZGItMDEzYi1mNDc5LTQyMDEwYTgwMDA2NEBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).

I've got a little present for you,
Listen, we just got our first shipment of **[Gunner Gear Speed Loaders](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11710/6374453/757637330a1926af1237ca25486d66c63b5703e5/a2114a7cef8ea60a2b7c27ad35c3ce5548689514)** in the warehouse...

And I'm so pumped about it, we are **giving away the first 500 for NOTHING** but a small shipping and handling charge.

I don't know about you, but we care about our thumbs!

And we want to help you spend more time shootin' and less time loadin' magazines... **WAY less time.**

This thing loads a full mag in about **20 seconds flat...**

Load 9mm or .40 S&W, this bad boy eats em up!

Some people are saying I'm crazy for handing out 500 of these bad boys but I say the best type of advertising is word of mouth!

**[Grab your complimentary Speed Loader right here (Free S&H!)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11710/6374453/757637330a1926af1237ca25486d66c63b5703e5/a2114a7cef8ea60a2b7c27ad35c3ce5548689514)**

Pete Buttiegieg hates people like us.
He's shown nothing but resentment and hatred for the suffering Americans in East Palestine Ohio.
When he was first asked about the disaster, his immediate response was to **blame "white construction workers."**
When Pete was spotted with his husband on the street by a conservative reporter, he harassed her and demanded he get a photo of her.
Pete Buttigieg wants to humiliate every American who stands for the flag and kneels for the Cross.
And he laughs when he sees hard-working Americans suffering in a time of disaster.
We're organizing a massive GOP response to put Pete in his place that needs to happen right now.
All we're asking for is an answer to this one question:
**[Should Pete Buttiegieg be IMPEACHED?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62371348:Jawp3cGbN:m:1:3365131770:1B55E20F725E114934D4453EF52B1215:r)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: One of my first major legislative priorities
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59339195/393911639/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTRmZWE3Ny1iN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIMWPQoaavFD0TCgdlqAxu6bn2b1FDiV2k7xFnWp_4s=&emci=350e2571-b7b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=aa4fea77-b7b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Team, Last week, I testified before the Maryland state House in support of our bill to cut taxes for Maryland veterans. The **Keep Our Heroes Home Act** would exempt up to $40,000 of military retirement income from state taxes. For context, right now, veterans aged 55 or older are eligible to exempt up to $15,000, while those younger than 55 can only exempt $5,000. Veterans continue to serve long after they retire from the military, moving our economy forward and contributing to our communities. **This legislation would help keep our veterans here at home in the state of Maryland, instead of moving to surrounding states with better benefits.** Our state must serve our veterans the way they serve us. We can, and must, do better for the men and women who have sacrificed for us, which is why I made this one of my first major legislative priorities as Governor. **[Will you add your name in support of my Keep Our Heroes Home Act to reduce taxes for Maryland’s retired veterans today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59339196/393911658/-986133065?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230227vets_wm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTRmZWE3Ny1iN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIMWPQoaavFD0TCgdlqAxu6bn2b1FDiV2k7xFnWp_4s=&emci=350e2571-b7b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=aa4fea77-b7b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59339197/393911661/-986133065?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230227vets_wm_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTRmZWE3Ny1iN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIMWPQoaavFD0TCgdlqAxu6bn2b1FDiV2k7xFnWp_4s=&emci=350e2571-b7b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=aa4fea77-b7b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)

clean_body: | Team, Last week, I testified before the Maryland state House in support of our bill to cut taxes for Maryland veterans. The Keep Our Heroes Home Act would exempt up to $40,000 of military retirement income from state taxes. For context, right now, veterans aged 55 or older are eligible to exempt up to $15,000, while those younger than 55 can only exempt $5,000. Veterans continue to serve long after they retire from the military, moving our economy forward and contributing to our communities. This legislation would help keep our veterans here at home in the state of Maryland, instead of moving to surrounding states with better benefits. Our state must serve our veterans the way they serve us. We can, and must, do better for the men and women who have sacrificed for us, which is why I made this one of my first major legislative priorities as Governor. | Elevate, Wes Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: GOP Alerts
subject: Pete Buttigieg hates you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62371360:J6MY3cGN8:m:1:3365131770:BD0CCFDCAD8401303075524EC83C6CCB:r)
---
Pete Buttiegieg hates people like us.
He's shown nothing but resentment and hatred for the suffering Americans in East Palestine Ohio.
When he was first asked about the disaster, his immediate response was to **blame "white construction workers."**
When Pete was spotted with his husband on the street by a conservative reporter, he harassed her and demanded he get a photo of her.
Pete Buttigieg wants to humiliate every American who stands for the flag and kneels for the Cross.
And he laughs when he sees hard-working Americans suffering in a time of disaster.
We're organizing a massive GOP response to put Pete in his place that needs to happen right now.
All we're asking for is an answer to this one question:
**[Should Pete Buttiegieg be IMPEACHED?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62371360:J6MY3cGN8:m:1:3365131770:BD0CCFDCAD8401303075524EC83C6CCB:r)**

Hello, We recently saw House Republicans accuse Democrats of stopping free speech at an Oversight hearing. This accusation is laughable, considering that their own hero, Donald Trump, has told Twitter to remove tweets that called him mean names. Additionally, since Elon Musk "set Twitter free,” Nazis and antisemitism have thrived on the platform. For some reason, my Republican colleagues have turned a blind eye to this reality. I am particularly concerned that these House Republicans have said nothing about Donald Trump having dinner with white supremacist and Holocaust denier Nick Fuentes at Mar-a-Lago. Even worse, Kanye West, another guest at the dinner, has posted antisemitic tropes on his social media, shared antisemitic conspiracy theories, and threatened violence against Jews. The Judiciary Committee Chairman supported Kanye for months even after he said he would wage war on “the Jews.”
[**I'm committed to calling out the anti-Semites and holding Donald Trump accountable for his actions. The Judiciary Committee Chairman supported Kanye for months even after he said he would wage war on “the Jews.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. ****= = = = = = **** Your support is much appreciated. Thank you. name: Fred
subject: Have you heard about AOTL’s innovative mapping technology?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Sound waves. Sonic Clutter. These words may not mean anything to you. But it is the rhythm and blues in our workplace.
Team, I'm Fred Gifford, the Director of Geospatial Analytics at All On The Line. I lead a team of mapping experts that work with our organizers and volunteers to analyze and understand maps as they are released throughout the redistricting process.
Because it's a new year, people think redistricting is over,**but my team is as busy as ever.** Our team of experts are working continuously to develop mapping tools and analysis that will help our organizers mobilize communities across the country as redraws take place in states like Texas, North Carolina, and Ohio.
**Bri and the rest of our North Carolina team are preparing for a busy few weeks ahead of the rehearing of the _Harper v. Hall_ decision and the legislature preparing to redraw the maps. So they asked for some analysis on the court maps from our team of experts.**
[**Check out what we put together for them. You can see a clear difference in the congressional map. ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59344069/393929157/-1229800645?refcode=20230227_AOTL_F_EOM1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2YzI3Y2RjLWMwYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1GA0ondKquJnnIk5Xank0D5B6_mGPuL-fKdFB3Xm14I=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59344070/393929158/-1229800645?refcode=20230227_AOTL_F_EOM1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2YzI3Y2RjLWMwYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1GA0ondKquJnnIk5Xank0D5B6_mGPuL-fKdFB3Xm14I=)
This kind of insight helps our team know which communities could be impacted and where to turn volunteers out to advocate for fair representation.
The bottom line is that our work can only happen with your help. **So if you're ready to commit to ending gerrymandering and make sure we have the resources necessary to keep folks like you involved,[will you make a $25 or more end-of-the-month donation to All On The Line today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59344071/393929159/-1229800645?refcode=20230227_AOTL_F_EOM1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2YzI3Y2RjLWMwYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1GA0ondKquJnnIk5Xank0D5B6_mGPuL-fKdFB3Xm14I=)**

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: You need to read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpn4dgahvo3dornveuako62n1onvmlf1es7og1kg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ei3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfctth6kqm9cdl6gqm6t3gmkoe0sdm64pr1c9mcuordc77m6r6acrmmsqr9d3im3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coon5ddk61r60pjhespm8ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdjmepb4c3jm0o724no)
I’ve been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2j5qut0e03amj74ds1gliq791oveiloi9q3d5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli61pr0c3h2bs)
---

Kevin's first month in office confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgtgon8951eikorlrbbnig1ic8vrecc35je5j3s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli61pr0c3h2bs "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1g723v5sop1ij1cq91ac4089ruhn9kbslfm5f5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli61pr0c3h2bs)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu9umb4mp0qgcaijpirsqm7p23dgfge4j70kvbdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli61pr0c3h2bs)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

---
| |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: A guy who wants to be on the highest court in Wisconsin compared Social Security to slavery, and attacked marriage equality openly and derisively. He’s not a friend to women who need abortion care, or voters who want fair election laws. Do you want him setting precedents that may go to the Supreme Court?
body:
State Supreme Court race this April
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te105ee21-de3c-410e-8d3b-b59d392e90fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Last Tuesday’s primary delivered a stunning result in Wisconsin, where an amazing liberal (judicial races are "non-partisan") not only won, but beat her two GOP opponents combined in the open primary for a Supreme Court seat that determines if MAGA devotees or those devoted to the rule of law have final say over this ultimate swing state's electoral votes in 2024. **_Liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz finished with 46.4% of the vote. The two Republicans received a combined 46.1%. When you add 7.5% a second Democrat got, you see if we continue to fund and support Protasiewicz, we absolutely have a majority to elect her in April._** **_[Celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T760f80aa-3235-48e3-a13e-adcef11eb53e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T172f7a51-1143-419e-a930-1ead5886c729/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**Also, the Republican who won, friend of Trump and far-more-extreme, Daniel Kelly, clarified the race.** _ _This will help explain:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf84921d-fa37-444e-8eb9-42cdbe9e0c46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_You didn't read it wrong. A guy who wants to be on the highest court in Wisconsin compared Social Security to slavery. Attacked gay rights openly and derisively._** **_[So, let's celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa682363-0964-4262-9b18-9b5d8acab509/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** _It's one of the best investments you'll ever make in both a great human being, and democracy._ Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc20abaaa-3127-49d0-95d3-ccca4d581c1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Senator Scott
subject: This is what happens when you challenge Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62371972:JMeKacGBN:m:1:3331421248:0DC70693CCDE7538AEB5A4DBFAEF3172:r)
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmf1cg6d55f4g6lnes5flg0e14e21hui1n6g44h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli69oj6c3h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0nckkfmpc4pb84m68s0omcovaupkd6mm2o9h1o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli69oj6c3h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztu9p9mb174t1aiq7njh8kqdeu8cph74n0eeevpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli69oj6c3h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaoo3vekkh183uhhjdiem3mg9le08k1jtsup17go_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli69oj6c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zquovicio43b39u9phjak7lhjdvgqaf1uqercja8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli69oj6c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z51mbvhgg9roemeq4jlpj4essqnm7rqksmv7jb6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cli69oj6c3h2bs)

clean_body: If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | Fellow American, I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit. I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning. The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery. Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - IN PUBLIC. Right now, we're failing that test. That's why I am running for President of the United States. Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation. This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we: Believe in merit. Believe in accountability. Believe in free speech. Believe in American exceptionalism. Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. E pluribus unum - from many, one. These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them. Join me, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. subject: Uplifting Black voices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Shontel is fighting for Black lives every day
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59347607/393939930/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230227BHMFirstThen_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmY1M2I4NS1jOGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEz-eqm-PffdEu1qviGXaQ7ZUGDtiSor0l-cnzNNitA=) As we wrap up Black History Month, we want to take this opportunity to recognize our very own groundbreaking voice for Black lives, Rep. Shontel Brown.

_**FIRST:**_ Shontel crafted and passed bipartisan legislation declaring racism a public health crisis as a Cuyahoga County Councilmember.

_**THEN:**_ She made history as the first woman and first Black person to lead Ohio’s largest Democratic party, the Cuyahoga County Democrats.

_**NOW:**_ She’s fighting for Black lives every day as the Representative for Ohio’s 11th Congressional District.

Shontel has always worked to uplift Black voices, and right now, we need to make sure she has the resources to continue that work in the House.

[We’re up against an end-of-month deadline as we close out Black History Month, and Shontel needs your support to ensure she continues to have a seat at the table. | | | To be honest, Peter, I don't like saying this.

But it's no secret that it has to be said before too long.

So I'm going to ask you a very important question.

**_[Please read my question and answer HERE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372000:J1oDPcGNk:m:1:3331421248:985F3E410641AE4A7D22249EAB456726:r "Please read my question and answer HERE.")_**

Thank you for your understanding,

Ron Johnson

---

Thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, but **_[will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372000:J1oDPcGNk:m:1:3331421248:985F3E410641AE4A7D22249EAB456726:r "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end")_** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?

Any amount you can contribute will be helpful. Your help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: While it may seem far away, 2024 is just around the corner….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Want to make sure we keep up this momentum
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59349194/393946018/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE2NjVhYmQtY2NiNi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0Ho1QCwgnoOOlG-uIGTmy8z_3iekAQuzMhaTbgZ4t8=&emci=5fce9723-64b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=da665abd-ccb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Thanks to your support, we are so close to reaching our $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. Now, I'm counting on this grassroots team to help us finish out the month strong so we can hit the ground running in March.

Look, I'll be the first to tell you that the sky won't fall if we don't reach this goal. But with everything from reproductive rights, voting rights, Social Security and Medicare – _and much more_ – on the line, we can't afford to lose our momentum.

Here's the bottom line: In 2024, there's a lot to lose, and for many Americans, much of what's at stake hinges on whether Democrats take back our House majority. **And while it may seem far away, 2024 is just around the corner.**

**[Before the February deadline, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to help us gather the tools needed to take back the House in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59349195/393946020/-1919651591?refcode=em23_230224_eom2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230224_eom2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE2NjVhYmQtY2NiNi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0Ho1QCwgnoOOlG-uIGTmy8z_3iekAQuzMhaTbgZ4t8=)**

Thanks for your support! It's an honor to serve you,

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbck0acuclg15gca4kiq12k9drkdjf4gehf93po8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7ctldjumt02qna21b0gugdnklgkjc0l48h24vkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9rtok3d2qqhdlsifr0u6culqcbodm4oash87c50_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqvure66h65iv7ggtlfaq1n761tpudl4n7aiu5ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW →**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg2d7blkklspnahl46pmnrlprclqfkm10lli2jo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z23dnk8h5tvs07a53po1kq4fugh7cmmmo9j4ilp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)

---

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhi36v541dl1hb3iia6jqk6u5me73d8cv7tvps7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs) | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z81k769en4h36bui34me0ao5ajj4knelaqmsgab0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs) | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqh21k50jd6fc5o1v0mofnlbak4nbp96csdjl18g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh64p74c3h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. subject: The 5 lies of Critical Race Theory
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.

| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._5SMBnNtzo_Q6il4UuX8w)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we've seen from Critical Race Theory-and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[ I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

| | Inside this important resource, you'll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you'll also discover that:
* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America-and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._S_iB8uFCR-BVBDglE5Q)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)
I wanted you to hear directly from me: **I am running for the United States Senate in Michigan.**
I’m going to lay out more on why I’m running, but if you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign right away you can use this link:
[**https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/Founding-Donor**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=2&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=3&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
So here’s why I’ve decided to run: we all know America is going through something right now. We seem to be living from crisis to crisis. But there are certain things that should be _really_ simple:
Like living a middle-class life in the state that invented the middle class.
Like making things in America so that we’re in control of our own economic security.
Like protecting our children from the things that are truly harming them.
And preserving our rights and our democracy so that our kids can live their version of the American dream.
I’m running for Senate because I believe that we need a new generation of leaders that thinks differently, works harder, and never forgets that _we are public servants._
Because service is how I’ve spent my life: I spent my career protecting our homeland. After 9/11, I was recruited into the CIA and served three tours in Iraq alongside the U.S. military. I went on to serve under Presidents of both parties in the White House, and then at the Pentagon.
But what motivated me to first run for elected office was my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 – and she didn’t have health insurance. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience – of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork – helped shape my decision to run for office.
These experiences have shaped my time, my priorities, my approach to my four years in the U.S. House, and continue to serve as my motivation to run for Senate.
My experience also impacts _how_ I’ve run my campaigns. Before my first run in 2018, I made a decision to not accept any donations from corporate PACs, because I never wanted my constituents to question why I vote the way I do.
**My campaign for the U.S. Senate will also refuse money from corporate PACs. Not a dime.**
Some people might see it as a disadvantage, especially since Senate campaigns are notoriously expensive. But I know that we can win when we’re powered by real people, contributing what they can, when they can.
To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. A crazy amount. It’s also going to take a lot of work – which is why I’ll be hitting the ground to kick off a listening tour through Michigan, starting with Detroit later this week, to hear what people throughout the state want from their leaders.
When you’re running to win a seat in a swing state like Michigan, we need to start building our war chest on day one. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll be moved to support this campaign today.
[I would be honored if you would join me today and chip in $3 to become one of our first Founding Donors.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=4&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-febu23.nRvxtF&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=23&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-febu23.AlkAvH&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=24&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-febu23.UIWHQO&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=25&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o4EyCf&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=26&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-febu23.l4-i9J&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=27&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-febu23.9QW3RW&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=28&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz)**
---
****
I *know* that our country is going to get through this time. It’s hard work, but that's what Michiganders have done for generations. It’s going to take engaged citizens and principled leaders. I’m grateful to know we’re in this together from the start. Thank you in advance for chipping in.
Onward!
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=22%2E135344%2EmdYsTz).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

If you are outside of Anchorage and want to watch the Kickoff, please click here or see our Facebook Page**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63fcfddbb711f81649570755&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D100088118914747&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63fc74bfd025ae7078f0232a&l=en-US&s=l_Lqm9GfLaYYHPEwBPqf5A-jfI0%3D)

---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63fcfddbb711f81649570755&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63fc74bfd025ae7078f0232a%26ss_email_id%3D63fcfddbb711f81649570755%26ss_campaign_name%3DFairbanks%2B%252F%2BNorth%2BPole%2BSigning%2BToday%2B%2540%2B6-8pm%2BGene%25E2%2580%2599s%2BChrysler%252C%2Bforward%2Bthis%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-27T19%253A01%253A08Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63fc74bfd025ae7078f0232a&l=en-US&s=U4w8lls3mVw25uAUUrSsfr0coak%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63fcfddbb711f81649570755&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63fc74bfd025ae7078f0232a&l=en-US&s=ZOXyxhyipHhkZWg1RVCJG5Vt8tM%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
