---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---
---

2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904
Wasilla, AK

| | Peter, we’ve got a problem.

**_Marjorie Taylor Greene’s extremism has taken over the Republican Party._**

She’s the right hand of the Speaker of the House, sits on two of the most powerful Congressional Committees, and is even talked about as a possible Vice Presidential pick!

We’re working hard to defeat her extremism, _**but we need your help.**_

If we can hold the White House and flip control of Congress in 2024, then we can remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from her prime positions of power and influence!

**But if we don’t succeed, then she’ll just grow more powerful, and her influence over the Republican Party (_and our country!_) will spread.**

_[**Please, pitch in $15 or whatever you’re able right now to help us hit our End of Month goal before our midnight deadline tomorrow! Every dollar you pitch in will go towards fighting the spread of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s extremism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59327282/393876163/710125701?refcode=20230227.1_PSD_2AX&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzUzM2NjMy1hN2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dSoAzZmGkS1PdYAKtW_tjGISEdF82WAIGdPc1387PmE=)_ | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Peter, we’ve got a problem. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s extremism has taken over the Republican Party. She’s the right hand of the Speaker of the House, sits on two of the most powerful Congressional Committees, and is even talked about as a possible Vice Presidential pick! We’re working hard to defeat her extremism, but we need your help. If we can hold the White House and flip control of Congress in 2024, then we can remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from her prime positions of power and influence! name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Feb. 27: Stop Biden’s Backdoor Treaty
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act petitions to stop Joe Biden from violating the Constitution by entering into a treaty without the consent of the Senate and impeach two of Biden’s top cronies for abandoning their duties!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtYmlkZW5zLWJhY2tkb29yLXdoby10cmVhdHk_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/vpyN88xL5gl7R4tlgUXK9g)
---
Joe Biden is taking an ax to another crucial provision of the U.S. Constitution that safeguards against executive overreach. This time, he’s trying to force the United States into a treaty involving the World Health Organization – without winning support from the U.S. Senate. Not only would this weaken America’s independence during the next health outbreak, it also represents another attack from the Left to transform our system of government. **[Urge your Senators to demand a vote in the Senate on Biden’s backdoor WHO treaty – and then urge your senators to VOTE NO!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtYmlkZW5zLWJhY2tkb29yLXdoby10cmVhdHk_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/R1miJUn2QlbE9DChFZWMug)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtYmlkZW5zLWJhY2tkb29yLXdoby10cmVhdHk_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/yFA6ThGmUcpbNbZz3vVKNA)
---
|
---
| | Biden signed an [executive order](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-MAQ) directing all federal agencies to establish a yearly "equity action plan" that is superficially aimed at helping "underserved communities." One section, "Embedding Equity into Government-wide Processes," instructs the Director of the Office of Management and Budget to "support equitable decision-making, promote equitable deployment of financial and technical assistance, and assist agencies in advancing equity, as appropriate and wherever possible." It speaks very specifically about employing artificial intelligence, or AI, toward these ends: "When designing, developing, acquiring, and using artificial intelligence and automated systems in the Federal Government, agencies shall do so, consistent with applicable law, in a manner that advances equity." The moral hazard created by the initiative [has been widely condemned](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). "Our children and their children will be suffering the consequences of this mandate," software developer Jon Schlinkert tweeted. "AI is about to change the world in unprecedented ways, the last thing we need is an AI that promotes racial division and discrimination."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3BldGUtYnV0dGlnaWVnLW11c3QtZ28_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/k07kNnA-qu4IpiIzd-pdDw)
---
Since the day Joe Biden installed him as Transportation Secretary, Pete Buttigieg has made it clear that he has no interest in the systems that move America. Why else would he wait a whole three weeks to visit the victims of the chemical train derailment? Or refuse to act when the supply chain crisis drove prices sky-high? Pete has made it clear he doesn’t want the job. **[Urge Congress to impeach Buttigieg!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3BldGUtYnV0dGlnaWVnLW11c3QtZ28_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/iyi_D5rRwjI2RU1zK4j73Q)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3BldGUtYnV0dGlnaWVnLW11c3QtZ28_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/8178z9nCKNMpYpw4UGUfyA)
---
|
---
| | Leftwing "Dark money" activists are intentionally weaponizing the IRS in concert with the Biden administration. The IRS is [enlisting New America, a far-left group](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to examine the feasibility of a new "direct file" tax return system. New America relies on funding from other left-leaning organizations for funding, including the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and the George-Soros-backed Open Society Foundations. The problem is that under law, the IRS is required to work with independent third-party organizations to develop the new tax-filing system, but working with far-left institutions tied to [billionaires on the Left](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) raises a big red flag. This unholy alliance threatens the independence of a supposedly nonpartisan governmental agency and it harkens to a time when Tea Party Patriots experienced weaponized [targeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlYmNhY2hlLmdvb2dsZXVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbS9zZWFyY2g_-TiBkFaA) from the IRS.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
You’d be hard pressed to find a politician who has abandoned his post more completely and dishonestly than Biden’s Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. He has presided over the worst border crisis in American history, yet he continues to lie to Congress that the border is secure. America’s security begins with the strength of our borders. We cannot afford another day of lawlessness! **[Urge Congress to impeach Mayorkas and secure our borders!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._T3SHguldWKgS14w)
---
|
---
| | The United States is at risk of being undermined from within by Chinese companies [set on stealing data](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/7t3be0cbq31KIlJweEeAFA) from innocent Americans and lobbying for the Left’s causes, according to reporting by Foreign Policy. The top perpetrator is Alibaba, a Chinese e-commerce giant that answers to the Chinese Communist Party and that spent more than $2.5 million on lobbying efforts in the United States, according to OpenSecrets. In the 2020 election cycle, most of Alibaba's political donations, totaling more than $1.2 million, went to the Left. The lone on the Right to accept Alibaba campaign funding was none other than former Rep. Liz Cheney.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-AI4KKrjjh5M5dhjg)
---
Our efforts to SAVE the gas stove are working! Two U.S. Senators have floated a bill to stop the federal government from banning or fixing the cost of gas stoves. [**Please sign our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to secure safeguards against any bans!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._zP9K7P3GkeYKQH06GsglA)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTgtM2YwYTM0N2Y0MTcxNDBiODg4MTljYzliZmY1NjdjMmEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/3KNxjfaWFvAqffTi01Zv9A)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650403%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BDFDubtsKiYKZAeXqv67YQ&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650404%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXhiB1MiMuhfbO9YLvtDzA&sysid=1)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650415%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cybVPbCEtOof0gKkJG9oDA&sysid=1)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650416%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IW1IM5IWGS2wt%2fv0%2fogKRg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650417%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NE5u0U1ZJD47Ot%2fqkI3uQA&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650418%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y8sr%2bxe39xMcZWe8JkQeaA&sysid=1)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Hungry for a cause
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This dream has always stuck with me.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztl01est13j3difmrigo1vv6biku41jv5i5l7tsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh62pj4s5h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssi4mqrvrupqc8ti93mlaqfkus7h0hs9s0vad88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh62pj4s5h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcpbgn901s0n43pnhekpc2fvtkns6mbdjelbd31g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh62pj4s5h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbasjdqkp8ao56rgp00n3460cc9e1cpta8sbnk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh62pj4s5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvu04lnh6vep3k6p2h3lhugv8ip7iepkthao6o00_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh62pj4s5h2bs)

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I have not lost my voice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Even in the dark moments, we can’t forget about the progress that we’ve made together.
#

Friends -
Twelve years ago, a gunman tried to take my life. I was shot in the head while meeting with constituents in Tucson.
Because of the damage the bullet caused to the left hemisphere of my brain, where the language function sits, I have aphasia. This means that even though the words are there in my head, I have a hard time getting them out.
**Aphasia may make it harder for me to speak. But I have not lost my voice.**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=1&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)
The road to recovery hasn’t been easy for me, but I’ve never given up. In addition to speech therapy and physical therapy, I dedicate much of my time to riding my bike, playing my French horn, and practicing yoga. They help me keep moving forward and getting better, day by day.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=2&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)
My recovery is just like the work we do together to end gun violence. Some days are more difficult than others.
I know sometimes it may feel like the challenges of ending gun violence in our communities are insurmountable, especially when we see news of another mass shooting or learn of countless other tragedies that don’t make the headlines. But even in the dark moments, we can’t forget about the progress that we’ve made together.
In the decade since Giffords’ founding, we’ve helped pass 525 gun safety laws in states nationwide. Last year, we helped pass the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years.
We still face stiff headwinds, and we cannot give up. If we lose hope, we let the gun lobby win. And we can’t let that happen.
A big part of standing up to the gun lobby’s lies, fear, and large sums of money is reaching our organization’s fundraising goals.
This month, fundraising has been a challenge for us, and we’re not quite where we need to be to reach our February fundraising goal by tomorrow at midnight.
So this is where I need to ask for your help.
[**Will you make your first online contribution of $3 to Giffords PAC today? Our February fundraising deadline is approaching quickly, and I’m really hoping I can count on your support.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=3&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-feb23.bz_51b&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=22&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-feb23.DP5oYT&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=23&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-feb23.A7XpEF&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=24&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-feb23.cbL74m&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=25&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-feb23.0e7VmA&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=26&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb23.UurDMh&refcode=em230227-1-subs&t=27&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS)**
---
****
Thank you so much for all that you do. I’m grateful to have you with me in this fight.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4321%2E3935704%2EkYHRsS) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Unleash America
subject: Will you protect our country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a738c44d288142f8858bef1c4e786cf4&_e=-Cn-cAvcx_xavCMwx4yCj6S5hR430h2V6fpCcC65y-Xb_9E6-4Qh2KvBHoZo1o52D2NEyjfReHL1SmG-KLtB3UuWsgK6JLM3AMLGdhMX15GWxkh_zfCAjrp7tWrZWokckFGHjUd_y47aFcTFg8ykJZnVf8VftfcohFm0uFCbSfQOblX4MFERu8zaMXXV016Cn4-pXth5pIPuF-nP2n0ZIttEyktw5H21cjfrJod7psxJF9psfAGx25DS6a6SkPeKxEncDWo7k13eqnyn4-9en-7PCQ2jWO8qNPSz7hx5bIetP0lC3EcHPfAkisn4AasJLpEkAYsAU1mC5r0-iPKHfakw9IAe2R40Y5NOl1eSvYhjJt8cTTMVBjP-cA18lCdu)
---
Peter, **First, **the far Left came for our economy, crushing American families with inflation.

**Then,** they came for our military, pushing critical race theory and woke politics in our service academies.

**NOW **they’re going after children younger than _ever_ in schools with woke gender ideology and revisionist history that ERASES America greatness.

**Peter, the Democrats are going for the very heart of our nation, and it’s up to US to stop them.**

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Newsweek: Nikki Haley Should Not Be Criticized—or Praised—for Her Gender or Ethnicity
body:

[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=7b6478d6bbac44ef86d37becdedcaeda&_e=rTZz9FIrWV_iYkeUkkfkmS2Na8NZnSk3pBJ0JRUEZEGyv3uvEBWeY88cbSBoYpl_oGrCejXzc-ySZ8CDPYqPSbjT68Lvv0I1huhOBex6CIcDVk-D834extvP7ivNpfnmmJUNhAX_rCTXCpf__cq25mgDccRrVPkSu2V1phd2hklK2HTQ_-2IWPFvanIxn8DjB_2U3ZWRbKFSggIgFFq6uQ%3D%3D)
---
_**Nikki Haley Should Not Be Criticized—or Praised—for Her Gender or Ethnicity**_ By Bobby Jindal
---
Any candidate offering themselves to lead our nation should expect harsh scrutiny, and everything seems like fair game in modern campaigns. Candidates once expected the media and voters to respect personal matters as out of bounds, but that zone of privacy shrinks smaller and smaller with each campaign—especially as candidates share more and more personal information via social media. Candidates, professional athletes, and actors who willingly pursue lucrative, prestigious, or powerful careers should spare us the crocodile tears about how they prefer the protection from criticism they enjoyed before achieving success. Still, Nikki Haley should not be criticized or praised for being an Indian-American woman running for president; the fact she was born female and to Indian immigrants is not the most important thing to know about her. Liberals reduce Haley's candidacy to the candidate's gender and ethnicity—unsurprising given their obsession with identity politics. Conservatives should avoid falling into this same trap. While liberals praise themselves for supporting the precedent-breaking ascendancy of various gender, sexual, and ethnic minorities into positions of authority, their hypocrisy comes through when the minority breaking the glass ceiling evinces conservative views. Liberals denounce conservatives who reject claims of systemic bias as self-serving bigots, but direct even more intense fire at conservative minorities, whom they deem self-hating frauds who aspire to sneak into positions of privilege by betraying their groups. [**Finish reading on Newsweek.com**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=7b6478d6bbac44ef86d37becdedcaeda&_e=rTZz9FIrWV_iYkeUkkfkmbMuGQkDpUfeikNJy-Y2XwtGnGqUlVJn2cP3rRJXU8m_d_2fbaKmqBGKmGI59cuL9rmaayfjPfQLK_deisjlobqPvuAqyfcKX8jkZ472cERUZEOfOnjBn9HosiiEmCrzsrDaWpPuu5UaVlieF0Cogtd1h2mFB2BqZ6dSJKd38WEgVBoDO1DVKuzb3j_W5pZSqctesT_Sfg-9GdOJ9jpfWvBE56xz0n1nPtue2A3y4hlP1QBrMKQ1KNO8YYw2XEj3bbUu6ZzOH-ShECR-rlaOyFBx2rkmLs2XrqpIzlufcZpV)

name: Shift WA
subject: You helped.
body:
The show of strength we need to demand that pro-criminal Democrats in the State Senate act on a bill restoring public safety. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61544150:sfTrv-DNR:m:1:2610672541:297529630F10FD34A47868A5164B0C13:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Last week, we asked you to help us put a spotlight on HB 1363, the bill that gives police the authority to once again pursue someone they reasonably suspect of a violent crime, a sexual crime, vehicular assault, escape, DUI, and/or domestic violence.

Of course, this bill was only necessary because of Democrats' 2021 failed policy banning police from pursuing suspects fleeing the scene of a crime. Communities across our state have seen crime skyrocket because of this pro-criminal policy that, effectively, handcuffed the police.

Well, in just a couple of days, we had thousands of people sign our petition. It's the show of support we need to keep highlighting those pro-criminal Democrats in the State Senate who will not act on this needed reform.

Our law enforcement officers cannot protect our communities effectively until we fix the Democrats' failed, pro-criminal policies. Unfortunately, as we have reported, the Democrat Senate Chair of the Law and Justice Committee has signaled that she will NOT move the bill forward in the past. She won't even allow it to be heard in public.

We're working to change that - and we're thankful that you stand with us. Our efforts depend entirely on grassroot supporters like you. **[Will you help us continue fighting for HB 1363's passage by contributing $50, $25, or even just $10 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61544151:sfTrv-DNR:m:1:2610672541:297529630F10FD34A47868A5164B0C13:r)**

We need your help to continue holding Democrats accountable. [**Please consider contributing today.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61544151:sfTrv-DNR:m:1:2610672541:297529630F10FD34A47868A5164B0C13:r)

The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61544152:sfTrv-DNR:m:1:2610672541:297529630F10FD34A47868A5164B0C13:r)

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: It all boils down to three words:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372008:JJQRMcGrN:m:1:3331421248:89B2826DD5BCB6BF4689AF46D42D6144:r)
---

Kevin's first month in office confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372008:JJQRMcGrN:m:1:3331421248:89B2826DD5BCB6BF4689AF46D42D6144:r "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372008:JJQRMcGrN:m:1:3331421248:89B2826DD5BCB6BF4689AF46D42D6144:r)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372008:JJQRMcGrN:m:1:3331421248:89B2826DD5BCB6BF4689AF46D42D6144:r)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

---
| |
* * *
---

Bakersfield, CA 93389

Mike is busy fighting for conservative priorities in Congress, so I want to take a minute to reach out on his behalf.

Right now, our team is coming up on a critical deadline, and we need your help.

Our end-of-month deadline is **tomorrow night** at **midnight** , and we still need to raise **$2500** to meet our goal.

I know that’s a lot of money, but if every patriot pitches in just a little, I know we can do it.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Put Constitution 101 on television
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvg1f8mrt2qie0p1cagtc7g1h9upg44mate6hb1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaphkcoq60s33chh66t1gehr6bc71mdrjeo9me9ie3dr4s4oj1dr4slib2otgmurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coon5ddk6upbcphimiqr6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdjmepb2cdieaor24no)
There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don’t worry, I also have some exciting news.

This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl4co91e12hl7ku63mqghccohcm9q55kthfd32p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh2bs) Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff...
* Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven't read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn't read one of our most important founding documents! But there's one more stat I'd like to give you...

* 26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment--not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly--not a single one.

These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It's the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That's why we've been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I'm excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, "**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ," that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **["Constitution 101" directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemet4q3a86p6rtbiq57delg5hkemmk34b39l700_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh2bs)**
## Should there be shows on TV about the Constitution?
[YES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zme4qlnqm8qgem7v39i90gsi820hmuev96kgv0q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjkne1knvjokhqsjbvjr45ernpg5rchjtbbiiig_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh2bs) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they've been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I'm excited about this and why it's so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible --so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It's also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing "Constitution 101" on television networks isn't as expensive as you might think. To air the **_30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We've negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the "big game." So, airing one 30-minute segment of "**Constitution 101** " on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200--which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zak8vtsib2t6dobbm5slguv4j1iic4b41qdvu6mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh2bs)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrd71aia56akar9gj957eomjom8aop6tmik89o0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh2bs)** After reading those statistics, I'm sure you'll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only "a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people."** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z0tvsghfg24t77bq8dqed6pa8l7br03su8finfe0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkdc6sbh5j1tk5dftct98qvrcv13u05km1naoe5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh66p75cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Suing Kaiser Permanente for abusing children
body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot,Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decidedshe was “trans”... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente’s multi-billion-dollar_ _industry to “transition” her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8fsrif9ns85jkt64g9fgjk2v80udrvk0vth7gk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe’s healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to “test” their “gender affirming care.”** Now for the rest of Chloe’s life, her voice will always be deeper, she’ll never be able to breastfeed – if she can even have children – and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe’s healthy body for profit.****And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **...and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust.**[**I’m asking you to support Chloe’s landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case’s legal fund.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zchmk0lqrfku0hu6romic0uv3u6128arkar3pda8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs) Winning this case won’t be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country.They’re going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine.**But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we’ll shut them down.** [**I’m counting on you to join me in Chloe’s fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zde59oo3df5v3rgpogb40iq3rf8f79ds286evbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs) Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.
---
| | [**DONATE $50**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4vnn5mhue4o0r3o6k51vqbemt62gcn5djqngj80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE $100**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8su2v91scc4ljtqm1g97ds17a7llduss0nu0538_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE $250**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za9qkuibd3irpec985tkq5k0a7brra5d1aab6g18_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE $500**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv7m6v7u31f6ribbqkoiamocj5jasq1do0b52h60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE $1,000**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfjm4mnufr5nmptvv5gsffv3ut8180lsdc4rqj9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhtbkb1o929orchkc2rr34o207vhrlnvr9nihbso_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)
---
Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country.
---
| | Thank you and God Bless,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO
---
Center for American Liberty
---
|
---
| | [**Donate >**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs31uqj0bfgr8b3pgi4iutkah8gantqciobijls0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh6epb2c9h2bs)

name: Tim Scott
subject: I’ve been trying to get a hold of you all week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | | | | [<HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372654:6fuqzcGwN:m:1:3365131770:85FA6202847C4CD850A5B40702AF40B0:r "Generic Button")
---
It's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372654:6fuqzcGwN:m:1:3365131770:85FA6202847C4CD850A5B40702AF40B0:r "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372655:6fuqzcGwN:m:1:3365131770:85FA6202847C4CD850A5B40702AF40B0:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _******
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372655:6fuqzcGwN:m:1:3365131770:85FA6202847C4CD850A5B40702AF40B0:r "Can I count on
you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**
****
---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372655:6fuqzcGwN:m:1:3365131770:85FA6202847C4CD850A5B40702AF40B0:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---
1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

"Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?" ** | | "JOIN MY TEAM" Thank you for everything, and God Bless, Tim Scott | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. **BREAKING NEWS: "America First Legal & Texas File For An Emergency Injunction To Block Biden's Most Extreme Open Borders Decree..."**
Peter, Did you see the headline above recently? **The situation is dire.** The far-left is cheering as DHS attempts to roll out Biden's most insidious and radical open borders edict to date:**a parole program for illegal aliens**. **This lawless action is a threat to American sovereignty. ** That's why _America First Legal is taking action_ to stop it. We're proud to work with the courageous Ken Paxton to represent Texas and a coalition of twenty states as we seek an **emergency preliminary injunction** to shut down this pernicious program, and prevent it from injecting a new wave of illegal aliens into America. [**Support America First Legal Here >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372018:6eCgzcGJN:m:1:3331421248:AC569D824B0AF7E1150E5D8614F5283A:r) The unlawful program allows illegal aliens to obtain advance approval to enter the United States - despite no basis in the law for them doing so. And the preliminary injunction we just filed for _**will stop this program cold while we fight it in court!**_ Biden's staggeringly RADICAL plan to **mass import illegal aliens** directly to the United States without any legal basis for doing so is nothing more than a brazen attempt to accelerate stratospheric migration levels while concealing its sheer volume by transporting illegal aliens directly into the American interior. If we don't stop Biden's program the damage will be catastrophic: **a deluge of illegal migrants flooding our labor markets, burdening taxpayers, jeopardizing public health and safety, and stretching our safety net to the breaking point. ** [_To win our fight to_** _stop this traitorous campaign_** _to transform our country with mass illegal immigration we need your help. Please support our efforts right now with a generous donation,_**_thank you! >> _**_ _](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372018:6eCgzcGJN:m:1:3331421248:AC569D824B0AF7E1150E5D8614F5283A:r) _Thank you for your crucial support as we fight this lawless scheme!_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

body:
From: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| **BREAKING: Hakeem Jeffries makes history as the first Black lawmaker to lead a party in Congress** Listen, this is a HUGE milestone for Jeffries, Democrats, and the entire country. So we’re sending Jeffries a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41058?t=6&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41058?t=7&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41058?t=8&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41058?t=9&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41058?t=10&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41058?t=11&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6556%2E878179%2EFg8pEm).**

name: this is major | Left Action
subject: re: George Santos
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [George Santos lied in court in front of a judge. Tell Congress: Expel George Santos now! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55839e12-1f2f-4e5b-94d3-42f43aa99d2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11a7e1c8-e247-442a-ad8d-5f57254f2d05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | George Santos might be the biggest liar ever to become a member of Congress – and that’s saying a lot. He lied about his work experience. He lied about his education. He lied about being Jewish. He lied about his grandparents being Holocaust survivors. Bizarrely, he even lied about being on a championship volleyball team -- at a school he never attended. Up until now, we only knew that George Santos lied about these things to voters and journalists – which is bad enough – but it turns out that he also lied in court in front of a judge about his employment. So far, George Santos has yet to face serious repercussions for his lies. But a Congressman who lied to a judge during official proceedings should face some consequences. There are more than enough reasons to kick George Santos out of Congress. [It's time for Congress to expel him. The House can do it with a 2/3 vote. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19cbc620-58ef-42bf-9685-c821ef60d0aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[Tell them to do it NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dfec621-e4e2-4bb7-bb55-67cc7f8912f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Jon Tester, whom you may know from his hit social media series, “On The Farm With Sharla & Jon,” is also a fantastic Democratic Senator from Montana. How great is it that this 7-fingered dirt farmer is real, and is a Senator who sides with working families across the country? Pretty great, right?! Are you all in to send him back to the Senate, too?
body:
He’s real & he’s on our side.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T314e72bd-bb2b-4a6d-8d3c-a2d93d5bf487/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**It's official, he's in!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cbfbd4b-b699-4de6-963f-fd7fc05a427b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "he" is Jon Tester, and it's incredible news because it's such a key race for us to hold our majority. But also because of the kind of person Jon Tester is._ _**Tester shocked the political world in 2006, knocking off an incumbent GOP Senator. He did this because he is, and always has been, the real deal.** _ **From Tester himself:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb02069c-f6c4-4e83-a3ab-7e5f01adfeb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Tester easily connects issues we all care about--climate, USPS, infrastructure & more--to a life of hard work, in his case on the farm, better than anyone else._** [**_Will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24e45c54-5065-412e-876c-a83626586044/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_He's always there for Democratic priority legislation, because he knows it benefits _his_ _people_. Never feels a need to position himself vs our party for some narcissistic need for attention, or fear he appears too "liberal," like Sinema & Manchin. Again, because, _he's the real deal-_ -he's "Yellowstone," no performance required_**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f1f0fe9-dc0b-43dc-8e8a-5e68cc73f634/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _How many politicians do you think this would describe?_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7360f04-3b8b-4e8b-ada0-11344b6851d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But even with his talent and authenticity, Tester will only stay a Senator, fighting our fights from Montana & Washington, if we provide him the resources so every Montantan hears his story, sees his huge smile. And we'll only hold our Senate majority if we reelect Sen. Tester--the math just isn't there without him._** **_[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6181d6a-3371-49f3-8982-5bb031990c0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [**_So will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf96aa2d2-bee2-45f2-aa0f-73c13b2adaa9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thanks for fighting to keep the good ones. We need them now, more than ever._ Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95f2a75e-320c-4e5b-bf71-912e97e97b09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Breaking News
subject: ALERT: GOP launches push to CUT Social Security.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **ALERT via _Washington Post_ : House GOP launches push to CUT Social Security!**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11628?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230227-BreakingNews-SocialSecurityGOPCuts-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230227-BreakingNews-SocialSecurityGOPCuts-Pros-sl1&akid=9896%2E9716520%2EzhNGAL)
**[We must fight back and DEFEND Social Security! Add your name to our URGENT petition standing with President Biden _against_ House Republicans' Social Security cuts >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11628?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230227-BreakingNews-SocialSecurityGOPCuts-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230227-BreakingNews-SocialSecurityGOPCuts-Pros-sl1&akid=9896%2E9716520%2EzhNGAL)**

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/11628?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230227-BreakingNews-SocialSecurityGOPCuts-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230227-BreakingNews-SocialSecurityGOPCuts-Pros-sl1&akid=9896%2E9716520%2EzhNGAL)
---

This is serious, team: _The Washington Post_ says House Republicans are now considering "a series of legislative proposals targeting Social Security" -- **_including raising the retirement age, slashing benefits, and more!_**

If House Republicans have their way, Social Security could be in _serious_ jeopardy, but President Biden and Senate Democrats are standing firm to protect millions of Americans' hard-earned retirement security.

**We’ve launched an _urgent_ petition to PROVE that Americans stand with President Biden AGAINST Republican plans to slash Social Security benefits -- _but your signature is STILL MISSING! _**

**Please sign on before midnight:**

name: Kimberly Peeler-Allen
subject: Re: Your official Team James Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
---
Peter, yesterday, Attorney General Letitia James reached out to this community for support – but it looks like you have _still_ not answered her call.

I’m counting on you to step up and join Letitia’s fight for progress because right now, millions of Americans across the country are _still_ __ without reproductive care, _still_ living in danger of gun violence, and _still_ having their fundamental rights trampled on.

Letitia James vowed to hold the powerful and corrupt accountable, but she needs top supporters like _you_ to join her. **That’s why she called on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their official Team James Memberships, but we have a midnight deadline tomorrow, and we’re still short of our goal by 432 new members.

[So please, Peter, will you donate $5, $25, $50, or more now to activate your Team James Membership and help Letitia defend the voiceless and vulnerable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59337658/393906591/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk983-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWViOGY0Ni1iNGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2Hd7Y06wxP7fn5jeMxLmzEWyj9qesWvX22Zpf4Nb70=)**

\------- Forwarded message -------
From: **Letitia**
Date: Sun, Feb 26, 2023
Subject: URGENT: Activate your membership now
| | |
---
Peter, can I be honest with you? I know it’s tempting to only focus on the positives, but I wanted to give you a real snapshot of where our fight for progress stands as we head into our third month of the year:

**_Still,_** millions of Americans are without access to safe reproductive health care; LGBTQ+ people are _nine times_ more likely than non-LGBTQ+ people to be victims of violent hate crimes; and approximately 40,000 Americans will likely die from gun violence before the year ends.

These chilling statistics make one thing clear: Our fight for justice is nowhere near complete. **That’s why I’m throwing myself headfirst into the fight – and I’m counting on you to join me, Peter.

[Please, before February ends, will you help me get 1,000 new Team James Members and help power our important, progressive work? I can’t win these fights without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59337663/393906596/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk983-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWViOGY0Ni1iNGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2Hd7Y06wxP7fn5jeMxLmzEWyj9qesWvX22Zpf4Nb70=)**

When I became the first Black lawmaker ever to be elected to New York’s attorney general office, I knew that our historic accomplishment would mean _nothing_ if I didn’t use my position to fight for the populations who had been trampled on and ignored for generations.

And I’m proud to say that, in my first term, we were able to win real change for the people of New York. But, with Republicans continuing to attack the rights of the most vulnerable, this work is nowhere near complete.

**Peter, the time to act is now. Together, we can move the needle for progress forward – I’ve seen us do it before. So I’m humbly asking:**[**Will you make a donation before the month ends to activate your February Team James Membership? clean_body: Peter, yesterday, Attorney General Letitia James reached out to this community for support – but it looks like you have still not answered her call. I’m counting on you to step up and join Letitia’s fight for progress because right now, millions of Americans across the country are still without reproductive care, still living in danger of gun violence, and still having their fundamental rights trampled on. Letitia James vowed to hold the powerful and corrupt accountable, but she needs top supporters like you to join her. That’s why she called on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their official Team James Memberships, but we have a midnight deadline tomorrow, and we’re still short of our goal by 432 new members. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your help here. Kimberly Peeler-Allen Senior Advisor \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Letitia Date: Sun, Feb 26, 2023 Subject: URGENT: Activate your membership now | | | Peter, can I be honest with you? I know it’s tempting to only focus on the positives, but I wanted to give you a real snapshot of where our fight for progress stands as we head into our third month of the year: Still, millions of Americans are without access to safe reproductive health care; LGBTQ+ people are nine times more likely than non-LGBTQ+ people to be victims of violent hate crimes; and approximately 40,000 Americans will likely die from gun violence before the year ends. These chilling statistics make one thing clear: Our fight for justice is nowhere near complete. That’s why I’m throwing myself headfirst into the fight – and I’m counting on you to join me, Peter. = = | | = When I became the first Black lawmaker ever to be elected to New York’s attorney general office, I knew that our historic accomplishment would mean nothing if I didn’t use my position to fight for the populations who had been trampled on and ignored for generations. And I’m proud to say that, in my first term, we were able to win real change for the people of New York. But, with Republicans continuing to attack the rights of the most vulnerable, this work is nowhere near complete. Peter, the time to act is now. Together, we can move the needle for progress forward – I’ve seen us do it before. So I’m humbly asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being such an integral part of this team. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

Peter,
In America, the power lies with the people. This drives career politicians, and the deep state bureaucrats that help them, crazy.
They want all the power for _themselves_ – and they’ll do anything to get it.
And for them, step number one is making it harder to vote and easier to cheat so they can control election outcomes.
Make no mistake, that’s what they’re doing in Alaska and across America – and it’s up to us to stop them.

If you ask me, the career politicians in DC forgot about "_We the People_ " decades ago – They don’t want outsiders. They don’t want constitutionalists. And they don’t want anyone who challenges their supreme power.
What _they_ want is un-American, unconstitutional, and unlawful. We must fight for election integrity to continue to hold our elected leaders accountable.
So I hope you’ll join me in trying to stop them before it’s too late.

clean_body: | | | | It’s our government. We call the shots | Peter, In America, the power lies with the people. This drives career politicians, and the deep state bureaucrats that help them, crazy. They want all the power for themselves – and they’ll do anything to get it. And for them, step number one is making it harder to vote and easier to cheat so they can control election outcomes. Make no mistake, that’s what they’re doing in Alaska and across America – and it’s up to us to stop them. | If you ask me, the career politicians in DC forgot about "We the People " decades ago – They don’t want outsiders. They don’t want constitutionalists. And they don’t want anyone who challenges their supreme power. What they want is un-American, unconstitutional, and unlawful. We must fight for election integrity to continue to hold our elected leaders accountable. So I hope you’ll join me in trying to stop them before it’s too late. Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | ==

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfk8v59076d51mhj6bhtvvnjgrg9a8p0d53j8erg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh69o74c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg241qb6aa8n9cbl4kje4psuhi3no2pekmrifbt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh69o74c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbsjme9951qk0d888bmsljl99nu0qoh3np94j9e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh69o74c5h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7dqjotk4u9ckjvilnmes52ts3i9vlvp1h12ofk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh69o74c5h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf4fft9lcelt7blp8thi9cihtlfckbntk90a4p3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clh69o74c5h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8soh1gprmfbepeh99jicl1mbrk0j7o3gfjbm9j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj60or1cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8a8kro5rs69qn5c53ml86p8p9a8dg4j1215hf88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj60or1cth2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6dc2mp67n8ggugvkr3mot39v6lni9urh6fh3778_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj60or1cth2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

Allow me to briefly explain why: The end of February means there’s just one month until we will have to submit our first fundraising report to the FEC since I was elected to Congress. Lots of people -- from the GOP and special interests to potential opponents -- will look closely through our report to see if we have what it takes to win in IL-17 once again. **We’re aiming to raise $30,000 in online donations by the end of February to stay on pace. And here’s the key: If we meet our monthly goals, our FEC numbers will send a clear message about the strength behind our movement. That will put us in a good early position to defend this seat.** **[Please use this link to contribute to our re-election campaign before midnight tonight.
