name: American Briefing
subject: Hungry for a cause
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This dream has always stuck with me.

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zksfkanvqjd02ram3gvp9pgi90rqdc3884ntkolg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqc2pg1aafmlkcn76k7d46j23oq431vp7qm4of2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgte1e77b6l0p5fd006o7j25ngfn2n1fmhle4bkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8rapnu55r7smpcu962df259g6qur05ai5a09abg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zun7rpgis5lg02ov3jgvndou1i8vpe99gegdle0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8ucqvq4nvoc4rgaag9f7763a36721iuvepl3uvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjl0f9u1llg9o2nkc1pnh3k33j63sh5ip2746318_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd3pajqhlg74prchtsii1ghmfnte2gfqsbgptst0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0950iddvb6484qirmjpi2f4a7u2hvjaarslo8qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68o30c1h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo349c2105k4he1j66gs07c4dj1u92nutjimi2u8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctimcp30c1g649fg)

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBCRA Feb 27th
body:
DON'T MISS THIS! FEB 27TH • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA We are very excited to have great guests lined up fo
| |
---
|
---
## DON'T MISS THIS! FEB 27TH • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
**We are very excited to have great guests lined up for Mondays meeting**
Door opens at 6:30 we get started shortly after.
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Moises Merino is President & CEO of GROW Elect
---
|
---
Moises Merino is President & CEO of GROW Elect and MBA Public Affairs, an award-winning
public affairs and political consulting firm. He has over 20 years of political and public policy
experience at the local, state and national levels. In 2015, he was named one of the “40 Under
40” best and brightest in the industry by the American Association of Political Consultants
(AAPC). Moises has also been recognized for his accomplishments and featured by Latino
Leaders Magazine. He’s been a guest commentator on major television networks such as CNN,
Univision and Telemundo.
Moises is one of the premier experts on the subject of the Latino vote. His methodological
approach to messaging is a key component to gaining support for public policy initiatives.
Moises’s strategic planning incorporates cultural and cross-cultural ideologies and values that
help shape public opinion.
Moises is a co-founder of the non-profit Latino Leadership & Policy Forum and GROW Elect, a
Political Action Committee that has recruited, trained, and elected over 300 Latino Republicans
to public office. He has also served as political director and advisor on a number of committees
and high-profile campaigns, including the California Republican Party, Meg Whitman for
Governor, John McCain for President, Arnold Schwarzenegger for Governor, and George W.
Bush for President.
Moises is from East Los Angeles (Boyle Heights) and received his Bachelor of Arts degree in
History from UCLA. In addition, he went on to earn his Masters in Public Administration.
## Mike Cargile running for Chairman of the California Republican Party.
---
---
|
---
My friends and fellow delegates,
I am Mike Cargile and am running for Chairman of the California Republican Party.
I am a conservative Christian and have been for the last 25 years. As a Christian, I never lie. My “yes” is my “yes” and my “no” is my “no”. Additionally, I am the grateful recipient of the Appalachian wisdom of my grandmother who drilled into me the concept that “profanity is the feeble attempt of a weak mind to express itself”. Couple that with “Out of the heart the mouth speaks” and you get the point.
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=111782.189.1.f89de5c27b2637b103a46f3fa456ce63)
| |
---
---
## STOP FEEDING THE RINOS!!

|
---
---

|
Dear Friend,

This Thursday, Riley Gaines, the all-American champion swimmer, is speaking in Jackson – and we have three final tickets left! Book now!

Riley will be talking about why we need a Women’s Bill of Rights to protect female athletes from ‘woke’ politics. She will be joined by Mandy Gunasekara of the Independent Women’s Forum.

Douglas Carswell

name: Greg Stanton (personal)
subject: I’ll be blunt, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
This is a unique problem that you can help me with.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59338950/393910764/1104855725?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.27_b1_gsp_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNhYWQ4MDUtYjdiNi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WdVzKixVTo0hjQEPrHSYCVcl6CzNWoUYhVO4w8DBAZc=) Team, I’ll be blunt: **February is the shortest month in the year, which means we have two fewer days than usual to hit our monthly fundraising goal, and we’re still $5,000 short.** [**Can you pitch in ASAP to help get us over the finish line?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59338951/393910765/1104855725?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.27_b1_gsp_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNhYWQ4MDUtYjdiNi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WdVzKixVTo0hjQEPrHSYCVcl6CzNWoUYhVO4w8DBAZc=) | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59338952/393910766/1104855725?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.27_b1_gsp_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNhYWQ4MDUtYjdiNi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WdVzKixVTo0hjQEPrHSYCVcl6CzNWoUYhVO4w8DBAZc=)
---
This grassroots team helped me defy expectations by winning re-election last year – _even after MAGA Republicans gerrymandered this district to make it tougher for Democrats._

But now that Trump-backed Kelly Cooper has announced he’ll challenge me again in 2024, I need our grassroots supporters to step up again and finish February strong.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Hungry for a cause
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This dream has always stuck with me.

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjdq6jd244m8sb33fi5n17cia1foridk2obu9b2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z954rc888h16sm2bd0qtr514v55ng44dmuvtgrag_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrnu9tuslbvi0bm89qm7h0ej7r4kgpu8scqshi5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zachtvgngl1hl77iqsleaglkjiej5n357jspc7mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh8b6fg14da69fl7g20pvaujj4i3f88gfg328ucg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5cn7ej1s450ho0tiroqhkvljhevh52e56oehh70_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)

---

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6sbtir1ohucq8au14esa21l4v99270rfoj6v6cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgmmk9oqs5vs4bohmbdfk1m5f2ac3vmq5na2te8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8lha6ih372of8b0o5vu0335bsuad74qm3ek71f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj68pr6cph2bs)

clean_body: This dream has always stuck with me. | Fellow American, I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit. I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning. The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery. Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - IN PUBLIC. Right now, we're failing that test. That's why I am running for President of the United States. Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. body:
our end-of-month deadline is just one day away
#
Peter, our end-of-month deadline is just _one day away_.
This month, we hit a huge milestone. **Senator Durbin’s Judiciary Committee has confirmed more than 100 of President Biden’s highly-qualified judicial nominees to the federal bench.**
This kind of progress is only possible because of _you_. Thanks to this team’s efforts to defend and grow the Senate majority, the GOP can’t stand in the way of these critical confirmations.
**However, we need your continued support to keep this forward momentum.** If we don't meet our fundraising goal by the end of the month, we risk not having the resources we’ll need to ensure Mitch McConnell and the GOP don’t take back the Senate and erase our progress.
**[If you’re with Senator Durbin and Senate Democrats in this fight, contribute $5 to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal so we can keep the Senate blue in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59340975/393918395/-2097644699?refcode=dd_em_230227_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ2ZWM5NS1iYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XologdAtdDORmWx6gqtvNeH1jxBZ8e1TG11SA3sxt2E=)**
We can’t waste a second. The Republicans are _desperate_ to flip the Senate red in 2024.
We won’t let it happen. The fight to defend control of the Senate starts right now. Let’s make sure Senator Durbin can continue to make progress alongside a strong Democratic majority.
**[We have to set Senate Democrats up for success — pitch in $5 or anything you can before we close the books on our February fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59340976/393918396/-2097644699?refcode=dd_em_230227_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ2ZWM5NS1iYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XologdAtdDORmWx6gqtvNeH1jxBZ8e1TG11SA3sxt2E=)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Durbin
**** ******** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59340977/393918397/-2097644699?refcode=dd_em_230227_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQ2ZWM5NS1iYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XologdAtdDORmWx6gqtvNeH1jxBZ8e1TG11SA3sxt2E=)********

name: Read/Act News
subject: These are startling statistics
body:
Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.-Cn-TR5pz5hxL_g)Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don’t worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff...
* Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven’t read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn’t read one of our most important founding documents! But there’s one more stat I’d like to give you...

* 26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment—not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly—not a single one.

These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It’s the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That’s why we’ve been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I’m excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, “**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ,” that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **[“Constitution 101” directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](http://trk.readactnews._zv_k9a56_Q)**
## Do you think Americans should learn the history and meaning of the Constitution on TV?
[YES](http://trk.readactnews.)[NO](http://trk.readactnews._uTO2o4Spqcagtz_U0Og) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they’ve been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I’m excited about this and why it’s so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible—so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It’s also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing “Constitution 101” on television networks isn’t as expensive as you might think. To air the **_30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We’ve negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the “big game.” So, airing one 30-minute segment of “**Constitution 101** ” on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200—which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](http://trk.readactnews.)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](http://trk.readactnews.-AnrLu5UNr6g)** After reading those statistics, I’m sure you’ll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only “a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people.”** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don’t worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff... Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven’t read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn’t read one of our most important founding documents! But there’s one more stat I’d like to give you... 26% cannot name a single right protected by the First Amendment—not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly—not a single one. These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It’s the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That’s why we’ve been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I’m excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution ,” that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing Do you think Americans should learn the history and meaning of the Constitution on TV? Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they’ve been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I’m excited about this and why it’s so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible—so we can save our country. This new television program redoubles our efforts to reach and teach citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It’s also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing “Constitution 101” on television networks isn’t as expensive as you might think. To air the 30-minute program and other spots across dozens of networks for one month costs just $275,000...total. We’ve negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-second commercial shown once during the “big game.” So, airing one 30-minute segment of “Constitution 101 ” on FOX Business might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200—which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link: After reading those statistics, I’m sure you’ll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has never been more urgent than it is today. As James Madison wrote, only “a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people.” We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Hail Mary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | |
Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

I'm only sending this hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the end zone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of stopping Biden and Schumer's radical agenda are gone.

Can you rush a donation by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the left in their tracks?

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Investing in historically Black education is investing in America’s future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
American companies are still unrepresentative of Black talent.
#
Friend,
Historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) serve some of our nation’s brightest intellects, graduating 25 percent of African Americans with degrees in Science, Technology, Engineering and Math (STEM).
These graduates are the next generation of tech entrepreneurs. They are among the visionaries who will take the digital economy to new heights.
Yet American companies are still unrepresentative of Black talent. And[ the average endowment for HBCUs ](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11269?t=1&akid=2625%2E946728%2E-NQtRI)lags behind other top colleges.
The private sector can do more by strengthening its partnerships with HBCUs, recruiting, promoting, and retaining the impressive minds emerging from these venerable institutions.
But Congress, too, must do its part by increasing funding for HBCUs. This will provide greater opportunities for graduates to pursue their dreams and help rebuild our economy.
[**Sign the petition: Congress must increase funding for HBCUs.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/sign/hbcu-funding-petition/?t=2&akid=2625%2E946728%2E-NQtRI)
Because when we invest in historically Black education, we invest in America’s future.
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230227-2625-footer&t=3&refcode2=2625_946728_-NQtRI&akid=2625%2E946728%2E-NQtRI)**

clean_body: American companies are still unrepresentative of Black talent. Friend, Historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) serve some of our nation’s brightest intellects, graduating 25 percent of African Americans with degrees in Science, Technology, Engineering and Math (STEM). These graduates are the next generation of tech entrepreneurs. They are among the visionaries who will take the digital economy to new heights. Yet American companies are still unrepresentative of Black talent. And behind other top colleges. The private sector can do more by strengthening its partnerships with HBCUs, recruiting, promoting, and retaining the impressive minds emerging from these venerable institutions. But Congress, too, must do its part by increasing funding for HBCUs. This will provide greater opportunities for graduates to pursue their dreams and help rebuild our economy. Because when we invest in historically Black education, we invest in America’s future. In solidarity, Ro | Email us: mailto: info@rokhanna.com

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I know. It’s early.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
2024 feels like a long time from now. But will you please let me explain?
#
Peter — I know. It’s early. And 2024 feels like a long time from now.
If my team and I are going to be emailing you **[asking for $10 toward our February end-of-month fundraising goal,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28076?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f)** then we owe you a real explanation. **So please, give me just a couple minutes of your time:**
I know you’ve already heard a lot about how much of a fraud and coward Josh Hawley is. When we launched this campaign last month— just two years after Hawley raised his fist and then ran for his life on January 6 — we made a lot of noise. And from online and to prime time TV, we’ve kept the hits going.
But from the moment we’ve been in this race, Hawley and the corporate interests supporting him have already been hitting back — from the National Republican Senatorial Committee to Breitbart.
That’s because they know we’re a threat. They know that over the past three election cycles, Missourians voted to **raise the minimum wage** nearly 5 dollars higher than the federal level, **expand Medicaid** under the Affordable Care Act, and **legalize marijuana.** They know Missourians even **elected a Democrat statewide** to be our Auditor — by a 6% margin.
Missourians have been fighting hard to claw back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley for years — and Hawley knows we have a grassroots movement that can harness that energy. That’s why, on the same day we launched our campaign, he sent a message to his donors warning we’d **“love nothing more than to take back Missouri. We CAN'T let that happen.”**
So here’s what that all tells us: Hawley is going to come at us hard, fast, and early. That means our best shot at winning this race is building a record-breaking movement **right from the start** so we can fight back, get our positive message in front of Missouri voters, and hold him accountable for betraying our country.
And that’s why I’ve got to ask today, even if it feels early: **[Can I count on you to make a donation of $10 or whatever amount feels right toward our goal of raising 5,000 individual grassroots donations before March? I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Pharma and Big Oil execs, so anything you chip in makes a big difference:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28076?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28077?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28077?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28077?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28077?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28077?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28077?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28076?refcode=em20230227-2835&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f)
---
Thanks for being a part of this movement. This is a race we can win. And together, we’re going to beat Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country.
Never stop fighting,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230227-2835-footer&t=10&refcode2=2835_614464_QKHk2f&akid=2835%2E614464%2EQKHk2f)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08161%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KXH8ZtfmdaGoaWZXDDLi8Q&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MIi6ekX%2f06yYP2bHmLnvVQ&sysid=1)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08163%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WFsnmkQtgss8jQ9UzEF86g&sysid=1)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08164%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8pGMuIFH9H552lInkqkEhA&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08175%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bNRNV9%2bHJcdPWAneowTxHA&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08176%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cpHBX2TOSZ1LxI66zU08PA&sysid=1)

---

| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08177%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YclWP9p95hZIYEBNm4jBoQ&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08178%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k4RxC%2fACrJ3Jhn%2fKSiO71A&sysid=1) | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08179%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6KqLxYVaPrXzoXlroru6%2bA&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7170%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=z9e8TLO60cHdycFZ%2f%2fwxUg&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7170%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=z9e8TLO60cHdycFZ%2f%2fwxUg&sysid=1)

My far-right, anti-choice former opponent just filed to challenge me in 2024.
Did you see this, Peter?

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Is Philip Gunn our only hope to stop Obamacare?
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| Over the weekend, Mississippi Governor Tate Reeves posted via social media that he now supports partial Medicaid expansion. Tate ran for Governor in 2019, campaigning against Medicaid expansion, and for good reason, but it now seems like he’s flipped on that stance.Based on an article by the [Mississippi Center for Public Policy](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/E3NVRA3QeKq3w09I0mkrkQ), Medicaid patients are 97 percent more likely to die than patients with private insurance and 13 percent more likely to die than patients with NO health insurance at all.But you’ve heard that Medicaid expansion will save our rural hospitals, right? Well, the same article by MCPP quotes the health economist Chris Conover indicating that "Every new Medicaid-related job actually costs the economy at least 3 to 4 jobs elsewhere." Not only does it cost the economy as a whole, but Medicaid also only covers, on average, 80% of what private insurance pays. Therefore, hospitals must increase the costs on private patients, to cover the costs of Medicaid patient’s care.[Email Speaker Gunn, ask him to stand up for conservative Mississippi](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/DG07976Ka6naFFbhYcNoFQ)And if a hospital doesn’t have enough private insurance patients to keep the doors open to begin with, they certainly won’t have enough private insurance patients to cover even greater losses from an increase in Medicaid patients. Further, the state will be on the hook for 10% of the increased cost, meaning our dream of being an income tax-free state is never likely going to happen with an expansion in Medicaid.
Still, despite all the data and evidence to show that Medicaid expansion is a bad deal for Mississippians, as it has been for every other state that’s passed it, that hasn’t stopped Delbert Hosemann from passing a Medicaid expansion bill out of the Senate every year since he’s been Lt. Governor and now Tate Reeves is bailing on his own campaign promises by supporting a partial expansion.
Tate said in his post that “We may even have to be willing to do things that make us ‘philosophically uncomfortable.’”
His move shouldn’t just make you “philosophically uncomfortable”, but outright furious if you are a Republican that actually believes in our party platform. Our own MS GOP platform says, regarding healthcare, that Mississippi Republicans believe:
>
> “the expansion of some government health care programs is unaffordable to current and future taxpayers... We believe our health care system can be improved by moving away from the current bureaucracy-driven, heavily regulated third-party payment system to a new patient-centered system of consumer choice. We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families, promoting free-market competition and embracing the benefits of technology, innovation and a fair legal climate. Increased freedom within our health care system must be accompanied by individual responsibility.”

Nothing about Medicaid expansion fits into our party’s platform of stopping the expansion of government healthcare programs, supporting free-markets, and having greater individual responsibility, but it seems that even the leader of our state party, Tate Reeves, has cast our party platform to the side for politically motivated reasons during an election year, not letting something like principles get in the way.
It is also interesting to note that a poll from a few years ago indicates that [70 percent of Mississippi Republicans would](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/twCV7hrBaP72whsKgtpT5A) be less likely to support a candidate who voted for Medicaid expansion. So, it begs the question: If Tate’s not supporting Medicaid expansion to appeal to Republicans, who is he trying to appeal to this election year?[Email Speaker Gunn, ask him to stand up for conservative Mississippi](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/DG07976Ka6naFFbhYcNoFQ) |
---
We need your help.
Tell Speaker Gunn to stand against any attempt to expand Obamacare in Mississippi.
You may also call **601-345-1211** and leave a message for Speaker Gunn.
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/FFqZSO4Pe1mjwdSdAJgwpg) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

Governor and now Tate Reeves is bailing on his own campaign promises by supporting a partial expansion. Tate said in his post that “We may even have to be willing to do things that make us ‘philosophically uncomfortable.’” His move shouldn’t just make you “philosophically uncomfortable”, but outright furious if you are a Republican that actually believes in our party platform. Our own MS GOP platform says, regarding healthcare, that Mississippi Republicans believe: “the expansion of some government health care programs is unaffordable to current and future taxpayers... We believe our health care system can be improved by moving away from the current bureaucracy-driven, heavily regulated third-party payment system to a new patient-centered system of consumer choice. We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families, promoting free-market competition and embracing the benefits of technology, innovation and a fair legal climate. Increased freedom within our health care system must be accompanied by individual responsibility.” Nothing about Medicaid expansion fits into our party’s platform of stopping the expansion of government healthcare programs, supporting free-markets, and having greater individual responsibility, but it seems that even the leader of our state party, Tate Reeves, has cast our party platform to the side for politically motivated reasons during an election year, not letting something like principles get in the way. It is also interesting to note that a poll from a few years ago indicates that be less likely to support a candidate who voted for Medicaid expansion. So, it begs the question: If Tate’s not supporting Medicaid expansion to appeal to Republicans, who is he trying to appeal to this election year? | We need your help. Tell Speaker Gunn to stand against any attempt to expand Obamacare in Mississippi. You may also call 601-345-1211 and leave a message for Speaker Gunn. | You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus. Click to unsubscribe from this mailing list. | |

| | The key to winning is making early investments now [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59342244/393922471/-523229209?sourceid=1048680&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGFkNGRjMS1iZWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WRZkJjEakf-AFM02lOhEe1RqhFJ8x65AW3zKsdZoMF0=&emci=fcad4dc1-beb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fdad4dc1-beb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) **Peter, I wanted to personally share some great news with you!**

Because of your support, EMILYs List made crucial headway in our fight against the anti-choice agenda, including two HUGE wins for our endorsed candidates in Virginia and Wisconsin:
* Rep.-elect **Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)** made history as the FIRST Black woman elected to represent Virginia in Congress.
* Pro-choice Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** made clear where she stood on reproductive rights in her campaign. And in Tuesday's non-partisan primary, she handily won more votes than her two conservative opponents _combined_.

These victories are a testament to the power of each EMILYs List community member and our candidates' strength. But they are also a reminder that early money matters, especially now. With so much at stake, we need your support to help elect Democratic pro-choice women to office and fight for the issues that matter most to women and families across the country.

**If we're going to continue to win at the ballot box, we CANNOT afford to keep being outraised by anti-choice opponents. That's why EMILYs List set a critical goal to raise another $175,000 this month to close the gap, but right now, we're falling short of what we need to win.**

**[So, Peter, I'm asking you to contribute here and now: Will you rush a donation now — whatever you can spare before our End-of-Month deadline — to recruit and help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will fight for our reproductive freedom?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59342251/393922505/-523229209?sourceid=1048680&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGFkNGRjMS1iZWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WRZkJjEakf-AFM02lOhEe1RqhFJ8x65AW3zKsdZoMF0=&emci=fcad4dc1-beb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fdad4dc1-beb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** When I founded EMILYs List back in 1985, I knew that moving our country forward meant electing more Democratic pro-choice women, but it was clear that supporters would be the backbone of this movement — and that remains true today. With your help, we can continue to build up the resources we need to support our candidates, mobilize our grassroots supporters, and make a real difference in races up and down the ballot.

**Republicans have the full force of anti-choice special interests behind them — but we have the power of this millions-strong movement. name: Chairman Steve Daines
subject: This is bleak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee – I’m dedicating everything to ensuring Republicans win big this cycle and take back the m | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c778df6a0eb4420296a9d787b466737b&_e=EgGcasYTPz3mZ_rxlI8evfS81p4ZenhWNw_UEomDU7X8N4yTk1gPv7jRNVB9d-EYJPb5sJsYOPE8eQ57DNFLeYHCRJRA8-Kl4_nacsleH-n5xE7Fe7bKoZ685d0oql3H3IZ9wxnhL50jzgDVzZt1KOaMA96sQ9Z19DV76wPGE-bkR4FhU3B0g6nBP_jf4JXw-mczEbrM00b3lVXGHwJ_8Dt2F41UmaruPk5KK7SBQezmlSbr4pJmhJlu_4bGSsVpdxtuuc_Y6gMHAkNHaJdivKo0sVSOkG-BaPem8b96qVvZ4fuQs_PtUuw85f7vqmBAj8GO0kBMy9LB7KnnD80JpL4-du2rzUznemIfgutl9EcG7kYVhppgzuxAoWrp8XfSQ0puZiaX5Gi5kAkUXOIM3Q%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee - I’m dedicating everything to ensuring Republicans win big this cycle and take back the majority.

And part of doing that means getting critical resources together NOW to prepare for the fight ahead.

But here’s the deal - we’re already behind our February goal and if we fall short, it could mean a bleak outlook for conservatives. **[Will you chip in just $3 before midnight and help me hit my first fundraising goal?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c778df6a0eb4420296a9d787b466737b&_e=EgGcasYTPz3mZ_rxlI8evfS81p4ZenhWNw_UEomDU7X8N4yTk1gPv7jRNVB9d-EYJPb5sJsYOPE8eQ57DNFLeYHCRJRA8-Kl4_nacsleH-n5xE7Fe7bKoZ685d0oql3H3IZ9wxnhL50jzgDVzZt1KOaMA96sQ9Z19DV76wPGE-bkR4FhU3B0g6nBP_jf4JXw-mczEbrM00b3lVXGHwJ_8Dt2F41UmaruPk5KK7SBQeyPxiexKCLHCGf-0-7zlFiHuEa_QMPPsnxsR45RxpCFO_f8K6B-4LvIb8ZGS7bH0N92eu5X1KuuZOMlC4319wbKYWSKDVcEVJ4XpkaU0XVhXGUGs-MxHxQfHGw4ozr7zh1E2DLjwaiN1v7B0EYWzGnGSsPnHjSafmQJd6MRFHuDTg%3D%3D)**

[**GIVE NOW -> **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c778df6a0eb4420296a9d787b466737b&_e=EgGcasYTPz3mZ_rxlI8evfS81p4ZenhWNw_UEomDU7X8N4yTk1gPv7jRNVB9d-EYJPb5sJsYOPE8eQ57DNFLeYHCRJRA8-Kl4_nacsleH-n5xE7Fe7bKoZ685d0oql3H3IZ9wxnhL50jzgDVzZt1KOaMA96sQ9Z19DV76wPGE-bkR4FhU3B0g6nBP_jf4JXw-mczEbrM00b3lVXGHwJ_8Dt2F41UmaruPk5KK7SBQexb5ufHwYaOyAzhkQWCHBkR8ZQ4P13X4evzxLs6u1-rKkdCYhfPWwFQMSRZ4XueFkXG9vmwOeMnOfD5su83DNwsqTwomf1cieWxcPnPRjhSKCxxF_RTOBYkr4S8vOoS3KTUgK2w7UWI0iV8rExl8NNCa7NWzTzKGFpgB6lSDDH9Ug%3D%3D)
It’s no secret, Fellow Conservative, Republicans have our work cut out for us. The Democrat Machine has shown they are willing to spend hundreds of millions to win.

We don’t need to outraise them to win, but we do need to show we have a grassroots army behind us.

You’ve been one of my most loyal supporters in the past and I need your help again - **[will you step up before midnight and chip in just $3 to ensure sweeping Republican victories?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c778df6a0eb4420296a9d787b466737b&_e=EgGcasYTPz3mZ_rxlI8evfS81p4ZenhWNw_UEomDU7X8N4yTk1gPv7jRNVB9d-EYJPb5sJsYOPE8eQ57DNFLeYHCRJRA8-Kl4_nacsleH-n5xE7Fe7bKoZ685d0oql3H3IZ9wxnhL50jzgDVzZt1KOaMA96sQ9Z19DV76wPGE-bkR4FhU3B0g6nBP_jf4JXw-mczEbrM00b3lVXGHwJ_8Dt2F41UmaruPk5KK7SBQewcz8uoFAhN2mmFQSCUt8xaj105he7_BMc3a3sxrp2kHwqTLCnYTXg36Xk2-G32TmCsq-_lPxOZldU-DCiD3pO64Vrr0FsXEhBVj1S9UeOAQNj8Kbk5coylP76f2Xjcpv1uk0BuNLDkUKIjlBgtRXJptsLAOHaDn1Syc-N_DTV2Bg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

Senator Steve Daines

|
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c778df6a0eb4420296a9d787b466737b&_e=EgGcasYTPz3mZ_rxlI8evfS81p4ZenhWNw_UEomDU7X8N4yTk1gPv7jRNVB9d-EYJPb5sJsYOPE8eQ57DNFLeYHCRJRA8-Kl4_nacsleH-n5xE7Fe7bKoZ685d0oql3H3IZ9wxnhL50jzgDVzZt1KOaMA96sQ9Z19DV76wPGE-bkR4FhU3B0g6nBP_jf4JXw-mczEbrM00b3lVXGHwJ_8Dt2F41UmaruPk5KK7SBQewLgwEAiOtNVtHmslwKMVDGxYN_h8wqXXKK41460zHqyw4uB1YcFbBBY_7s4lGkX6LdoSnm0EA6KSvrkgkNrpSLr-QuQOiWCwsmAj6-dhiCeN_kdMEyKzLlCJ6mGCr7XwCa-gy6FgaeRQvo66dXj7QopI7PkWwcN-bbrpefVq0I5w%3D%3D)

name: Roy Cooper HQ
subject: Our biggest challenge yet:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:

You see, the winter months — especially the ones following a big election year like we just had — are _always_ tough for fundraising.
And we get it. We put our _all_ into supporting North Carolina Democrats. Now, with so much happening in the world, we want to tune out these (yes, sometimes repetitive) fundraising appeals in our inboxes.
But we can’t afford to do that. We can’t wait until two months before the 2024 elections to start raising money again. We can’t even wait until 2024 to start fundraising.
**We need to start organizing _now_ or we risk our state falling into the hands of far-right extremists.**
That’s why this February end-of-month deadline is the most important deadline Roy has faced since the midterm elections.

body:

Since you are a top State Republican patriot, we’ve reserved (1) copy of Governor DeSantis’ new book, The Courage to Be Free just for you.

If you don’t claim your book before 11:59 PM tonight, we will be forced to give it to the next loyal conservative on our list. Governor DeSantis has done so much for the great state of Florida and our country. Friend you have an exclusive chance to hear firsthand about his blueprint for America’s revival.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter,

I wanted to reach out and follow up on the message that my team sent out earlier this week. Unfortunately, I’m one of 23 Republicans targeted by Democrat Dark Money for the upcoming election in 2024.
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/lori-23-house?utm_source=Mailchimp&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=20230224_LCD_23HouseReps
I am disappointed that I am being targeted for my party affiliation and my record of fighting for Oregon. But I will not back down from my commitment to serving YOU and standing up for our values.

I wanted to make sure that you received the message from my team, and that you know how much I appreciate your continued support.

Your support is essential if we are going to fight back and get ahead of these attacks. body:
We’re working to defend religious freedom in Virginia. Here’s where we are... | | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQLVoPG4PzrziEnDUJD2SPiCUnQxHWQpXY5bycoe5a7gIc_iu9oebLw7HT7sMSovFz7djNqA6D5domPjE1imBRAno9Gp6bEuOWmsktKh2L-ewAuocM_BQ8Zua3sqs4xE6ct4SGY93dKTA9BLJp2wRae2VZoEC-G7TorctJ5wfNZx661to4A6dbaRM8u2OPnc-OC5jUQqjTMLOOfyYqSWTxP00hiTbK9xFGPtJZAw5f8_qygM3VasNeV4mJV16gi5w2V7RwNJHM3z6fMmh0iFl6yNFhCyb5u3_lkkeLldEWzAltizLDpUDwnCw1SEMM4uXG)
---
Friend, My office has been hard at work defending religious liberty here in the Commonwealth. I recently sent out a _[**new memo**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQLVoPG4PzrziEnDUJD2SPiCUnQxHWQpXY5bycoe5a7gIc_iu9oebLw7HT7sMSovFz7djNqA6D5domPjE1imBRAno9Gp6bEuOWmsktKh2L-ewAuocM_BQ8Zua3sqs4xE6ct4SGY93dKTA9BLJp2wRae2VZoEC-G7TorctJ5wfNZx7jqJ_eMDj62rFadztar9EEZICKfRsYjtttGsFt2uRJZiWGMWEZKmxNz0veK2w3-0RH2nVQ8wtF5ZmEunjfNhtlBwTguws6U38h4IsWq3BKvBbm9qLGp06xCJ8X3p3OFxTyjkDadQ5ozQOQhTeNz1dM)_ on our efforts, and wanted to make sure you had an opportunity to read it.
---
[**READ THE FULL MEMO**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQLVoPG4PzrziEnDUJD2SPiCUnQxHWQpXY5bycoe5a7gIc_iu9oebLw7HT7sMSovFz7djNqA6D5domPjE1imBRAno9Gp6bEuOWmsktKh2L-ewAuocM_BQ8Zua3sqs4xE6ct4SGY93dKTA9BLJp2wRae2VZoEC-G7TorctJ5wfNZx49aJBRincIh37WJrYNDHh_3sxHPd7gsL7NcGk9x_9tFASiWSABXtkyqRW3w4DDO99V37Iza5B79iGAViW8Hd2nnTO6eJ2ydId8lWVjPPW2iruO8b693H6eaiJWoVAVeB2AGfNOozgrKarg92ueelzu)
---
Virginia is the birthplace of religious freedom and has a long history of protecting the inalienable right to live your faith, which is what I intend to do. _[**Read the memo to learn more about our initiatives.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQLVoPG4PzrziEnDUJD2SPiCUnQxHWQpXY5bycoe5a7gIc_iu9oebLw7HT7sMSovFz7djNqA6D5domPjE1imBRAno9Gp6bEuOWmsktKh2L-ewAuocM_BQ8Zua3sqs4xE6ct4SGY93dKTA9BLJp2wRae2VZoEC-G7TorctJ5wfNZx6YtB-1mK9XgyL7LIPHpmwHxHkzSNAzWky1DXpvRyOebf7ggjd9a5nR6tF2kJnndJLQgy5KIEw6gBZN7BVbcobLhKyTW3s-gEgpGPli8pmpYIy8Hps7aW8Et50T8itVTAj76DnWTA7zpyk8ad5EXJVg)_ Thank you, Jason MiyaresVirginia Attorney General
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | _**A Personal Note from Jason:**_
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQigLcwbguhniKAkzCXPPWmA873FwefLYd0xHH_ta1pXIZh1Evv8dQ7n-bdOQtr17kAdKcnbPqqGjsTIYadACGbroyHWU49fgeQxmTUkcmU1fCeUmyLNuDx-OeURze2iTkHrD3JdgLACbdwSN9T2EjIyJB71guAaZk71RZtzgWZsYPjqgDF3cPMObpqCUzTbZO4g1CROfdI9QrrKKlDL1LfD_lFUcmfxUZfYXBSXnV81h4eBXjJ_E2Ouh_1rBJTDkJZ7JwBXVD6RydnKu8XdDO5xegoY_hqIgy_oseCVxReoo%3D)
---
50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQigLcwbguhniKAkzCXPPWmA873FwefLYd0xHH_ta1pXIZh1Evv8dQ7n-bdOQtr17kAdKcnbPqqGjsTIYadACGbroyHWU49fgeQxmTUkcmU1fCeUmyLNuDx-OeURze2iTkHrD3JdgLACbdwSN9T2EjIylkSwOZ3R-is2wQTi6xvit3Q9WKCwTACNa_p52yG9kOqzgRSP7eKDcsie7vO1QFg69sR6QKG8aqagkMWYQkWUw29E3iJ23NJ8xf1BR_SB0HqNLDXlFe5upDeXSR6uiZuPjN-4_3GFPwjmySqOaFxqs%3D)
---
Want to make a positive impact on the Commonwealth’s future? [**Take Jason’s 2023 Priorities Survey**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=8464208749ed40d1aa4d2130b9c4fb90&_e=O4KPdaDWvOXtr5-4reEs3zHi32LKAoI1Hg_tseCmjT82f9HfbVrgBAoMrcuJX6WQ0DCjYoKjqtHC4oWfCy2s5vZTGkacaM76d-qkU61HbIPmK0JN9FlzUcwT_M4ruNnD2_9vTPwSSbmLGNdnHqqWYd-aZdgy5Ee_1XYursV7JiKVRa9VneORLNzTPReCQ7lBFy4esE2k3pdXluCnCJjj7lPnY_isaE-Ox5SL5Dro39I8gTHkZbyt15Jin0WYYMxMFV8vW4AsVAcOdNdTOi6Vj1JaSExYcLn8jYROa76mXjDkVbDZL4WntsP25sj1g0dJkRxurYGNFY8Sh9kQCeMIpwFpx4zHYbpP_1kc2xfknSU%3D) and provide him with your thoughts.
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18894?t=1001&akid=3014%2E346206%2EOhBI4w ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18894?t=1002&akid=3014%2E346206%2EOhBI4w ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $15 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230227-3014-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3014_346206_OhBI4w&akid=3014%2E346206%2EOhBI4w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3014%2E346206%2EOhBI4w

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Failure isn’t an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
If you want to stop Biden and his far-left allies from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then we MUST take control of the Senate.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e7ca7207d30460d83e36fc45c38a47e&_e=fPqtxn4TX_VfxE9DnkUUYXj4fYYRsgs2ZKGz5YxCUoV08Zy6VibaOtD0JsR9ShoOKzUY_4eWwTzII5oClZROJShzwOfAuxLiIeDxpN6gcY4T1l1Uhfq15Z1W79MpKJRlZ1UXaIK-pQVeAL5npEobqX5ADDXAF1_OCBkA4FQ2SHwxLfH_EPpqvVrq75N8CTNIOjGmLv-9sGk2geD377mRZ4q0LuBzxvqhtDvTkt6_dooCsBH4u9kOgOUYpXGFkT6DvieE-S13zrP3CwSPNcw4VDHLYK3SIwls6AbgsteGRgq-oPF1YC4JkcE5s9HQB02z1wy5RXBk7KcAB7ox5Ur_JrN-8uF9cpkLmcGb4nYKf3bfGqjsFH47EOe4FT_RNh_BzluwMjVJO3xbTWMvaYgmOzEejZrPB7cK41MGc-gzFzfkHcFrSXtv-DDQ2ofvylwEEGWEqCg_Ny4y5pMBvyi5Uw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Democrats are breaking records left and right. 📈 Record spending.📈 Record inflation.📈 Record debt.📈 Record crime.📈 Record illegal immigration. Despite their unacceptable track record, the Democrats still BEAT us in 2022. **_HOW?_** I'll tell you, Peter... The Democrats’ grassroots supporters are more motivated and willing to engage than ours. They have donors who are eager to chip in early and often to support battleground races, and if we want to win, we need to do the same thing - scratch that, _**[_we need to do it BETTER._](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e7ca7207d30460d83e36fc45c38a47e&_e=fPqtxn4TX_VfxE9DnkUUYXj4fYYRsgs2ZKGz5YxCUoV08Zy6VibaOtD0JsR9ShoOKzUY_4eWwTzII5oClZROJShzwOfAuxLiIeDxpN6gcY4T1l1Uhfq15Z1W79MpKJRlZ1UXaIK-pQVeAL5npEobqX5ADDXAF1_OCBkA4FQ2SHwxLfH_EPpqvVrq75N8CTNIOjGmLv-9sGk2geD377mRZ4q0LuBzxvqhtDvTkt6_dooCsBH4u9kOgOUYpXGFkT6DvieE-S13zrP3CwSPNcw4VDHLYK3SIwls6AbgsteGRgq-oPF1YC4JkcE5s9HQB02zTpqSj_8L9S4meQb3LzFanN0XzcPLI8q9pBUw7DOvzWxGapjBjzwaRz2fdUbZoPa5GrAlF0gc_1UiCTeaIrfk7tCYnj02J6Bmxwn7iLs3GnUy4mITFfwvVnD71DgD2_kVpp-yzNLQnTOSDOC6Y017DQ%3D%3D)**_
---
[**JOIN OUR GRASSROOTS TEAM >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e7ca7207d30460d83e36fc45c38a47e&_e=fPqtxn4TX_VfxE9DnkUUYXj4fYYRsgs2ZKGz5YxCUoV08Zy6VibaOtD0JsR9ShoOKzUY_4eWwTzII5oClZROJShzwOfAuxLiIeDxpN6gcY4T1l1Uhfq15Z1W79MpKJRlZ1UXaIK-pQVeAL5npEobqX5ADDXAF1_OCBkA4FQ2SHwxLfH_EPpqvVrq75N8CTNIOjGmLv-9sGk2geD377mRZ4q0LuBzxvqhtDvTkt6_dooCsBH4u9kOgOUYpXGFkT6DvieE-S13zrP3CwSPNcw4VDHLYK3SIwls6AbgsteGRgq-oPF1YC4JkcE5s9HQB02zXDU8K4dvJShDQhY4zSZMEb5NTLdZ8wOewQJjJimLPV5IjMgYLvkFiaHFFM4D1456Ae8M0vrooH2opmbwzbdzfbUONkuBFxs9F4XsToluq9nampAr1vWS3dAmzfAmtQXWXqv_AKhCF3mXQfxVO59tLw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, we are facing a critical moment in the fight to secure a Republican majority in the Senate and turn America around. At this very moment, early into the 2024 cycle, we are in the position to build a grassroots movement capable of ending the Democrats' Senate Majority. But this opportunity is fleeting. name: Jon Tester
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59374232/393983078/73003207?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3967-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiNWFjNi1lYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=86QoITT7E9UQg4ikyXSbU3Lqo8F4oB-7fgP4dzF5EnI=)
Can I explain something, folks?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**

Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.

The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**

**[_That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $5 between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. clean_body: | | | = Can I explain something, folks? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer. Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for sticking by me. | | NORTHERN, Mich. – Over 17,000 students nationwide participated in a national [Youth Risk Behavior Survey (YRBS)](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=HuKeDZvGS9T6Nlc_-y_5zGXP21ZE29Yc2TPpJ7-ZEv4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi9oZWFsdGh5eW91dGgvZGF0YS95cmJzL3BkZi9ZUkJTX0RhdGEtU3VtbWFyeS1UcmVuZHNfUmVwb3J0MjAyM181MDgucGRmIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9), a school-based survey conducted biennially by the CDC. The last survey, completed in 2021, included a 'Mental Health and Suicidality' section. Here are the disturbing findings.
* During the past 12 months, 42% of students felt sad or hopeless almost every day for two weeks or more, stopping them from participating in usual activities. This figure has increased by 14% since 2011.
* During the past 30 days, nearly one-third of students experienced poor mental health, stress, anxiety, and depression.
* More than one in five students considered suicide, and 18% of students made a suicide plan.
* 10% attempted suicide.

---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=498Y0qYZmLh9yOgDwUFQ90c0W1tK2vyjy8DeQD10e9s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImM1ODUxMTYxLWE2OWQtNDMxMC04MmRlLTRkMGQ0ODI2N2M3NSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | Lorinser says local data from one of the largest counties in Michigan's First District suggests similar increases. "Experts often debate the reasons for the gradual but observable rise in teenage/youth mental illness, but all seemingly center on societal issues and social changes," said Lorinser. According to Dr. Lorinser, suicide risk factors include:
* Family stress
* Persistent poverty, conflict, and other harmful environmental issues
* Recurrent abuse or chronic neglect
* Domestic violence
* Parental mental health or substance abuse problems
* Bullying
* Mass media
* Increased stress, fear, and anxiety
* Loss of school, sport, church, and community routine

The problem is considerably more alarming for teen girls.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=xned4kt4909-90FoQ1gsd5vk_J9HTo6vQ354n0RDAkw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImVlZDBhMzRhLTI3NzgtNDY3YS1mNDJjLWFiM2ZkYzU2OTM1NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)

| | Lorinser reiterates policy initiatives listed on the website "[Mental Health America](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=VsIyBGkmwzWJEjNzKyJGNazSMttSMGVJ71aHGbyZWSs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9taGFuYXRpb25hbC5vcmcvcG9saWN5LWlzc3VlcyIsInIiOiJiOWI1NTc4MC04MTNmLTQ1MTYtYTZjNy0zNWVmMTM0NzFmMmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)" and says that effective and efficient government solutions can allocate resources to providers to ensure a healthier future, especially in the wake of the February mass shooting at Michigan State University.
Dr. Lorinser encourages local organizations, health departments, schools, and municipalities to focus on the following:
* [Prevention for all; >>](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=YF_xRE69IWrhjyOrRvKI8uPYr-v9FVoGCSLH-Ugi8Jg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9taGFuYXRpb25hbC5vcmcvaXNzdWVzL3ByZXZlbnRpb24tYWxsIiwiciI6ImI5YjU1NzgwLTgxM2YtNDUxNi1hNmM3LTM1ZWYxMzQ3MWYyZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
* [Early identification and intervention for those at risk; >>](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=67HDSmiZN58bggpEh9aaHG1u7LEWPs_QQRU_c6XXMqU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9taGFuYXRpb25hbC5vcmcvaXNzdWVzL2Vhcmx5LWlkZW50aWZpY2F0aW9uLWFuZC1pbnRlcnZlbnRpb24tdGhvc2UtcmlzayIsInIiOiJiOWI1NTc4MC04MTNmLTQ1MTYtYTZjNy0zNWVmMTM0NzFmMmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)
* [Integrated care and treatment for those who need it; >>](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=BWhMxwTcOFThMQjr6RdvIP-MHOT57uiHUelHvqD-IBU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9taGFuYXRpb25hbC5vcmcvaXNzdWVzL2ludGVncmF0ZWQtdHJlYXRtZW50LXRob3NlLW5lZWQiLCJyIjoiYjliNTU3ODAtODEzZi00NTE2LWE2YzctMzVlZjEzNDcxZjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
* [Recovery as the goal. >>](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/42OQJhnhf/c?w=3MheSRdRB8aMVgrXgZKS280pSIpbtdQRdOA7lsFrZD8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9taGFuYXRpb25hbC5vcmcvaXNzdWVzL3JlY292ZXJ5LWdvYWwiLCJyIjoiYjliNTU3ODAtODEzZi00NTE2LWE2YzctMzVlZjEzNDcxZjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)

Federal priorities could include: Access to Mental Healthcare and SupportLorinser insists mental healthcare should be accessible and affordable and supports a "non-profit, national health insurance program to help cover medical costs for all Americans." Early InterventionLorinser says prevention is essential to treating youth long before reaching critical points in the disease process.
Access to Crisis CareAdditional funding for crisis and diversion services — including peer support and respite services — can save countless lives, claims Lorinser.
"Community leaders need to lead in prevention efforts," said Dr. Lorinser. "Public attention increases with tragic events such as suicide and school mass shootings. We need to understand and address the root causes and what interventions are effective before these events occur.” "We can't accept preventable suffering in children, and we can't accept the status quo. According to the CDC, death by suicide is the 4th leading cause of death in teens, and general gun violence is now the leading cause of death in young adults. Without our attention, these two issues combine, tear at the fabric of our society, and take far too many lives far too early."
