Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH, says new trends demonstrate the n | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Nearly 1 in 5 teens have made suicide plans | | Even as early as 2011, surveys show disturbing student mental health data. Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH, says new trends demonstrate the need for urgent local, state, and national action. | | | | | | | Anxiety, depression, suicide, and other emotional problems have increased sharply over the last decade. Dr. Bob Lorinser says there's a distinct role for state and federal legislation that can aid in prevention and treatment. Help us advocate for a national, non-profit health insurance program that will cover mental healthcare costs for all Americans. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | NORTHERN, Mich. – Over 17,000 students nationwide participated in a national , a school-based survey conducted biennially by the CDC. The last survey, completed in 2021, included a 'Mental Health and Suicidality' section. Here are the disturbing findings. During the past 12 months, 42% of students felt sad or hopeless almost every day for two weeks or more, stopping them from participating in usual activities. This figure has increased by 14% since 2011. During the past 30 days, nearly one-third of students experienced poor mental health, stress, anxiety, and depression. More than one in five students considered suicide, and 18% of students made a suicide plan. 10% attempted suicide. | | | | Lorinser says local data from one of the largest counties in Michigan's First District suggests similar increases. "Experts often debate the reasons for the gradual but observable rise in teenage/youth mental illness, but all seemingly center on societal issues and social changes," said Lorinser. According to Dr. Lorinser, suicide risk factors include: Family stress Persistent poverty, conflict, and other harmful environmental issues Recurrent abuse or chronic neglect Domestic violence Parental mental health or substance abuse problems Bullying Mass media Increased stress, fear, and anxiety Loss of school, sport, church, and community routine The problem is considerably more alarming for teen girls. | | | | Lorinser reiterates policy initiatives listed on the website "" and says that effective and efficient government solutions can allocate resources to providers to ensure a healthier future, especially in the wake of the February mass shooting at Michigan State University. Dr. Lorinser encourages local organizations, health departments, schools, and municipalities to focus on the following: Federal priorities could include: Access to Mental Healthcare and SupportLorinser insists mental healthcare should be accessible and affordable and supports a "non-profit, national health insurance program to help cover medical costs for all Americans." Early InterventionLorinser says prevention is essential to treating youth long before reaching critical points in the disease process. Access to Crisis CareAdditional funding for crisis and diversion services — including peer support and respite services — can save countless lives, claims Lorinser. "Community leaders need to lead in prevention efforts," said Dr. Lorinser. "Public attention increases with tragic events such as suicide and school mass shootings. We need to understand and address the root causes and what interventions are effective before these events occur.” "We can't accept preventable suffering in children, and we can't accept the status quo. According to the CDC, death by suicide is the 4th leading cause of death in teens, and general gun violence is now the leading cause of death in young adults. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Hungry for a cause [WATCH NOW]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372030:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)
Peter,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

The best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372030:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
If you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $25 or even $50 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372030:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372030:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372030:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372030:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)

---

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372031:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372032:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62372033:6IxFZcGNM:m:1:3331421248:2046A06A79C6EAD1A30D77AF1AB71646:r)

With your help, we can keep Michigan moving forward. That’s why we’re asking you to pitch in $5 to support Building Bridges and the work we’re doing to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot. Please, make a donation by using this link here:= \--- Begin Forwarded Message --- If there’s anything we’ve learned over the past few years, it’s that we need leaders who: fight for American workers, will work to expand quality affordable health care, defend access to abortion, and build a more just, safer, equitable, sustainable nation. We need Democratic leaders in all levels of government to keep moving Michigan forward, and the new Democratic trifecta is focused on doing just that. From passing the largest tax cut in decades to supporting funding for businesses and affordable housing, we’re getting things done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Democrats are working tirelessly in Michigan to deliver the issues that matter most to Michiganders. We’re becoming a beacon of progress in the Midwest, and we’re able to get things done because of support from people like you. We have to be able to maintain our majorities to keep up the good work. That means supporting my PAC, Building Bridges, which is committed to investing in hard-fought races across Michigan. = Thank you, Gretchen Whitmer | | Now that we have Democratic majorities in both the State House and Senate, we're getting to work – but we can't stop there. We need to double down on our efforts to solidify and build upon our majorities to keep getting things done for Michiganders. Donate now to help us get it done! = PAID FOR BY BUILDING BRIDGES PAC Building Bridges PAC P.O. Box 12056 Lansing, MI 48901 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please .

body:
We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. Our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. | |
---
Derek -- We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023 ahead of tomorrow's fundraising deadline. The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, and that means our party depends on folks like _you_ to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. **So, Derek, we need you to play a vital role in this fight. Here are a few things your Official 2023 DNC Membership could help support:**
* 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states;
* 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure;
* 💪 Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day.

The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, and that means our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. So, Derek, we need you to play a vital role in this fight. Here are a few things your Official 2023 DNC Membership could help support: 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states; 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure; 💪 Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day. You haven’t donated to renew your membership yet, Derek. Will you make a commitment to supporting Democrats in 2023 and beyond by renewing your DNC membership before tomorrow's deadline? We need 10 more folks to chip in from Manassas, and when you do, we’ll send you your very own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. ** The team at the DNC is already looking ahead. Democrats won across the country in 2022 because of grassroots support, and we’re prepared to do it again. But first, we need you on board. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1859%2E5257348%2EkHCYE7 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek: With less than 48 hours until our February end-of-month
fundraising deadline, is there anything we can say to convince you to
donate to Adam's campaign for the U.S. Senate today?

What if we told you that last Congress, Democrats were just two votes shy
of overriding the filibuster to pass transformative legislation for
working families and that Adam would provide a critical solid Democratic
vote?

What if we told you that there is no other member of Congress in history
that, as the lead impeachment manager in a sitting president's Senate
trial, secured a bipartisan vote for a president's removal?

Or that Adam has the singular experience of defending our democracy from a
corrupt and power-hungry MAGA movement and has been relentless in his
efforts to strengthen our democracy for generations to come?

That he served as a vital member of the January 6th committee, and he’s
been in the middle of the fights for the very soul of our democracy, not
sitting on the sidelines?

And what if we told you that Adam is doing all of this without accepting a
cent of corporate PAC money?

Are you convinced? We hope you are because we need you to be one of 400
donors from Pennsylvania to chip in today and help reach our
end-of-month fundraising goal.

subject: He’s bringing in the circus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I need to know I have continued grassroots support. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59375386/393985530/-557856831?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDdmOWZkYS1lZGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyUuS5sV00Pfq-TiXS6uGUwtLhwPSCcCKl05S6bplhY=)
**Friend, I'm speechless:** Speaker Kevin McCarthy granted conspiracy peddling political pundit Tucker Carlson exclusive access to _more than 40,000 hours_ of security footage from inside the Capitol during the Jan. 6 insurrection. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59375388/393985532/1324349186?refcode=E20407-20230227-EOM4-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDdmOWZkYS1lZGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyUuS5sV00Pfq-TiXS6uGUwtLhwPSCcCKl05S6bplhY=) Is this what it’s come to? Rather than allowing a federal reinvestigation, MAGA Republicans are just going to pass off sensitive information to a known Trumped-up dogmatist to sift through? **Friend, this goes beyond what any of us could have even predicted.** Giving zealots like Tucker Carlson free reign to create and foster conspiracies is not only unprecedented, but completely dangerous. This just goes to show how far McCarthy will go to pander to election deniers, literal _insurrectionists._ McCarthy, my colleagues, and I all have a duty to find the truth about who was there, who incited the insurrectionists, and how we can make sure that our democracy never again faces that same threat. This latest stunt has only emboldened me even more to demand truth and justice, not whatever is filtered through the mouths of conspiracy theorists. We have to do everything we can to defeat them. Luckily, we have momentum, but we have to keep it up because the race for the majority is neck-and-neck, and every dollar counts. **[So please, can you chip in now so we can crush our goal before midnight and keep MAGA Republicans out of the majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59375389/393985533/1324349186?refcode=E20407-20230227-EOM4-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDdmOWZkYS1lZGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyUuS5sV00Pfq-TiXS6uGUwtLhwPSCcCKl05S6bplhY=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn4aeu11988isjocfrdituis3s906p23sqrcku5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsmqkki40fk49fdn3igdmtgb3n8bdctruvodb4e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuqgucisstup4kjd5gq1q5jc4ugjvr716jr9o0t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z29gv8qs2mifreggfjk23tuvbg1a4ir61os4kako_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW →**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztprt8925cpfjvvu1btqs1vcuk4rrcmcmbdln3fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z68gia9sfekdf52clo7gll4sjjdfrmp4ffu7hh60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zudtq19rnef7152mu9csnrj9s0rh1vmk4n88bf0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlb1od171ct3v29oaskg6ptj2ahdgiaa8dv9tjg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqbl6fg1mjis89g5qg6dhf2r649fpd1litb6ghoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6aor4s5h2bs)

clean_body: If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | Fellow American, I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit. I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning. The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery. Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - IN PUBLIC. Right now, we're failing that test. That's why I am running for President of the United States. Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation. This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we: Believe in merit. Believe in accountability. Believe in free speech. Believe in American exceptionalism. Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. E pluribus unum - from many, one. These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them. Join me, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Los Angeles County Confirms Removal of 1.2 Million Ineligible Voters From Rolls as Part of Lawsuit Settlement
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that Los Angeles County removed 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year under the terms of a settlement agreement in a federal lawsuit Judicial Watch filed in 2017.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 27, 2023

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that Los Angeles County removed 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year under the terms of a settlement agreement in a federal lawsuit Judicial Watch filed in 2017. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 27, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that Los Angeles County removed 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year under the terms of a settlement agreement in a federal lawsuit Judicial Watch filed in 2017. ---|--- | | | | | “The Elon Musk ‘Twitter Files’ are the tip of the iceberg, as the federal government ran a massive, secret censorship op against the American people,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That the DHS is hiding these censorship records in violation of FOIA law shows the agency still has something to hide.” ---|--- | | | | | Although the U.S. has already implemented a governmentwide plan to advance racial equity and support underserved communities under a 2021 Biden executive order, the president has issued a second directive to strong arm federal agencies into launching more initiatives that will further tax Americans. ---|--- | | | | | In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of fentanyl. Known as Operation Lone Star, the project was launched by Governor Greg Abbott in March 2021 as the illegal immigration crisis gripped his border state. ---|--- | | | The Federalist Los Angeles County, California confirmed it had removed 1.2 million ineligible voters from its rolls thanks to a settlement with the conservative advocacy group Judicial Watch, the group announced Friday. Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit in 2017 on behalf of itself and four registered voters in Los Angeles County. Election Integrity Project California, Inc., another public interest group, was also a part of the lawsuit. Daily Mail The Secret Service has been accused of a ‘cover-up’ over its alleged involvement in a police investigation when Hunter Biden‘s lover dumped his gun in a trash can near a school in 2018. CNS News Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Defense Department because it has failed to produce legally requested communications concerning President Joe Biden’s Sept. 1 campaign speech in Philadelphia, where he positioned two U.S. Marines to stand behind him as he lectured that “MAGA Republicans” are threatening the “very foundations of our Republic.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df46dc3894724aeebbc1b80140cea7e5&_e=XivCuzoitSHJxUhM_RCZm8fvvZt0AAjbUu-ZeoxOCRNoqh4Pn5Ku8_nvCZ-MT1iC9T3jDoG9Sto6LlKmfN4hSk7HuhdeNuka8XQVuC4Kr5zTxLZo49pmFTGSksG70ErAzZFU-vDuZNM3A-mWPIqITkmadln2upJt63QFluF3fHNMqXqT7N9KszQg7ypROIXTj3xpwGQwdzlZxTRNVkeat5UOzhwx_E7xV1WsJ6_xURIO206dbUq3ARHWXOUfZ2WFV_QD2hiSiRXxo0g3bluk0KQiydCAWKrHAB-NFSXIhoO0vNOaGDFgvCtsCsV87ZjHBucF9ochyScQ1qQDBuRehKxmIkjSpLrlZOPk_sQAVqQV0Y6XXohAWEmGvHfjMhDlMdzXFoZzVTUrvTtd0K7yKA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df46dc3894724aeebbc1b80140cea7e5&_e=XivCuzoitSHJxUhM_RCZm8fvvZt0AAjbUu-ZeoxOCRNoqh4Pn5Ku8_nvCZ-MT1iC9T3jDoG9Sto6LlKmfN4hSk7HuhdeNuka8XQVuC4Kr5zTxLZo49pmFTGSksG70ErAzZFU-vDuZNM3A-mWPIqITkmadln2upJt63QFluF3fHNMqXqT7N9KszQg7ypROIXTj3xpwGQwdzlZxTRNVkeat5UOzhwx_E7xV1WsJ6_xURIO206dbUq3ARHWXOUfZ2WFeZVRy5d_uaXn_BzVQh6Ktb-hLlYcUzNBdU80Cj_MqlJljLboyYLCvG1LhbpXsJi39pD0frjPuZ9Ayez04EDdNvmd3VG1j_sxfO_bKgWKqUceejiYbJ9G-A2PNxlalBGwvqo3w8TCOw85gM9KemKrHQ%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df46dc3894724aeebbc1b80140cea7e5&_e=XivCuzoitSHJxUhM_RCZm8fvvZt0AAjbUu-ZeoxOCRNoqh4Pn5Ku8_nvCZ-MT1iC9T3jDoG9Sto6LlKmfN4hSk7HuhdeNuka8XQVuC4Kr5zTxLZo49pmFTGSksG70ErAzZFU-vDuZNM3A-mWPIqITkmadln2upJt63QFluF3fHNMqXqT7N9KszQg7ypROIXTj3xpwGQwdzlZxTRNVkeat5UOzhwx_E7xV1WsJ6_xURIO206dbUq3ARHWXOUfZ2WFf_KQYgdrSXW8ie48cifu9WfD20L52prJMvh1BTgnEcerKz4ct10ckVkaN9e89EO5_TCCIp635sAMZX1mJU2kcv_gtzEs2RCDpdmwc_uTAoBv-frTZXtGUPI7IjB_1FGwBGgzxP4w8E4v8pe7Or5uGg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df46dc3894724aeebbc1b80140cea7e5&_e=XivCuzoitSHJxUhM_RCZm8fvvZt0AAjbUu-ZeoxOCRNoqh4Pn5Ku8_nvCZ-MT1iC9T3jDoG9Sto6LlKmfN4hSk7HuhdeNuka8XQVuC4Kr5zTxLZo49pmFTGSksG70ErAzZFU-vDuZNM3A-mWPIqITkmadln2upJt63QFluF3fHNMqXqT7N9KszQg7ypROIXTj3xpwGQwdzlZxTRNVkeat5UOzhwx_E7xV1WsJ6_xURIO206dbUq3ARHWXOUfZ2WFzsLkNfRomkmZZ2jv5uYmonL7ZLjJyUIMxUF2O_n7Bu-sD1mXOmKumRObROB7Tlc1NNWer-lFCulilmY_aktnFkZ_onDyi3qk6Trwps8GMY4FjL0q2p6UFWheueBADNn6CoKSH-xCIyuux4PbL4vnXA%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. In an interview published in Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: " My job is to apply the Constitution." But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution." Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znd41uv5ajcmg7anigrmudl1n1tcrkv3mqvv2nlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6ep74c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt1nb187nbkq2cedl7ras61n9isqaun4jscqrtl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6ep74c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs39tekat2qjfi3me5uvlvr8s52jnr590hm4ck70_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6ep74c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmcp7gu7g11n9v5n11ukhnhcossetqtnbs078898_rp22sh2s8i66pr7clj6ep74c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: You need to read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=199c42c53ff540a5a5b39fa989d1e95d&_e=CW7Kun_M06mFm6cuRra4Ka-HpMn3ikrXdARZzjPciKCMnOT5_rHi0Liy6JA-Lz7yCv9WOicEsaASFiyMozxcRKd51SkUdWrSBHU6HZiClVqguQAcEY5anKDiXuolannkac9VIUtpb_6SgGM0j8fBmaqe3qmCbiswcWrmiYghLhH0Vj_iJf9iOex8VzOLA4MbbeEke6lnV-0r4gPCKqz6UvvvmieDSfPGOiJo0ox3dIjGomS1AwiRHxf5leTGczEtn9r-J4cHNl0CP_R9OVPpVYXtkKEG237VO0kqXixlPrFXzOxI1Kufj7Yjuer08ehoiRJ-hSjYwD6RAxBt-c-Ug3_MyjTlXrXYiY3mWuy3sL1o1M_rDhBgoWAW0plhXMDQkVgolWzrCyRtiHS8U8Z1Ay7wfc0zqJZYwwDS0RxycgZhrb6HkjXFEif9-8XcEnMYxqAvMtkBMlckaQ1ly6lMrQ%3D%3D)
---

Kevin's first month in office confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=199c42c53ff540a5a5b39fa989d1e95d&_e=CW7Kun_M06mFm6cuRra4Ka-HpMn3ikrXdARZzjPciKCMnOT5_rHi0Liy6JA-Lz7yCv9WOicEsaASFiyMozxcRKd51SkUdWrSBHU6HZiClVqguQAcEY5anKDiXuolannkac9VIUtpb_6SgGM0j8fBmaqe3qmCbiswcWrmiYghLhH0Vj_iJf9iOex8VzOLA4MbbeEke6lnV-0r4gPCKqz6UvvvmieDSfPGOiJo0ox3dIjGomS1AwiRHxf5leTGczEtn9r-J4cHNl0CP_R9OVPpVYXtkKEG237VO0kqXixlPrFXzOxI1Kufj7Yjuer08eho1zTzd9MRKbboMGcDgzYTSffHrwaOcCwaz55OHdJAY5A0JjlR3fyY_cew7YUmxsFr8tIxcQIuQUmc7tLt8Yi9FJFqlaebgDWT0aZNQDhWj0Mcrtb1AY5ItXRKzvsa41kFsRuTlV7g5ZovmnLiVBPAaw%3D%3D "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=199c42c53ff540a5a5b39fa989d1e95d&_e=CW7Kun_M06mFm6cuRra4Ka-HpMn3ikrXdARZzjPciKCMnOT5_rHi0Liy6JA-Lz7yCv9WOicEsaASFiyMozxcRKd51SkUdWrSBHU6HZiClVqguQAcEY5anKDiXuolannkac9VIUtpb_6SgGM0j8fBmaqe3qmCbiswcWrmiYghLhH0Vj_iJf9iOex8VzOLA4MbbeEke6lnV-0r4gPCKqz6UvvvmieDSfPGOiJo0ox3dIjGomS1AwiRHxf5leTGczEtn9r-J4cHNl0CP_R9OVPpVYXtkKEG237VO0kqXixlPrFXzOxI1Kufj7Yjuer08ehoSl0bbgSZ97bv55py2SQfCbVplT2ZbmIyEdQo_y7EBgMZCYzyI8icxw-cyfontTKpzgFJAc_EBhkyrzc1WkdhZ7H57Ej-lVCaw5vIaadUVozu5eqIyBXUBRMlkBKsv5QkHOxqWVPx2GYTdZb7rAraEw%3D%3D)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=199c42c53ff540a5a5b39fa989d1e95d&_e=CW7Kun_M06mFm6cuRra4Ka-HpMn3ikrXdARZzjPciKCMnOT5_rHi0Liy6JA-Lz7yCv9WOicEsaASFiyMozxcRKd51SkUdWrSBHU6HZiClVqguQAcEY5anKDiXuolannkac9VIUtpb_6SgGM0j8fBmaqe3qmCbiswcWrmiYghLhH0Vj_iJf9iOex8VzOLA4MbbeEke6lnV-0r4gPCKqz6UvvvmieDSfPGOiJo0ox3dIjGomS1AwiRHxf5leTGczEtn9r-J4cHNl0CP_R9OVPpVYXtkKEG237VO0kqXixlPrFXzOxI1Kufj7Yjuer08ehoCo40DkUB9JjcdCGX45Noh0I1lqjZCOAJcl739qaQ0xFFPlmAidUNJXjFJrVfgi3NiNVNIrEJZNMb-Ve_V7KIVzPa1-_kaw_rYmCk5zed9ZFWWVmMCJ2FL0S37UrMvvhgLPc-VSroTQamCSunmQkC7w%3D%3D)

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists. Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval "here." Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him every step of the way. | | | | Thank you for your time, Newt Gingrich | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
A lot has happened in this race for Kentucky governor, so I wanted to reach out quickly and give you an update. Hey Peter, Eric with Team Beshear here. A lot has happened in this race for Kentucky governor, so I wanted to reach out quickly and give you an update.

I'll start with some exciting news: **Polling in our race shows Andy is leading his top Republican challengers!** This comes after we learned Andy has the highest approval rating of any Democratic governor in the nation. It's clear Kentuckians are ready for four more years of progress under the Beshear administration.

**But it still won't be an easy race.** One of Andy's Republican opponents has already gone up on the airwaves with a six-figure ad buy and outside money has entered the race again. That means this campaign will get expensive, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources to compete.

clean_body: A lot has happened in this race for Kentucky governor, so I wanted to reach out quickly and give you an update. Hey Peter, Eric with Team Beshear here. A lot has happened in this race for Kentucky governor, so I wanted to reach out quickly and give you an update. I'll start with some exciting news: Polling in our race shows Andy is leading his top Republican challengers! This comes after we learned Andy has the highest approval rating of any Democratic governor in the nation. It's clear Kentuckians are ready for four more years of progress under the Beshear administration. But it still won't be an easy race. One of Andy's Republican opponents has already gone up on the airwaves with a six-figure ad buy and outside money has entered the race again. That means this campaign will get expensive, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources to compete. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = We might be off to a strong start, but experts are predicting that this will be the most competitive race in 2023. As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we can expect Andy's opponents and outside groups to throw everything they can our way to win and undo the progress we've made. Andy is fighting to improve our public education, grow our economy, expand access to affordable health care, and so much more. But he's counting on your support to ensure he can take on his 12 Republican opponents and win this tough race in November. = Thanks, Eric Hyers Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

Friend: With a brand-new poll showing Democrats and Republicans _neck and neck_ in Nevada, our Democratic Senate majority could once again hinge on keeping this battleground state blue.

name: VoteVets
subject: Healthcare for Veterans is not "woke"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We just saw a first look at what the GOP wants to cut
#
Derek -
We knew McCarthy and his radical caucus would push draconian budget cuts as they "negotiate" the paying off past debt. And we’ve got some bad news.
We just saw a first look at a list of proposed cuts, written by Trump's own budget director. Here’s what is on the chopping block:
A **$2 TRILLION CUT to Medicaid.** Cuts to food assistance. Cuts to Obamacare. **Even the VA may not be safe.**
Why? Apparently providing health care for Veterans is too "woke" these days. When **1 in 10 Veterans and their survivors get healthcare through Medicaid,** this is a direct attack on the people who have sacrificed the most in service to our country.
These are the exact kinds of cuts that we were afraid of, but here’s the good news: We still have time to fight back.
**[VoteVets is working every angle we can to put a stop to these cuts. We need you to rush your first donation – $5 or whatever you can afford – to help us crush these cuts before they gain steam. Too much is at stake here.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230227-1-15&t=1&akid=7752%2E3013755%2E3Y-C9F)

name: Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Biden Supporters Calling Ryan Chamberlin a Racist for His Strong Border Policy!
body:
| | | | [](https://emailer.ryanchamberlin.com/lt.php?s=508929fa82e67ab45e4731e44bde2bb3&i=16A20A2A75)
---
| | | Well, Folks, they are at it again.

During President Trump's entire first term, liberal Republicans like Mitt Romney, Liz Cheney, and Mitch McConnell lambasted our President for doing everything in his power **to secure the southern border**.

Now as he begins his second term as governor, liberal Republicans stand around on the establishment’s woke corporate cocktail circuit and make snide comments about Gov. DeSantis for protecting Florida from illegal aliens.

Now, the same liberal dopes are attacking me. They are calling me a racist, a bigot, and a protectionist. Why? Because I want to put America First, Protect Florida, and **keep illegal aliens from pouring across our borders.**

Under the Biden administration, the crisis at our Southern border is out of control. As more and more illegal aliens infiltrate our country, the fentanyl crisis has ballooned, human trafficking continues to rise, and gangs are becoming more violent.

Because of Joe Biden, every state now is a border state as the illegal cartels swarm across Mexico into the rest of the country.

**I'm the only candidate that will state with Gov. Ron DeSantis to protect Florida and push back on Joe Biden’s border policies**. As your next state representative, I will support:
* E-Verify
* No free college tuition for illegal aliens
* No free medical care for illegal aliens
* And no driver’s licenses for illegal aliens

If you want someone who will always stand with our police and sheriff’s departments to protect Florida and stop illegal aliens, then please vote early or this upcoming Tuesday, March 7th. And remember that the best guarantee of ballot security is a big conservative voter turnout.
Sincerely,

Ryan

P.S. The Republican establishment is completely aligned with liberal elites, and they want our campaign stopped. We must close strong. Please help us out with a donation of $100, $500, $1,000, or anything you can afford today.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15a29eb8ea6c451a80aba2f6a0151a72&_e=-bwJTvNHm4gmxE5IKdscugAtgHtQANhLs13rnGNGQGrklVtYmaaDO8ZurNHYPZdmiW6fMc5H7H8gz1CLpslSg9fZQYaspjMk6Rk4CkrvU4h6J9jWDdpppS8DQ-gozaG6UX_Mzi81EF_MgV9O7BAflFBYv6Ktt_XxUcmhwVzOemMOfFnOY66Se7uvB9qT43wxYkFxcaNwOPSoFj48D71wOz5QScwyUw3E33fPY_bG2ryePMAsmsVp_jEAMR1okFtn_L0z1yEFN91TiqncLpFH3hS35inDUuf9tQKngeT9uULVVXKMXWgn6zNtl-n38qWJcB64nkBKq7YCoWloEM_rPe8YNulos0B5S79Sw3hWy8rl1hmG_g09XPpCPUp6JOuS3wyIxw_7X8MfL4sm9qQRbhC3O9G8zRU7DNMu5puTigjkX2S896EP4UTEUMEVKD5W)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15a29eb8ea6c451a80aba2f6a0151a72&_e=-bwJTvNHm4gmxE5IKdscugAtgHtQANhLs13rnGNGQGrklVtYmaaDO8ZurNHYPZdmiW6fMc5H7H8gz1CLpslSg9fZQYaspjMk6Rk4CkrvU4h6J9jWDdpppS8DQ-gozaG6UX_Mzi81EF_MgV9O7BAflFBYv6Ktt_XxUcmhwVzOemMOfFnOY66Se7uvB9qT43wxYkFxcaNwOPSoFj48D71wOz5QScwyUw3E33fPY_bG2ryePMAsmsVp_jEAMR1okFtn_L0z1yEFN91TiqncLpFH3gW0tDqoFcjvDGrTDQTw5TmlwFGvaxjVLEO4mKGN1c_corZ8mB4TrJruGmiEHvxtGOP0F8gQnn-x8gugLxaPJWm2ucHASed2XWdO2hifSSHUywc7x1APpLmk842D2iuPRFxVnj8zZ0swreBVjIEFNUXI-lAkOP6HpgUzZFD-NiPR)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15a29eb8ea6c451a80aba2f6a0151a72&_e=-bwJTvNHm4gmxE5IKdscugAtgHtQANhLs13rnGNGQGrklVtYmaaDO8ZurNHYPZdmiW6fMc5H7H8gz1CLpslSg9fZQYaspjMk6Rk4CkrvU4h6J9jWDdpppS8DQ-gozaG6UX_Mzi81EF_MgV9O7BAflFBYv6Ktt_XxUcmhwVzOemMOfFnOY66Se7uvB9qT43wxYkFxcaNwOPSoFj48D71wOz5QScwyUw3E33fPY_bG2ryePMAsmsVp_jEAMR1okFtn_L0z1yEFN91TiqncLpFH3mOaMSrgY7CCdqdKfcS_S63ouqnJNk7cmEjthREMOckWfgRY8NyGt-yl4RnN8EZIw7j3j1Sfy57RPLlmfgMERYZ7Ah3D68Z7deWEgNOzRZq5RGOyBGo5uLz4B9GUgX8rxSU1V80HkvoVHYKWnXmL8oPrWwg5ymUAQZWr8GnmFDGb)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15a29eb8ea6c451a80aba2f6a0151a72&_e=-bwJTvNHm4gmxE5IKdscugAtgHtQANhLs13rnGNGQGrklVtYmaaDO8ZurNHYPZdmiW6fMc5H7H8gz1CLpslSg9fZQYaspjMk6Rk4CkrvU4h6J9jWDdpppS8DQ-gozaG6UX_Mzi81EF_MgV9O7BAflFBYv6Ktt_XxUcmhwVzOemMOfFnOY66Se7uvB9qT43wxYkFxcaNwOPSoFj48D71wOz5QScwyUw3E33fPY_bG2ryePMAsmsVp_jEAMR1okFtn_L0z1yEFN91TiqncLpFH3lPyh5_3sBBLQVqV2fC2VSnxf6U-KmHT7eY5n6dN3B5eO_ZAdTWhDZXCiXNIuZN4pi93knQutQLIWZem6Pb7Cq3aEHJIUnRbowDQo_HIGQxuTmcJ-bKwpYByj_Nq_MDbmVX1PTd4Sy218idMJRMy6aGcwinA71MBqrAA-hsrMGy6).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
|

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 [**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=15a29eb8ea6c451a80aba2f6a0151a72&_t=O2byrLjvZpBSpV0ts70LyOlsZmKOQcNoO-RXhrWowY5WIBm9mYl3UY4lqCv9iy9iwEo1ipcWjttH0N4JRvj6e4e8mVCl3om1J0h9XzoGjhL9862QpmYjnQDq0zsA_MHeadSmFCgebZiGU0z13sFjjXz-w2o7nqoL0ahV0UrrXxo%3D) |
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a983a0686184e7894d272fc5c754cb8&_e=4VhCKNEqM3p3eANQ818NOtgVPcXSFGNHr77T7Z-N2fC8oX-f4w9pD3IXDIiKi3DGvZpUpcV2bMZHD6e2QgcbtMctuYVkVB6TECMdWKr0sy-MKxqLKd3F7kLA3BfXaLkum2T0syfMLWNxV4XuaJM3-FDSGtdud5zLPb0APatEHViNI5T2k8yLx3h12pmKGEcX-ltoDbAFBSyZHgEi7T5IaD5-1_HnG9w0Ne_HY1O-dTPP682bbQ_wJ0kuxUNCM4ea4WdzIdScaaLqphIu5oJM6MgeIijbapaMoHIYVtUuu7tSFImSd6CXCI_ERZGg2L6LWTJ6diShsi7yzyO79TqUpo1E-WtD6W2nFC18GbJJhrNC2SfhsuSNIVR1PgH1LYk766m4I5zxYPndwaYHMHbXGw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a983a0686184e7894d272fc5c754cb8&_e=4VhCKNEqM3p3eANQ818NOtgVPcXSFGNHr77T7Z-N2fC8oX-f4w9pD3IXDIiKi3DGvZpUpcV2bMZHD6e2QgcbtMctuYVkVB6TECMdWKr0sy-MKxqLKd3F7kLA3BfXaLkum2T0syfMLWNxV4XuaJM3-FDSGtdud5zLPb0APatEHViNI5T2k8yLx3h12pmKGEcX-ltoDbAFBSyZHgEi7T5IaD5-1_HnG9w0Ne_HY1O-dTPP682bbQ_wJ0kuxUNCM4eanv4LL3TzNkW5GiQjPAlT8TOQAtdVpfZiPyKGdqNXoDdl8g4HQd0ToRW8y29O4BRGTaOzEtrW2Wmrm0yvt5G4uwcXftUMKsEHTlD4YTVc6Ong3HlOs8dECIR-F3Oluk5zLWjBUDK45xVV7__UfkSH8Q%3D%3D)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a983a0686184e7894d272fc5c754cb8&_e=4VhCKNEqM3p3eANQ818NOtgVPcXSFGNHr77T7Z-N2fC8oX-f4w9pD3IXDIiKi3DGvZpUpcV2bMZHD6e2QgcbtMctuYVkVB6TECMdWKr0sy-MKxqLKd3F7kLA3BfXaLkum2T0syfMLWNxV4XuaJM3-FDSGtdud5zLPb0APatEHViNI5T2k8yLx3h12pmKGEcX-ltoDbAFBSyZHgEi7T5IaD5-1_HnG9w0Ne_HY1O-dTPP682bbQ_wJ0kuxUNCM4eap09-6vDsN9y6SCLXUhKkrYS-TX1k3UB37Tsv24A-q8xDU7LvWc8RrAGCiJilG3cA4Zf4Ry9sg4qzNCIOyBZezBkqm-qNHbS6TBxuj0bih4oZH241jw6xf-6f9BNPR8Aq4t7I4xO5ZwXZ9bDg9U7vJA%3D%3D)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a983a0686184e7894d272fc5c754cb8&_e=4VhCKNEqM3p3eANQ818NOtgVPcXSFGNHr77T7Z-N2fC8oX-f4w9pD3IXDIiKi3DGvZpUpcV2bMZHD6e2QgcbtMctuYVkVB6TECMdWKr0sy-MKxqLKd3F7kLA3BfXaLkum2T0syfMLWNxV4XuaJM3-FDSGtdud5zLPb0APatEHViNI5T2k8yLx3h12pmKGEcX-ltoDbAFBSyZHgEi7T5IaD5-1_HnG9w0Ne_HY1O-dTPP682bbQ_wJ0kuxUNCM4eaOtJ4L-1fqCb8q_aMaNcsHfCpg_56ph1IvszzgQ0jZzMiFyOKhOYNKrsTXgEjY2Rc-K2hO8lli7moBfWiqwuPxS4XYiUcXObGSQ9dTeFBmjeHMzfwBu6QeBHNf_CIOHebn_rI62EiLUTsL01dBLp9zw%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | Fellow American, I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit. I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning. The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery. Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - IN PUBLIC. Right now, we're failing that test. That's why I am running for President of the United States. Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation. This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we: Believe in merit. Believe in accountability. Believe in free speech. Believe in American exceptionalism. Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. body:
NRSC chair: "This is our last chance this decade" [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59349221/393946040/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzAzNmNjNC1jY2I2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MM245BLyr-sKEQiBymz4hppNlYXNKpKcaTXrNcokk-w=&emci=db665abd-ccb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=13036cc4-ccb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans are throwing everything they've got at Pennsylvania.

The new chair of the NRSC just called the next election **"our last chance this decade to target red-state Democrats,"** and the _Associated Press_ **"the full weight and resources of the Senate Republican campaign operation"** behind a hedge fund billionaire.

body:
The Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T046012bf-d7d9-4a0e-8b3c-af11f69aff69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action's Bi-Weekly "Blue Letter!"_** * 😱 😱 [How Can Dems Electrify, Move, Fight & Win NOW? We share in a video podcast w/ a special guest you've likely seen on tv](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e637a03-6abe-42f6-a96c-5b2c56f2f7da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) since she started predicting election results w/ alarming accuracy: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7jTfZd-iESQ&t=654s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9959075a-f4ec-4d0f-a709-989aa7f0778f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * 😱😠 [Julianna Forlano, in "The Juliana Spin," shows you how Elon Musk rivals Donald Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ed1de8a-9b5f-4028-91e6-df4c68e67c8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) when it comes to unfulfilled promises, and, ya know, unpaid taxes! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NMRrnaGQDt0&t=1s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T878f5380-14dd-43a7-9443-5445d1dae3e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * 🔥 [3 min clip from our larger pod above on how Dems can continue to improve](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60e98c9c-a1f6-424f-a71b-b86e29333500/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) wrt leaving no GOP lies unanswered, touting our accomplishments non-stop & constantly mocking the GOP for their Embarrassing, Crazy behavior. In short. kick a** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RbFT9JXkd8U&t=38s](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda34f213-dd99-49fa-9359-1cedfc4562e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************* **👍👍👍 Have [you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc573b88d-1a8b-40ca-92e5-375084e94635/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24fda5e6-c470-41c3-b454-1fc631233e35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** **It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td46f2e93-9696-4b76-96ea-4e2082bf2863/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ******************* * 😁😉 Our Blue Letter funny/interesting clip, a new tradition, 'cause we all need a laugh these days. [Here is perhaps the greatest sportsball short you will ever see. Ever.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0ee2fe4-92f9-429e-a2d1-4c8899361c92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/UdlVA7jGSzY](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7c5c335-3dcd-451d-bf9a-c0fa4a3240b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading and watching!

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T517d737a-afe8-4616-a952-45e518c4022b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Thanks for reading and watching! Cliff PS: !! Have a great beginning to your week, Blue Amp Action Community | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
