name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Put Constitution 101 on television
body:
There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news.

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4793802d774c4cc79ccc0566bb98c1b4&_e=YuydWg9ikgTs68xbsDedSnLPas7M9Dp6-1NVCegE4wLzk23TStMIfSfNmrOiT1uqkuZi4EiMRuRBRmdAnFijO6e9r7ZLPdZgMYIDH4IorxiK3PP8htyeWr7JNt9bJmzB_vEnw6kugvWCcDGKCovM0gXAUp9GcmLIl8xAcJxeB1vsukNRJG6vCZu4tLoPGi6rF6W6Rr6GqG0gIUBtWIvDSav6R2vDIQFC_BljxbUkAYUo009goW3sV0jMHjIA_9iKwTMpgaooEPkdrmqtuN9th07lc1Xq0F02APjebQZMpD51TkAGn4vHHwp8wWWsPZwDUqC-xFGomVy2YbBuAPBNZ4LEYK1ES_AoGRvTeQLuyhcc_jat_pVZzUBn54JX2fsz8qwisVYDbMSRkY-C6DEvCw%3D%3D) Hi there, Friend. There's startling statistics I want to share with you today, but don't worry, I also have some exciting news. First, the shocking stuff... Recent surveys show that 57% of Americans haven't read the Constitution. So when you are walking through your neighborhood, chances are good that in every house you pass, one person who lives there hasn't read one of our most important founding documents! But there's one more stat I'd like to give you...
26% cannot name a **single right** protected by the First Amendment--not freedom of religion, not free speech, not freedom of assembly--not a single one. These startling statistics show that if we hope to restore liberty in America, we must teach millions of our neighbors about the design and purpose of our Constitution. It's the only way to protect our freedom for the long term. That's why we've been working on a brand new way to do this...one that I'm excited to share with you today. For months, we have worked to produce a version of our most popular free online course, "**Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution** ," that we are airing on television networks nationwide. In other words, we are bringing **["Constitution 101" directly into the homes of millions of Americans. In fact, our current media plan has the spot reaching as many as 70 million households over one month!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4793802d774c4cc79ccc0566bb98c1b4&_e=YuydWg9ikgTs68xbsDedSnLPas7M9Dp6-1NVCegE4wLzk23TStMIfSfNmrOiT1uqkuZi4EiMRuRBRmdAnFijO6e9r7ZLPdZgMYIDH4IorxiK3PP8htyeWr7JNt9bJmzB_vEnw6kugvWCcDGKCovM0gXAUp9GcmLIl8xAcJxeB1vsukNRJG6vCZu4tLoPGi6rF6W6Rr6GqG0gIUBtWIvDSav6R2vDIQFC_BljxbUkAYUH3bBrGl7Og29DGwvV69zg8PNVdE2nWlw06YJ7aOLK0CghMs1esF8IZs1neXZG494JcayFbPSh5WwV4Y_T7ZT7wu4ZRTnDFYUAob0QTb5MDDPmV-ETho93FqeUq1SIbQ2r2fzq1YVPyztCvv_Ot0mkNlpuuAGQhkK6iNa8l-zoqA%3D%3D)**
## Is television good for teaching young Americans how the Constitution works?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4793802d774c4cc79ccc0566bb98c1b4&_e=YuydWg9ikgTs68xbsDedSnLPas7M9Dp6-1NVCegE4wLzk23TStMIfSfNmrOiT1uqkuZi4EiMRuRBRmdAnFijO6e9r7ZLPdZgMYIDH4IorxiK3PP8htyeWr7JNt9bJmzB_vEnw6kugvWCcDGKCovM0gXAUp9GcmLIl8xAcJxeB1vsukNRJG6vCZu4tLoPGi6rF6W6Rr6GqG0gIUBtWIvDSav6R2vDIQFC_BljxbUkAYWgDEUFh36nG8XttBmHkIUn6JfNeSZR_3Iqv5waWddqjdb3DEdBe_Sbv71jfNX-D026ZRXCwA9xfsXI8e2QUfafbwIkvrk2MToNX-5p0Op81J64Yv9e5xEpZ9jqjJEFqqjU_oB5ULDZvZ1ISnL8hig5FrCnyzxAOD1VOIeoL__dsQ%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4793802d774c4cc79ccc0566bb98c1b4&_e=YuydWg9ikgTs68xbsDedSnLPas7M9Dp6-1NVCegE4wLzk23TStMIfSfNmrOiT1uqkuZi4EiMRuRBRmdAnFijO6e9r7ZLPdZgMYIDH4IorxiK3PP8htyeWr7JNt9bJmzB_vEnw6kugvWCcDGKCovM0gXAUp9GcmLIl8xAcJxeB1vsukNRJG6vCZu4tLoPGi6rF6W6Rr6GqG0gIUBtWIvDSav6R2vDIQFC_BljxbUkAYWTQwuwI6T9RXPHDIXqcBg0H0W_7vIF3LZak-UFnMUJK8aUGdLNd-91Piz0btrkY1QCjk1pAd-jKy4GUBrmYGZxumJ6gECAxBaLx58UtTa-KY8dpsR6bPAaaTdwKTlcrHNDcXhmSMSvXFTfEHjfTgYoEWJPrmFWp1N3730jg0mpbA%3D%3D) Imagine citizens of all ages learning about the design and purpose of the Constitution...imagine them having the chance to understand the beauty of our founding documents and how they've been undermined. Most of all, imagine millions of people learning how we might revive limited government in our time! You can see why I'm excited about this and why it's so important that I share this with you today. This new effort is a major escalation of our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions...which has as its aim nothing less than educating as many of our fellow Americans as possible --so we can save our country.** This new television program redoubles our efforts to **reach** and **teach** citizens of all ages about the Constitution and liberty. It's also why we urgently need your support. You might be surprised to learn that airing "Constitution 101" on television networks isn't as expensive as you might think. To air the **_30-minute_ program** and other spots across dozens of networks for **one month** costs just **$275,000...total**. We've negotiated discount rates and identified networks that will be the most effective. Compare that to the $7 million businesses pay to have their 30-_second_ commercial shown once during the "big game." So, airing one 30-minute segment of "**Constitution 101** " on _FOX Business_ might cost as much as $9,000, while other networks cost just $200--which means your generous tax-deductible gift of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way. **[With this in mind, will you help us fund our media budget and all of our other work in the Project to Defend Liberty?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4793802d774c4cc79ccc0566bb98c1b4&_e=YuydWg9ikgTs68xbsDedSnLPas7M9Dp6-1NVCegE4wLzk23TStMIfSfNmrOiT1uqkuZi4EiMRuRBRmdAnFijO6e9r7ZLPdZgMYIDH4IorxiK3PP8htyeWr7JNt9bJmzB_vEnw6kugvWCcDGKCovM0gXAUp9GcmLIl8xAcJxeB1vsukNRJG6vCZu4tLoPGi6rF6W6Rr6GqG0gIUBtWIvDSav6R2vDIQFC_BljxbUkAYVsp136szM-T6D7iHmlK5V9sX84LY16TnAdZQuzZK1d_A_bIEpWTCPOUxPPVBsdhybsAQ_glywFkl4RiBVj1R2qx5w-BCNsFAWSRD50k4hs8BeU6twIwrTfINXWNrnxbPEfkGA_ZgJ7NEM91EguQPDxRe5z3c75exRsErw0V6eB2w%3D%3D)** **You can learn more about our plans and make your gift using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/DRTV](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4793802d774c4cc79ccc0566bb98c1b4&_e=YuydWg9ikgTs68xbsDedSnLPas7M9Dp6-1NVCegE4wLzk23TStMIfSfNmrOiT1uqkuZi4EiMRuRBRmdAnFijO6e9r7ZLPdZgMYIDH4IorxiK3PP8htyeWr7JNt9bJmzB_vEnw6kugvWCcDGKCovM0gXAUp9GcmLIl8xAcJxeB1vsukNRJG6vCZu4tLoPGi6rF6W6Rr6GqG0gIUBtWIvDSav6R2vDIQFC_BljxbUkAYX4w1RI86MEsPzEOWWE-on65rpEXrY6ipSi35ZOnOlD6F8CMS1G_h1VapvK4pU6dI2RPvrVYW6rg0BMByCP1N3bAMl2i9D9-Dhv0IRruL8U9rlBrHdNgRNWd9X1FUj_fAxPfKA3GeBMzKibu-uLW-fg4KnghFjObCfiFMqB7dYyhw%3D%3D)** After reading those statistics, I'm sure you'll agree that our educational outreach on behalf of liberty, like free online courses, has **never** been more urgent than it is today. **As James Madison wrote, only "a well instructed people...can be permanently a free people."** We refuse EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants, so Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn and I are counting on you! Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team IDCCA
subject: DeSantis’ hate has no place in Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
DeSantis' blatant homophobia, transphobia, and racism do not reflect the values of Illinois.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2UD0g4sxZyLy7zu6j-8_koOOxrT9DtucC_aRYRRN3sE=/l3w2vWg6hs1qxv_nWE8YRBUYokavT0hAX4-oAnJyn5Q=?refcode=EM_FR_230227EOM2_TEAM_FULL_5_NG_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats --

One week ago, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis brought his vile agenda to our doors when he spoke in the Chicago suburb of Elmhurst. Traveling 1,000 miles from the state he's supposedly governing, just to spread hate in our community. Clearly, he is gearing up for a possible run for President and thinks his message of division and hate would play here.

The majority of the people of Illinois were having none of it. Protesters gathered in force, unified in their opposition to DeSantis and his despicable agenda.

**Illinois is not the place for bigotry.**

The concern is he did have an audience and support from the local GOP and extremists here in Illinois with the same beliefs, but none of the notoriety, who are on the ballot. **[We've been making use of our strong grassroots organization to get the word out and give their progressive opponents the support they need in the upcoming Consolidated General Elections, but we need your help. We have just one more day to reach our $2,000 end-of-month goal, and we are counting on 25 grassroots supporters like you to pitch in $10 or more right now to help us close the gap and prepare for the final stretch.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2UD0g4sxZyLy7zu6j-8_koOOxrT9DtucC_aRYRRN3sE=/l3w2vWg6hs1qxv_nWE8YRBUYokavT0hAX4-oAnJyn5Q=?refcode=EM_FR_230227EOM2_TEAM_FULL_5_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**

This fits right in with Biden's radical environment policy and will cause energy bills to go way up, which is why I need your help now to fight back! Your contribution will help us stay on track with our financial goals so we have the necessary funds to recruit volunteers, increase our ad budget, and help us with voter outreach to combat the radical eco agenda of Walz and Biden. Your top priorities are my top priorities, and I'll never stop fighting for Minnesota. Thank you,Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7wZcwGEOhDDTRQpuR3TiVfc7Y-fxvARt9QynBO9bkvWPrtENWphYf30Xu5WuIFMAJpfdlMlZyzK016EIN85fyS5Gk7JUZoFeCv34vse_tsPJlEr6PO1S4HRZ-vtwQxMKHL28FMftUII8ksNTE84LIenEyIRetWeTsFQi_hajKo763yygzr8LMV95LWQWbu05AI1A_rcRzjncA3GgXZ5XLgoNZgxGPJkPSiwGfIXSxHDHsjvG1wUF7io14B8NVOK8SDpACNivYD7kL9I0jajFPGjmgvzrEc_UYoR8a1vQLyLQ8olmdpmvhjLqXVzWX7CNPk0G5cRdmDbH-1WPRiK9FKH3YdtSyPevMV5HXSv-Ael_KA1siQaiK3toVH5MzZruAA%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7wZcwGEOhDDTRQpuR3TiVfc7Y-fxvARt9QynBO9bkvWPrtENWphYf30Xu5WuIFMAJpfdlMlZyzK016EIN85fyS5Gk7JUZoFeCv34vse_tsPJlEr6PO1S4HRZ-vtwQxMKHL28FMftUII8ksNTE84LIenEyIRetWeTsFQi_hajKo763yygzr8LMV95LWQWbu05AI1A_rcRzjncA3GgXZ5XLgoNZgxGPJkPSiwGfIXSxHDHl7I0GjZA3ahsgdB0WfxwEZ41JhDe3o7ekd33ZYCIS1ZrgLoHZIQTnXkkXeC3rSJKSiok2Jh-j_JUpoN5XQA2TP7KO9-9PPqLL3WghOXDs1t9nnJKWvaSmooFx1mHfGOYZeGtfZ0XEdChh7bJwU8qtQ%3D%3D)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7wZcwGEOhDDTRQpuR3TiVfc7Y-fxvARt9QynBO9bkvWPrtENWphYf30Xu5WuIFMAJpfdlMlZyzK016EIN85fyS5Gk7JUZoFeCv34vse_tsPJlEr6PO1S4HRZ-vtwQxMKHL28FMftUII8ksNTE84LIenEyIRetWeTsFQi_hajKo763yygzr8LMV95LWQWbu05AI1A_rcRzjncA3GgXZ5XLgoNZgxGPJkPSiwGfIXSxHDHqURpZdv8WBs9WjCip6FZEBJCpGGMRqQfbQG3ZqGLYwEuKdIZDqYKGKqD3MUysh1swyTLql3rK902cmEhT-lNbTgEnVZtIMaUi2hodA46Z7_IeT2fQI0tJy_U5RVpOjFkMdWeSLvA_6lJeMCT4lsfZQ%3D%3D)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7wZcwGEOhDDTRQpuR3TiVfc7Y-fxvARt9QynBO9bkvWPrtENWphYf30Xu5WuIFMAJpfdlMlZyzK016EIN85fyS5Gk7JUZoFeCv34vse_tsPJlEr6PO1S4HRZ-vtwQxMKHL28FMftUII8ksNTE84LIenEyIRetWeTsFQi_hajKo763yygzr8LMV95LWQWbu05AI1A_rcRzjncA3GgXZ5XLgoNZgxGPJkPSiwGfIXSxHDHX6PD77ZPKblaUhSxEHxSlaG6c8jEBo6zFThG109tIaqjyXcDajyY0NoXbcUUnOpe9xBfAOtCq61eaWEk_IafiUCrG2VJLzs25M6NijVmTiyqM0p5PpXUYKuTEcxwKOIoY11xJOt5hFdi5kPcLYTEUQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7wZcwGEOhDDTRQpuR3TiVfc7Y-fxvARt9QynBO9bkvWPrtENWphYf30Xu5WuIFMAJpfdlMlZyzK016EIN85fyS5Gk7JUZoFeCv34vse_tsPJlEr6PO1S4HRZ-vtwQxMKHL28FMftUII8ksNTE84LIenEyIRetWeTsFQi_hajKo763yygzr8LMV95LWQWbu05AI1A_rcRzjncA3GgXZ5XLgoNZgxGPJkPSiwGfIXSxHDHmxMZzX-BnDo5RJf6I4jP6dWIA1Wf3MLDNSHK0XWjqZLXQH3h41vjHJPPQFEZFnY9L-Pvb6aPV6ineSI1LZcyKeMOum_9Oz7kWmErHN1x8RIAo7cuNt-shGaYRfTHHHdh7nr_3VYTvLApxe1piaYtzA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7wZcwGEOhDDTRQpuR3TiVfc7Y-fxvARt9QynBO9bkvWPrtENWphYf30Xu5WuIFMAJpfdlMlZyzK016EIN85fyS5Gk7JUZoFeCv34vse_tsPJlEr6PO1S4HRZ-vtwQxMKHL28FMftUII8ksNTE84LIenEyIRetWeTsFQi_hajKo763yygzr8LMV95LWQWbu05AI1A_rcRzjncA3GgXZ5XLgoNZgxGPJkPSiwGfIXSxHDHIUO4YR8J7SKUieytc8FVbD8QnZmNfHgHTW9cR-V3XB_YqTwn_gOZqDcuTcHTkYZo8ICglZAxmH_4ab60fiI9crrx_lr2F5oYAS9dAJm576Mj0jIN2tUYHfL3V83wIVxJb7VW9MzIHttDoIJNNX_vgg%3D%3D)

---

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7x4l8lu3vXWKj0ItvWxyqvBQ_KgGt0PNYL3wx56PNwY9iLnZ_DXG6HidPG6XSJMZv__B6N_pEXaRtEDMBlL8pA2Zqs3N4h8z0L0IJobOn4UIDG_geeTBjN1CDumy5qOAQr2GZB2AK9q7ggmBNHHtqHmk9PCvcmVOGWf4WNQcQMU6ZaoqEtsfyidTXP4B_cG2EO1JXU1EXr51-33raSXmNz0%3D) | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7-A89WC4X1sDt6H99d-4RriiQI4fObB5ItV1ebFY0ZSWgeoNOFZAcyJ9oS8bwBGqsUNk9yRTduvBkFo5f0MbpEtbg3n2yI7wvzvVnFV3E38r-z0f0UuB2dCDpJcS8SPkYP0w25rdlO_Epx_EXdYygZn_MQad4RWN6Et2ZZb_CbMQY5_NqWYKBqHkT4iqIQHy4Q%3D%3D) | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b71797ed61f44eab99770eb0f03c7de&_e=nmrMCy_O9-w1jyS8iL4p7_IiXYRIBibkNrllh8BJix_YbHdxVsTI-5apws25juKfAmKxBRudSyz4Ut8XXhjVl2-NvL004Z1pVd3ffFNREXci5ciHdtgx668NrutUyjsn2U7-ppGSvia51j69gxDZzpO43Z3vFTWuUz6P51WC2uyFYJSk89dEQbhmdbA6z9YeTxYgMdFwT7aUfd_D61hRAuKNdGRqZpn0ccNtGEC28rk%3D)

name: Gordon Center
subject: Lizzie needs our help
body:
before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline |
---

| | | | As Lizzie’s campaign treasurer since day one, I’m proud of the work she and our team have done and are doing every day – in Washington and here at home. Lizzie is working on the issues that matter most to us like restoring access to reproductive care and protecting the right to travel for that care, lowering health care and prescription drug costs, and making our communities safer and reducing gun violence. Washington Republicans and outside groups know Lizzie is an effective leader. That’s why every time she’s been on the ballot, they’ve made her a target. We can expect more of the same during the 2024 cycle. And we need to be ready for whatever comes our way in the coming months. [_**How do we prepare? By reaching our fundraising goals.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59350483/393950039/645537356?refcode=folf230227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjdkZTNlYi1kMGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ksPklSOBUws18TLJFzBu-G84kgCwf_fNwBGH5MfC118=)

It’s hard to believe, but tomorrow is the end of our second monthly fundraising milestone of the year – and next month we have an FEC deadline. Thanks to the generous support of #TeamLizzie, we’re making great progress toward our monthly goals, but I want to make sure we stay on pace — after all, as Campaign Treasurer, that’s my job! February is the shortest month of the year, which means we have fewer days to raise funds to hit our goal. **Lizzie is proof that it makes a difference who we elect, and together, we can make sure she returns to the House to continue fighting for true Texas priorities. Please consider [_making a contribution before tomorrow’s deadline_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59350485/393950057/645537356?refcode=folf230227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjdkZTNlYi1kMGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ksPklSOBUws18TLJFzBu-G84kgCwf_fNwBGH5MfC118=).** Thanks, Gordon Center

clean_body: before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline | | | | | As Lizzie’s campaign treasurer since day one, I’m proud of the work she and our team have done and are doing every day – in Washington and here at home. Lizzie is working on the issues that matter most to us like restoring access to reproductive care and protecting the right to travel for that care, lowering health care and prescription drug costs, and making our communities safer and reducing gun violence. Washington Republicans and outside groups know Lizzie is an effective leader. That’s why every time she’s been on the ballot, they’ve made her a target. We can expect more of the same during the 2024 cycle. And we need to be ready for whatever comes our way in the coming months. = | = It’s hard to believe, but tomorrow is the end of our second monthly fundraising milestone of the year – and next month we have an FEC deadline. Thanks to the generous support of #TeamLizzie, we’re making great progress toward our monthly goals, but I want to make sure we stay on pace — after all, as Campaign Treasurer, that’s my job! February is the shortest month of the year, which means we have fewer days to raise funds to hit our goal. Lizzie is proof that it makes a difference who we elect, and together, we can make sure she returns to the House to continue fighting for true Texas priorities. Please consider =. Thanks, Gordon Center | | | = PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC. name: Summer Lee
subject: I’m proud to be a Justice Democrat
body:
#
Peter, Summer Lee here -- Congresswoman for PA-12 and proud Justice Democrats recruit.
When I ran for Congress to represent the people of PA-12 and won, Justice Democrats was by my side from day one. Together, we built a multi-generational, multi-racial, people-powered movement from the ground up.
**JD is now facing millions of dollars from the political establishment this campaign cycle.** Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20 million dollars to take down the next Justice Democrats recruits.
[**Will you rush a $3 donation to help JD fight back against the political establishment that is desperate to keep its entrenched incumbents in power?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128493?refcode=em20230227-27737&t=1&akid=27737%2E1203867%2EZjc0Bl)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128493?refcode=em20230227-27737&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=27737%2E1203867%2EZjc0Bl)**
Peter, JD is working every single day to transform the Democratic Party to actually work for the people of this country and not corporations and big donors -- and every single grassroots contribution helps to power their work.
Politics is not pretty. As a working class, progressive Black woman who didn’t take a cent of corporate PAC contributions, a lot of powerful people in the establishment wanted to keep me out of office.
AIPAC poured millions of dollars into our race, running smear campaigns and attacking me for being a “bad Democrat” -- and then supported my Republican opponent. **Without Justice Democrats’ support, I wouldn’t be in Congress right now.**
It's critical that JD reaches every single fundraising goal that they set this year and right now they’re racing against the clock to reach their goal of raising $38,000 before midnight tomorrow.
[**Can you donate $3, or any amount you can, to make sure JD reaches their February fundraising goal before midnight tomorrow?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/128493?refcode=em20230227-27737&t=21&akid=27737%2E1203867%2EZjc0Bl)
Solidarity forever,
Summer Lee

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=27737%2E1203867%2EZjc0Bl) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=27737%2E1203867%2EZjc0Bl) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230227-27737-footer&t=24&refcode2=27737_1203867_Zjc0Bl&akid=27737%2E1203867%2EZjc0Bl)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: If everyone reading this pitched in $1…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — Tomorrow, we’ll say goodbye to February and with it our fundraising deadline for the month. But to be honest, we still have a little ways to go to reach our target. Our numbers for the first few months of 2023 will determine the resources we have to invest in early campaigning work for the election ahead. With election experts already saying that our race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation, we need to start working now to make crucial campaign investments. With Tammy’s Senate seat on the ballot next year, Mitch McConnell and Wisconsin Republicans will be watching our numbers closely. And they have _tens of millions of dollars_ stashed in their war chest ready to attack us if they think we look weak. But Peter, the good news is that if everyone reading this message pitched in even just $1 _(yes! only $1)_ , we’d hit our goal in no time and ensure we can fight back to defend this seat and the Democratic Senate majority with it. That’s why we’re asking: **[Will you pitch in $1 (or more, if you’d like!) ahead of our end-of-month deadline? clean_body: | Peter — Tomorrow, we’ll say goodbye to February and with it our fundraising deadline for the month. But to be honest, we still have a little ways to go to reach our target. Our numbers for the first few months of 2023 will determine the resources we have to invest in early campaigning work for the election ahead. With election experts already saying that our race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation, we need to start working now to make crucial campaign investments. With Tammy’s Senate seat on the ballot next year, Mitch McConnell and Wisconsin Republicans will be watching our numbers closely. And they have tens of millions of dollars stashed in their war chest ready to attack us if they think we look weak. But Peter, the good news is that if everyone reading this message pitched in even just $1 (yes! only $1) , we’d hit our goal in no time and ensure we can fight back to defend this seat and the Democratic Senate majority with it. body:
Here are my updates from this week on our work in Washington and NY-10. |
#
---
Peter, First of all, I want to thank everyone who chipped in to Corinne’s email and surprised me for my birthday! My team tells me that the response was absolutely remarkable. I’m so honored that folks like you have chosen to support my work and have my back as I move full steam ahead in Congress. I’m taking a break from my weekly update to focus today on my very first bill that I will introduce: The _Early Voting Act_. As you all know, my North Star as a member of Congress is to preserve our democracy and the rule of law, so it is fitting that my first bill is designed to expand access to the ballot and eliminate opportunities for bad actors to undermine faith in our elections. But before I discuss the _Early Voting Act_ in more detail, I want to thank those of you who helped make our January fundraising month so strong. **As we approach tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline** , **[I’m kindly asking for your support to help us build the resources we need to sustain our work defending our democracy and delivering for New Yorkers. I appreciate anything you can give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59351323/393952647/-584945951?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VkY2MzMy1kMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrUs4ErZiQkXab9VwKMDM0JnowKg9o32Q3KFb1feUWI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59351324/393952648/-584945951?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VkY2MzMy1kMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrUs4ErZiQkXab9VwKMDM0JnowKg9o32Q3KFb1feUWI=)

---

* * *

**My First Bill: The _Early Voting Act_**
The right to vote is the fundamental right from which all other rights flow. Without equal access to the ballot, without fidelity to the concept of one person, one vote, our democracy cannot function properly. And our democracy cannot be taken for granted.
**That is why I was so proud on Thursday to join Reverend Al Sharpton and other civil rights leaders at the National Action Network to introduce, as my very first piece of legislation in Congress, the _Early Voting Act_ , which is a crucial step to guarantee the fundamental right of one person, one vote. That right is truly the foundation of our democracy.**
The anti-democratic strain of the modern Republican Party has added a new urgency to this fight. Republican governors and state legislatures across the country are working, as we speak, to remove polling places from urban precincts. They’re passing draconian laws to limit how, when, and where you can cast your ballot.
They’ve also pushed radically dangerous Constitutional interpretations that would invalidate the checks and balances of the judicial system and allow politicians instead of voters to determine the outcome of an election.
Simply put, they are working in broad daylight to eliminate the people’s voice as the determining factor in our elections.
**The _Early Voting Act_ will make federal elections uniform across the country, no matter if you are rich or poor; White, Brown, or Black; Democrat or Republican; or living in urban neighborhoods or rural farmland. **
This bill includes:
* At least 14 days of early voting before Election Day and including weekends. No longer will anyone have to choose between working and voting.

* A requirement for polling places to be made easily accessible, including near public transportation and on college campuses.

* Provisions that ensure early votes are processed and counted before Election Day so that we will get our election results faster. This will eliminate that opportunity for bad actors to spread disinformation and undermine the faith in our democracy.

Our democracy was founded on the principle of one person, one vote. We must provide easy and equal access to our democracy so that everyone can make their voices heard. I can’t wait to get back to Washington and encourage my colleagues to help get this across the finish line.
* * *
**I am working hard to make sure we bolster our democracy and I hope you can join me in the effort.**
**[If you’re able, please add a contribution of any amount ahead of Tuesday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to help support my work for our democracy and for New Yorkers. I’m grateful for a contribution of any amount that’s meaningful to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59351330/393952654/-584945951?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VkY2MzMy1kMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrUs4ErZiQkXab9VwKMDM0JnowKg9o32Q3KFb1feUWI=)**

I’m taking a break from my weekly update to focus today on my very first bill that I will introduce: The Early Voting Act. As you all know, my North Star as a member of Congress is to preserve our democracy and the rule of law, so it is fitting that my first bill is designed to expand access to the ballot and eliminate opportunities for bad actors to undermine faith in our elections. But before I discuss the Early Voting Act in more detail, I want to thank those of you who helped make our January fundraising month so strong. As we approach tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline , = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = My First Bill: The Early Voting Act The right to vote is the fundamental right from which all other rights flow. Without equal access to the ballot, without fidelity to the concept of one person, one vote, our democracy cannot function properly. And our democracy cannot be taken for granted. That is why I was so proud on Thursday to join Reverend Al Sharpton and other civil rights leaders at the National Action Network to introduce, as my very first piece of legislation in Congress, the Early Voting Act , which is a crucial step to guarantee the fundamental right of one person, one vote. That right is truly the foundation of our democracy. The anti-democratic strain of the modern Republican Party has added a new urgency to this fight. Republican governors and state legislatures across the country are working, as we speak, to remove polling places from urban precincts. They’re passing draconian laws to limit how, when, and where you can cast your ballot. They’ve also pushed radically dangerous Constitutional interpretations that would invalidate the checks and balances of the judicial system and allow politicians instead of voters to determine the outcome of an election. Simply put, they are working in broad daylight to eliminate the people’s voice as the determining factor in our elections. The Early Voting Act will make federal elections uniform across the country, no matter if you are rich or poor; White, Brown, or Black; Democrat or Republican; or living in urban neighborhoods or rural farmland. This bill includes: At least 14 days of early voting before Election Day and including weekends. No longer will anyone have to choose between working and voting. A requirement for polling places to be made easily accessible, including near public transportation and on college campuses. Provisions that ensure early votes are processed and counted before Election Day so that we will get our election results faster. This will eliminate that opportunity for bad actors to spread disinformation and undermine the faith in our democracy. Our democracy was founded on the principle of one person, one vote. We must provide easy and equal access to our democracy so that everyone can make their voices heard. I can’t wait to get back to Washington and encourage my colleagues to help get this across the finish line. I am working hard to make sure we bolster our democracy and I hope you can join me in the effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Yours in this fight, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

Hi, my name is Emily Wright and I’m the Development Director for River Valley Organizing. I’m a resident of Columbiana County, just a few miles from the recent train derailment and explosion site in East Palestine, Ohio. I’m reaching out with an important ask: [_**will you contribute $5 today to support our community during this crisis, and in the future for justice-centered healing?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59379503/394004001/-561327740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjVkYTVlLWZjYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nuUAF8C6jKOZzUVa1F9ITS-MpssVmLuzRfBKnESygzo=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59379504/394004002/-561327740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjVkYTVlLWZjYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nuUAF8C6jKOZzUVa1F9ITS-MpssVmLuzRfBKnESygzo=)
---
A few days ago, a train carrying a toxic, cancer-causing chemical – vinyl chloride – derailed and crashed near the Ohio-Pennsylvania border, causing a massive fire. Days later, another explosion was triggered causing chaos and confusion.

The people in our community are in a crisis, and even though nearby communities were evacuated, the toxic smoke from the blast has spread across several counties and hundreds reported nausea, vomiting, headaches, shortness of breath, teeth pain, and diarrhea.

The fallout from the explosion will have a long-term impact not just on our community but also on the environment. The water is contaminated and residents are left to clean up their homes with no proper testing or assistance.

Our hard-working farmers, small business owners, and families are at increased health risk and we need your support to stand up for their safety. We have decades of implications on our hands. [_**Will you contribute $5 right now to support River Valley Organizing's ongoing efforts for the communities affected by the derailment?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59379505/394004003/-561327740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjVkYTVlLWZjYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nuUAF8C6jKOZzUVa1F9ITS-MpssVmLuzRfBKnESygzo=)

clean_body: Our hard-working farmers, small business owners, and families are at increased health risk and we need your support to stand up for their safety. | | = Hi, my name is Emily Wright and I’m the Development Director for River Valley Organizing. I’m a resident of Columbiana County, just a few miles from the recent train derailment and explosion site in East Palestine, Ohio. I’m reaching out with an important ask: = | = A few days ago, a train carrying a toxic, cancer-causing chemical – vinyl chloride – derailed and crashed near the Ohio-Pennsylvania border, causing a massive fire. Days later, another explosion was triggered causing chaos and confusion. The people in our community are in a crisis, and even though nearby communities were evacuated, the toxic smoke from the blast has spread across several counties and hundreds reported nausea, vomiting, headaches, shortness of breath, teeth pain, and diarrhea. The fallout from the explosion will have a long-term impact not just on our community but also on the environment. The water is contaminated and residents are left to clean up their homes with no proper testing or assistance. Our hard-working farmers, small business owners, and families are at increased health risk and we need your support to stand up for their safety. We have decades of implications on our hands. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support. Emily Wright | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Polls were tight. Our budget was tighter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We made aggressive investments in additional advertising to ensure that we could win.
| | |
---
Hi there,
FIRST, polls tightened and GOP spending skyrocketed in the final days of the campaign. Pundits doubted whether we could win.
THEN, we made aggressive investments in additional advertising to ensure that we could win. We trusted that the funding would come through.
NOW, we’re paying our final bills and unfortunately, that funding _didn’t_ come through. We have a hole to fill to get those last bills paid.
**[Will you please chip in $3 or as much as you can to help retire our debt? name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Our plan to DEFEAT Ted Cruz:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Real Texas PAC, www
body:
let's get this done| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59351717/393953989/-1240381122?refcode=051622&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwMjNiMjMyLWQzYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rU7hBz_15syljvN4AdXRTIzv3qtywpbIEJofvIus_ko=)
---

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, you’re not going to believe this, but we’re falling WAY behind on our fundraising projections — during BLACK HISTORY MONTH! If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, we may have had a HUGE VICTORY this month in electing Jennifer McClellan, a progressive Black champion, to the House, but we’re falling short on the fundraising front. Every dollar we raise right now will affect our ability to elect MORE Black progressive champions throughout the rest of 2023 and in 2024. Simply put, if we don’t raise enough money,we won’t be able to elect them. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
The Democrats are ALREADY targeting John James’ seat. Here’s our plan to fight back >>>| | | [](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=cd5c375444bd49759b131d52463f1031&_m=4affacaaa1604f8f8c366d14cf7a10b4&_e=RKaBlljRALVN_qiLBu3QeZB_413Me9WPXTXORBF2O1ln1bkPxBWP38mS_hci12HsvOfoTz6K27Khd5wgismmxmStOBMADHwfQO4YhS1JOknvWxL69PWL3L0bYiVGR0NG3TxodLR6og23cJtK-gnb2nK9Juj-z5aMC9AL7qwzr4b-QUsK2sktCKd7XEMMbZD6NWANvmaHo05SW-DJ7iiPrTg_7zP79FOSi_zjg9CkcHDpJ7MsHEe15OFzTLFyvnY4Lr-KGoyJJBImwWTpMSxmNMC8opnOuxX2iqmNuAFVOVe9hNT7dUIZaF8DNzbsGzjsIx9qwK-_10rgcgyCM1rjkfKG3iEJg-cgrH88PEKG_tLkXDbdU2Ux9CL78l3-4jYx)

subject: ALERT: Illinois school board race updates **SPECIAL EDITION**
body:
School board candidates joined Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar last night on AM 560 The Answer. Listen in!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/664af09de15c/alert-illinois-school-board-race-updates-special-edition?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

SCHOOL BOARD RACE SPECIAL EDITION

ICYMI, our Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar interviewed school board candidates last night on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer. Below are some of the highlights.

Also, Mark Vargas made another appearance on Newsmax TV this Saturday to discuss why President Trump's visit to East Palestine, Ohio was so important not only for the residents impacted by the disaster, but for our country longing for real leadership. Watch now!
Theresa "Tammy" Hayes, District 92 (Will County) (https://wetheparentsillinois.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=feRwDsHbqHs&t=8s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

District 92 (Will County) candidate Teresa "Tammy" Hayes describes what led her to the decision to run for school board.

https://youtu.be/OBlbpAljYkU?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

District 92 candidate Tammy Hayes and District 205 candidate Michael Clausen describe the need candidates have for walk books and data from the IL GOP.

Michael Clausen, District 205 (Lockport Township) (https://wetheparentsillinois.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

https://youtu.be/uebzWlnoEZE?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

District 205 (Lockport Township) candidate Michael Clausen describes the moment when he knew he had to run for school board.

https://youtu.be/GJeO1cBmaDM?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
District 205 candidate Michael Clausen describes the personal attacks he has faced during his campaign.
James "Jay" Roti, Homer Glen village board (https://www.homerforward.com/jay-roti?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://youtu.be/r-iU4YziSkM?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Candidate for Homer Glen village board Jay Roti gives an update on Illinois Review's article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/dist-92-superintendent-tim-arnold-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-public-meeting-as-student-test-scores-continue-to-drop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) regarding District 92 Superintendent Tim Arnold's harassment and intimidation of Roti's wife at a recent public meeting.
Mark Vargas, IR Editor-in-Chief, on Newsmax
https://youtu.be/CiFngQKy0DM?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax to discuss President Trump's visit to East Palestine, Ohio.
https://youtu.be/lSMX0xX85d0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f736f133a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax to discuss why East Palestine, Ohio residents do not trust the government.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Real human people, not corporate PACs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hey friend, it’s Team Slotkin.
We wanted to make sure you saw Elissa’s announcement email this morning, and we specifically wanted to highlight one specific part: **_our campaign will NOT accept corporate PAC money. Period. Exclamation mark._**
That may make things more challenging, especially with notoriously expensive Senate races, but we think you’re just as tired as we are with the influence corporate PACs have on our candidates.
But that means we’re counting on **_you, normal people of America,_** to help us get off to a strong start. This is why we’re asking you to make one of the first contributions to our campaign today. You can use this link:
[**https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/Launch-Day**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=1&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)
Elissa’s announcement email is below in case you missed it.
Team Slotkin
* * *
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=2&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)
I wanted you to hear directly from me: **I am running for the United States Senate in Michigan.**
I’m going to lay out more on why I’m running, but if you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign right away you can use this link:
[**https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/Founding-Donor**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=3&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=4&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
So here’s why I’ve decided to run: we all know America is going through something right now. We seem to be living from crisis to crisis. But there are certain things that should be _really_ simple:
Like living a middle-class life in the state that invented the middle class.
Like making things in America so that we’re in control of our own economic security.
Like protecting our children from the things that are truly harming them.
And preserving our rights and our democracy so that our kids can live their version of the American dream.
I’m running for Senate because I believe that we need a new generation of leaders that thinks differently, works harder, and never forgets that _we are public servants._
Because service is how I’ve spent my life: I spent my career protecting our homeland. After 9/11, I was recruited into the CIA and served three tours in Iraq alongside the U.S. military. I went on to serve under Presidents of both parties in the White House, and then at the Pentagon.
But what motivated me to first run for elected office was my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 – and she didn’t have health insurance. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience – of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork – helped shape my decision to run for office.
These experiences have shaped my time, my priorities, my approach to my four years in the U.S. House, and continue to serve as my motivation to run for Senate.
My experience also impacts _how_ I’ve run my campaigns. Before my first run in 2018, I made a decision to not accept any donations from corporate PACs, because I never wanted my constituents to question why I vote the way I do.
**My campaign for the U.S. Senate will also refuse money from corporate PACs. Not a dime.**
Some people might see it as a disadvantage, especially since Senate campaigns are notoriously expensive. But I know that we can win when we’re powered by real people, contributing what they can, when they can.
To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. A crazy amount. It’s also going to take a lot of work – which is why I’ll be hitting the ground to kick off a listening tour through Michigan, starting with Detroit later this week, to hear what people throughout the state want from their leaders.
When you’re running to win a seat in a swing state like Michigan, we need to start building our war chest on day one. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll be moved to support this campaign today.
[I would be honored if you would join me today and chip in $3 to become one of our first Founding Donors.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o9qbqY&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=5&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-febu23.nRvxtF&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=24&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-febu23.AlkAvH&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=25&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-febu23.UIWHQO&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=26&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-febu23.o4EyCf&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=27&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-febu23.l4-i9J&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=28&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-febu23.9QW3RW&refcode=em230227-2-15&t=29&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo)**
---
****
I *know* that our country is going to get through this time. It’s hard work, but that's what Michiganders have done for generations. It’s going to take engaged citizens and principled leaders. I’m grateful to know we’re in this together from the start. Thank you in advance for chipping in.
Onward!
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=23%2E135344%2EFHN-fo).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

body:

Derek, here’s what we learned from 2022: **_The earlier you prepare, the better off you are._** When Chris’s opponent and outside dark-money groups came after us before the election, we were only able to fight back thanks to the vital preparation we did earlier in the year.

**We’re already hearing from election experts that PA-17 is going to be _one of the most competitive races in the country in 2024._** With this and the lessons we learned from 2022 in mind, we know that it’s important that we rally our grassroots team early to begin to prepare for the challenges ahead.

**That’s where you come in, Derek:[Hitting our monthly goals, even this far out from the 2024 election, will play a critical role in our success next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59352814/393956414/1060757799?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.27_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FjOTQyOS1kNmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1b8s7puIMhCrKqtuyDDZEiTzSpz1zn8jII8GDXntztQ=) When we hit our monthly targets, it helps us ensure we have the resources necessary to defend western Pennsylvania from the radical right and prepare for whatever the GOP throws our way next year.**

[**That’s why we’re asking for your support today, Derek. Is there anything you can chip in today to help us hit our February target? Your donation will have a direct impact on our 2024 race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59352815/393956415/1060757799?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.27_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FjOTQyOS1kNmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1b8s7puIMhCrKqtuyDDZEiTzSpz1zn8jII8GDXntztQ=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The GOP wish list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The GOP is scheming to cut Social Security and Medicare, proposing a nationwide 30 percent sales tax, and threatening to crash our whole economy. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59380058/394014206/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ11Y_EOM_E_20230227_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2NmMDRmZS1mZmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19cCbLOlPm-3aPx45xtu83i7wzA8KUDi41N4-tXTThc=&emci=f8cf04fe-ffb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fccf04fe-ffb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
I’d like to think that politicians run for office to help people. But the GOP doesn’t seem to agree. Congressional Republicans have kicked off the year by scheming to cut Social Security and Medicare, proposing a nationwide 30 percent sales tax on everything from groceries to gasoline, and threatening to crash our whole economy by not raising the debt ceiling. In other words, they’re working hard to make things a whole lot harder for working-class and middle-class families and our seniors — when so many are still recovering from the impacts of the pandemic. And, this is just the tip of the iceberg. Republicans across the country are plotting to pass bills that take rights away from trans people, make it harder to access FDA-approved abortion medication nationwide, and control what our educators can teach at school. Democrats are fighting back, but if Republicans gain more power in 2024 — and they’re strategizing on how to do that right now — they’d have more free reign to pass their extremist agenda. [_**Can you pitch in $3 today ahead of tomorrow’s grassroots fundraising deadline to support our progressive movement, fund our re-election, and help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59380059/394014207/-1180418547?amount=3&refcode=EMZ11Y_EOM_E_20230227_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2NmMDRmZS1mZmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19cCbLOlPm-3aPx45xtu83i7wzA8KUDi41N4-tXTThc=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

This isn’t the first time we’ve seen such drastic views from Republicans, and it won’t be the last. From the future of our climate to the survival of our democracy, so much is at stake if Republicans seize more power, and we must stop them.
And we can — with a grassroots movement powered by grassroots donors. Every single donation helps strengthen this team so we can win back the House and expand our Senate majority with true champions for working people. And every single donation brings us closer to hitting our fundraising goals — including the one we've got to hit by midnight tomorrow.
[_**Can you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense before tomorrow’s monthly grassroots fundraising deadline? name: Cori Bush
subject: Let me level with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
It’s time to lead with love
#
Speaking candidly, Peter:
**I’m sick and tired of watching Republicans trample on the legislation our communities urgently need.**
When you’ve lived out of a car with your small children, _you know that affordable housing isn’t just a good idea, it’s a human right._
When you’ve seen your community lose lives to police violence, you know that we need transformative change that radically reimagines our systems of public safety, _but an urgent call to save Black lives._
When you’ve been forced to decide between affording groceries and utilities — when you’ve been forced to eat expired food from the shelves of a food pantry — _you know that the “handouts” Republicans keep attacking are life-saving policies for families._
These are the struggles that so many of us have lived.
**These struggles are why I ran for office and why I’m working every day to create a new kind of politics rooted in love and compassion.**
And these struggles demand that our team _never_ skips out on an opportunity to educate, mobilize, and raise awareness. In order to achieve legislative victories and build a strong, progressive coalition — we have to set ambitious goals and meet them. Our February fundraising goal is no exception.
[**Will you help us meet our goal with a contribution today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230227.FRVdhQ&amount=5&refcode=em20230227-2253&t=1&akid=2253%2E1082990%2Evzc5wx)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230227.FRVdhQ&amount=5&refcode=em20230227-2253&t=2&akid=2253%2E1082990%2Evzc5wx)**
The challenges we face right now in Congress — from Republican-controlled Congress, to the Jim Crow filibuster, to the dark money funding too many of our elected officials’ campaigns — have made it clear that **it’s going to take a widespread, grassroots effort to bring these transformative policies to life.**
**[If you’re with me in this movement, will you chip in $5 or anything you can so we can continue growing our progressive movement and pass the change our communities need?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230227.FRVdhQ&amount=5&refcode=em20230227-2253&t=3&akid=2253%2E1082990%2Evzc5wx)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230227.FRVdhQ&amount=5&refcode=em20230227-2253&t=22&akid=2253%2E1082990%2Evzc5wx)**
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230227?refcode=em20230227-2253-footer&t=23&refcode2=2253_1082990_vzc5wx&akid=2253%2E1082990%2Evzc5wx) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2253%2E1082990%2Evzc5wx)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: FWD: 2x Impact: Help us meet our critical February Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
to fund and bring momentum to our 2023/24 programs

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don’t need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster – a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration’s open border policies. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=e337465e5b2b4e919eabdc26266ad039&_t=pn1Arn6YGqTLmAnhaZ0yq8iM3k9YyV18U_fQ-JLIvzKB4eoUFm1wuRA-lv6ybmUKYkqQ1xVC9HFVnsV7kdSilAt7LYvGmDO_8sfILxrAEjg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=e337465e5b2b4e919eabdc26266ad039&_t=pn1Arn6YGqTLmAnhaZ0yq8iM3k9YyV18U_fQ-JLIvzKB4eoUFm1wuRA-lv6ybmUKYkqQ1xVC9HFVnsV7kdSilAt7LYvGmDO_8sfILxrAEjg%3D)

| It's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

**[Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e337465e5b2b4e919eabdc26266ad039&_e=SPy8rQySVar0pkpDxwON09fw8Ye8nPWsNCTFZ6b-Cn4h0jQ5htny-ptBtSERhndT6guf_fH9y4eK3JXQ8AVjm3e3R0bFRDGn4_jpSMFI0SYrJfiRy0Gf18YvcVGY9XeSYi_4C7TNUD9JN7gJRuQpviGhQ4Og7mnKsqwxopqVJhaYy-fJhf9fqdgZzNM4iHKFHnqRAyaRehZrmviNe74HH8yx8EfdByTFAS13YIfbk8L5BXrRcNrTHB2pAzif7EXN1auCvcyiMFBM4Z99DzM1uKYfCT_uey0okLVwh_vukWP2yRhE1nhBe-2zVTS_aSRXbTV4mc3yjsBZMtMujCEbdOBmUZBmZC21XH4gJ868M25BmptJNPKiiUXabJWdtIcKcRSck7GkVDhUJoHjbSHWhCkJBMG2DWXcdYvMy2RldX8%3D "Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?")**

subject: I'm a top target for defeat

body:
| Peter: **With Nevada having just decided Senate control, experts at _The Hill_ report that the GOP is coming after me as a top target for defeat heading into 2024. I need your help to fight back and win.**

While Republicans are busy prioritizing the agenda of their megadonor allies, I have been working in the Senate to lower everyday costs and deliver critical progress to people in Nevada and across the country.

But _FiveThirtyEight_ says the battle for Senate control could once again come down to Nevada – and the last race here was won by less than 1 point. **Now, time is running out before our end of month deadline, and we're still falling short of our crucial $15,000 goal.**

[**That's why I'm personally asking, Peter: Please, will you split $10 or more now between my campaign and Upset the Setup so we can hit our end of month goal, keep Nevada blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59357697/393965824/1144484347?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230227_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlMWIyZDY4LWRiYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-SI8zWwH6hdaDyPDlb2gpBZJZPN8W-1DsPAtyyT6aU8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59357698/393965825/1144484347?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20230227_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlMWIyZDY4LWRiYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-SI8zWwH6hdaDyPDlb2gpBZJZPN8W-1DsPAtyyT6aU8=)**

We can't let up in this fight, though. Republicans need to flip just two seats to take back the Senate – and Mitch McConnell and the full force of his special-interest allies are gearing up to come after me with everything they've got.

**That's why falling short of our end of month goal is not an option – it could mean handing the GOP a massive early fundraising advantage. So please, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support:**

clean_body: | Peter: With Nevada having just decided Senate control, experts at The Hill report that the GOP is coming after me as a top target for defeat heading into 2024. I need your help to fight back and win. While Republicans are busy prioritizing the agenda of their megadonor allies, I have been working in the Senate to lower everyday costs and deliver critical progress to people in Nevada and across the country. But FiveThirtyEight says the battle for Senate control could once again come down to Nevada – and the last race here was won by less than 1 point. Now, time is running out before our end of month deadline, and we're still falling short of our crucial $15,000 goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Last year, the GOP spent more than $55 MILLION in a desperate attempt to turn Nevada red – but thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Peter, we stopped that nightmare from becoming a reality. We can't let up in this fight, though. Republicans need to flip just two seats to take back the Senate – and Mitch McConnell and the full force of his special-interest allies are gearing up to come after me with everything they've got. That's why falling short of our end of month goal is not an option – it could mean handing the GOP a massive early fundraising advantage. So please, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support: = Thank you. I'm humbled to have your support. In early 2022, many of us [watched in shock](https://substack.com/redirect/13a81113-9516-4cfe-abd5-94258eb5d9ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after learning Joe Biden's Education Department was pushing to label parents as domestic terrorists, while on the same day, Biden's Justice Department announced it was creating a domestic terrorism unit. Now, in 2023, accountability for the egregious labeling of rightfully concerned parents as domestic terrorists is coming after Congressman [Jim Jordan issued subpoenas](https://substack.com/redirect/9a7e71eb-c734-416c-a8b6-938e68fcef40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, and Secretary Miguel Cardona for documents related to them targeting concerned parents at school board meetings. Under the leadership of Chair Jim Jordan, the House Judiciary Committee [will hold the FBI accountable](https://substack.com/redirect/9170c992-3d9a-428c-88aa-7f38c48fb4a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for targeting parents at school board meetings. Make no mistake, rightfully angry parents at school board meetings are NOT domestic terrorists.
[Share 1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/815fe362-f933-45f1-9fef-13bf1b6c874c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Not-so-secret CRT**
A hidden-camera investigation by [Accuracy in Media revealed](https://substack.com/redirect/e004b7c4-00dd-4d8c-bd53-c11d173e8a75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Ohio public schools are lying to parents and indoctrinating children. Similar to Quintin Bostic being [busted by Project Veritas](https://substack.com/redirect/346e1278-9388-4d92-b1b7-2d11394ad1be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for bragging to a journalist about CRT, Ohio administrators-including a superintendent-were caught on tape bragging about how they indoctrinate children by implementing the divisive curriculum. As 1776's own Ryan Girdusky recently said, "In 2 years time woke activists have gone from "CRT isn't being taught" to "CRT is essential."
The only solution to rogue administrators and woke teachers is to address the root of the evil by securing school board seats in districts where the future of our children is at stake. And especially in a time where progressive factions are taking advantage of their positions in schools and using it as a platform for promoting their liberal agenda. Dangerous individuals are trying to brainwash our children into believing in a radical agenda, 1776 Project PAC is stepping in to stop the nonsense. Support our fight today.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/ef07612d-ca80-4b21-8212-4e22ef479e90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Transitioning on transitions**
Virginia lawmakers recently [approved a bill](https://substack.com/redirect/d9d4d8d2-4a40-4bd3-a4fd-de0c3a1e2092?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) banning teachers from hiding a child's gender transition from parents. Sage's Law is named after a 14-year-old girl who was sex trafficked twice and raped after the state removed her from her parents' custody to protect her from "misgendering." Not surprisingly, every single Democrat in the Virginia House of Representatives voted against it. Sage's Law (HB 2432) is designed to protect children in Virginia from school psychologists [like this one](https://substack.com/redirect/106ac91d-bd78-4c79-8340-fcfb6ab612cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who do not believe in the "notion of so-called parental rights."
Radical attempts to spin parents' constitutional rights into some dark attempt at controlling their child is not only wrong, but evil and predatory. Parents have a fundamental right to direct the upbringing and education of their children, protected by the fourteenth amendment in the United States Constitution.
[Follow 1776 Project PAC on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/ccb1f8af-51a4-4588-8918-e77b81972b37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Anyone who shut down schools, forced kids to wear masks, indoctrinated them to hate America, called their parents domestic terrorists, and lectured students about pronouns, should not be surprised when voters reject their plans. 1776 Project PAC is continuing our aggressive grassroots efforts around the country in 2023. With your help, we will win the fight against woke garbage in public education.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/ef07612d-ca80-4b21-8212-4e22ef479e90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

We know that our community needs a leader in Congress who is honest, rational, diligent, and will work in good faith to help hardworking families in CT-05 and across the nation. **Jahana is that leader, but now she needs our help in order to fight back against dark super PAC money hoping to sway this election.**
