name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fd57ea417b9f4b3d80ba73c1b756c3c4&_e=nnJqXlqVI2VW9xz43I9ClFKUsmZVhtN_6vUNH3e5Sm8g0dzVy2MKmavGEVpMCvixrwzwxtWQ553dRxGJlOQZJxyhH8hAK8xqRM4xJdUOrDr1atkciaUAZN_kcl3Z83W_5GfEtu4Wa7WZadyHymWzTwfGX3Gz8kFmVA4Xp_oekCNN5t18lod0UXL4IlUaS7ilVm1zs_lJlXS9BfnbpZiGM6LhOlRGEDfNiVtzPhiiu3mUVE1RLCDDOZvqOD_MIailFf8zAgb0m1r03Fr7v7df7Gqn3bNJgm_yzyULVomDbNyjKvoUinLreRclP8IEuFMuQ-wXF9JjRNaHQvQPAsiiLSbThTR3WMgGq_1byLV2j5YwlC4yxvjas2d_yY3hKUp-lezJYq04KFEc7N2YVqILQA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fd57ea417b9f4b3d80ba73c1b756c3c4&_e=nnJqXlqVI2VW9xz43I9ClFKUsmZVhtN_6vUNH3e5Sm8g0dzVy2MKmavGEVpMCvixrwzwxtWQ553dRxGJlOQZJxyhH8hAK8xqRM4xJdUOrDr1atkciaUAZN_kcl3Z83W_5GfEtu4Wa7WZadyHymWzTwfGX3Gz8kFmVA4Xp_oekCNN5t18lod0UXL4IlUaS7ilVm1zs_lJlXS9BfnbpZiGM6LhOlRGEDfNiVtzPhiiu3mUVE1RLCDDOZvqOD_MIailoyJjAXMbY3Iepyqcb4ha-R1P4CNprRkD2u__E2psNkbBzL9s2Si-c91K5uWYIYp06AwqZIQ5kWkzfowssp-LTpf7NRxGsTYr_gr_21SI8NuJjDyvp21JDAPyn1zR7XdtM0bD6iGab1FP0I1BR_PyIg%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fd57ea417b9f4b3d80ba73c1b756c3c4&_e=nnJqXlqVI2VW9xz43I9ClFKUsmZVhtN_6vUNH3e5Sm8g0dzVy2MKmavGEVpMCvixrwzwxtWQ553dRxGJlOQZJxyhH8hAK8xqRM4xJdUOrDr1atkciaUAZN_kcl3Z83W_5GfEtu4Wa7WZadyHymWzTwfGX3Gz8kFmVA4Xp_oekCNN5t18lod0UXL4IlUaS7ilVm1zs_lJlXS9BfnbpZiGM6LhOlRGEDfNiVtzPhiiu3mUVE1RLCDDOZvqOD_MIail9LnPSGkjp-Wjcs5JU9Vy-qcn0I70QpFBi0bwSEIgypWin38hLaVe-1DzXj3O4gaR_WJIRf668w7a4bCAr99AaBuI7U5LjGtyGpoK832qAXHqLt4cTETjBdaxGhBoB7KjvCZGqX365J1SHHGoVPoLBw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fd57ea417b9f4b3d80ba73c1b756c3c4&_e=nnJqXlqVI2VW9xz43I9ClFKUsmZVhtN_6vUNH3e5Sm8g0dzVy2MKmavGEVpMCvixrwzwxtWQ553dRxGJlOQZJxyhH8hAK8xqRM4xJdUOrDr1atkciaUAZN_kcl3Z83W_5GfEtu4Wa7WZadyHymWzTwfGX3Gz8kFmVA4Xp_oekCNN5t18lod0UXL4IlUaS7ilVm1zs_lJlXS9BfnbpZiGM6LhOlRGEDfNiVtzPhiiu3mUVE1RLCDDOZvqOD_MIailzNqt5gBMmHrfPVPovgPBLeC_NnmbNjHGVJB0DdmRpXfgPMVY2OpJyS4ROXlR7_2DtjnZNhp6g-EokoL3YZcB0G8KbxuOd4YyNjsUYqJoArRwpNT-lsjf5YppstP_zkqhL4DFtae37EVfsi6e9IZTUg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

clean_body: In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained | | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. In an interview published in Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: " My job is to apply the Constitution." But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution." Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Our teachers deserve better.
They are the backbone of our country. Every day they're doing an exceptional job in improving the lives of our kids.
But educators today are forced to deal with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, safety concerns, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.
The pandemic caused nearly 300,000 public school educators and staff to leave their jobs. Now, we are facing a shortage of around 200,000 public school teachers across the country.
It's time that we show our teachers the respect and appreciation they deserve. _**That means paying public school teachers a living wage.**_
**But we want to hear directly from you: Do you agree with President Biden that public school teachers deserve a raise?**

clean_body: It’s not rocket science. | = LIVE POLL: DO YOU AGREE THAT PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS DESERVE A RAISE? | | ---|--- Our teachers deserve better. They are the backbone of our country. Every day they're doing an exceptional job in improving the lives of our kids. But educators today are forced to deal with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, safety concerns, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout. The pandemic caused nearly 300,000 public school educators and staff to leave their jobs. Now, we are facing a shortage of around 200,000 public school teachers across the country. It's time that we show our teachers the respect and appreciation they deserve. That means paying public school teachers a living wage. But we want to hear directly from you: Do you agree with President Biden that public school teachers deserve a raise? | ---|--- Thanks for your input, Team Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Team Andy Kim
subject: A different kind of leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
At times political culture can feel toxic, with those in power often treating people's livelihoods as bargaining chips. And real decisions that affect real Americans are seen as wins and losses on some imaginary scoreboard.

Andy is focused on being a different kind of leader – one who believes that the things that unite us are much more important than those that divide us, and who creates opportunities to bring the political temperature down .

Andy can't do this work alone. He needs every one of us to come together and join him in this movement for change.

We are coming up on our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Will you donate $7 now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-02-27-different-eom&recurring=0&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=da328170-deb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

You're not likely to see Andy on TV or Twitter picking fights. You won't see him heckling during the State of the Union or scapegoating marginalized communities or trying to get famous.

That's why he doesn't take corporate PAC money and works to find common ground with whoever can help New Jersey families.

Plain and simple: Andy's busy working to get the job done for the American people. Maybe that makes for lousy TV, but it means great things for our democracy, and that's good for all of us.

Andy relies on grassroots fundraising from people like you. Can you chip in now before our end-of-month deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-02-27-different-eom&recurring=0&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=da328170-deb6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811]

Together we can bring respect, civility, and service back to Congress.

Team Andy

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden’s Political Prisoners
body:
Within hard drives in our nation's Capitol sits between 14,000 to 42,000 hours or more of CCTV footage from January 6th that would prove many of these defendants to be innocent, and more importantly, prove that the Capitol Hill Police aided in allowing protesters inside the halls of Congress. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FXh6ocDGzaEJK763uHSnb4Y892w%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/1/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/Zwt5Ha83aBpCu8_k_e2A1pBzddc=310) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FXh6ocDGzaEJK763uHSnb4Y892w%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/2/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/SoxpYeYKqVLP6zNzdai4Rgf70lE=310) Dear Friend,

For the last several months, I've been traveling back and forth to Washington, D.C. to assist, observe and report on our government's political prosecutions of the January 6th protesters.

I've met with broken families and watched judges trample the Constitution to defend their Criminal Enterprise that is our federal government.

I've sat in over 30 hours of hearings, my emotions range from gut-wrenching sadness for the defendants and their families, to complete outrage on the rulings and manipulation of the Department of Justice.

Within hard drives in our nation's Capitol sits between 14,000 to 42,000 hours or more of CCTV footage from January 6, 2021 that would prove many of these defendants to be innocent, and more importantly, prove that the Capitol Hill Police aided in allowing protesters inside the halls of Congress.

But, despite promises from the new establishment GOP Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy, to release all the footage to the public, the footage still remains hidden from the public.

While you may have heard that the footage was turned over to Tucker Carlson, the reports are simply not true. No physical footage or hard drives containing footage was ever transferred outside of the United States Capitol to Tucker Carlson's office. Tucker Carlson and his staff have only been allowed to watch footage inside one terminal at the United States Capitol.

Once again, McCarthy has distorted reality to deceive the American public into thinking that he is fighting for them. As McCarthy continues to lie, good Americans remain incarcerated!

My work has come at a cost, but I strongly believe I have an obligation to continue to assist these Americans and their families. **[ Will you chip in to help cover my trial coverage and travel costs? ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FXh6ocDGzaEJK763uHSnb4Y892w%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/3/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/AAbp36-M_zorgkawCk8wUW3cIls=310) **

I've spent weeks in D.C. hotels attending numerous J6 hearings and I'll need to head back to D.C. in April for more trials. [ **Any support you can provide will be greatly appreciated, and it will help get the truth out about the trials, which the media continues to ignore.** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FXh6ocDGzaEJK763uHSnb4Y892w%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/4/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/cVhyjbp0JdbOZi9LdRNeJmTdpSM=310)

Outside of Washington, the media of course and even **the Governors of Red States** have DONE NOTHING for the J6 defendants.

In Florida, we have the highest number of J6 defendants out of any state in the nation. I cannot begin to express how disappointed I am in Governor Ron DeSantis, who publicly stated his SUPPORT for the jailing and prosecutions of January 6 defendants!

We need to EXPOSE and hold every Republican politician accountable who fails to do anything about the political prisoners of the illegitimate Biden Regime!

And I say WE . . . because it will take all of us, good men and women standing strong against wrong.

You may have heard the quote attributed to Edmund Burke, "The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing."

In Washington, there are few good men and women left. That leaves us, the people, to take action.

That leaves us, the people, to take action!

So please, [ **help me continue reporting on the corrupt actions of the Biden Regime as I continue to support the J6 defendants and their families.** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FXh6ocDGzaEJK763uHSnb4Y892w%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/5/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/Iq1fDwRuuqPL3Q3hSEa6mqsQYhM=310)

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
| (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

**To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.
[Unsubscribe](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/1/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/4thrzXmo8b87tfr5vF_uSI_EvMc=310)
[View Web Version](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fw%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FlwJR1vZm7634TETdvzAsB36w/1/01000186949b2150-e41a7663-7671-45cf-8497-b298cace8251-000000/1Nt-4z2OfVTeY96P37ZnMgVNDts=310) **

My work has come at a cost, but I strongly believe I have an obligation to continue to assist these Americans and their families. I've spent weeks in D.C. hotels attending numerous J6 hearings and I'll need to head back to D.C. in April for more trials. Outside of Washington, the media of course and even the Governors of Red States have DONE NOTHING for the J6 defendants. In Florida, we have the highest number of J6 defendants out of any state in the nation. I cannot begin to express how disappointed I am in Governor Ron DeSantis, who publicly stated his SUPPORT for the jailing and prosecutions of January 6 defendants! We need to EXPOSE and hold every Republican politician accountable who fails to do anything about the political prisoners of the illegitimate Biden Regime! And I say WE . . . because it will take all of us, good men and women standing strong against wrong. You may have heard the quote attributed to Edmund Burke, "The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good men to do nothing." In Washington, there are few good men and women left. That leaves us, the people, to take action. That leaves us, the people, to take action! So please, Thank you so much for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer | (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 Lake Worth, FL 33460 To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.

name: Katie Porter
subject: My thoughts on the LA Times poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Here are two of my biggest takeaways.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18481%2E3422442%2Exczgcw)
Derek, the LA Times recently released a poll for our race. Right now, we’re just two points behind the frontrunner.**But here are two of my biggest takeaways:**
1. We’re leading by nine points in Orange County, the area I currently represent in Congress. **This proves that when voters learn more about who I am and how I fight for working people, we earn their support.** But there are millions of voters throughout the state who I still need to introduce myself to, and that’s where your donations come in.

1. **Nearly HALF of Democrats and nonpartisan voters haven’t yet decided who they’re supporting.** The good news is we have a whole year to reach Californians—at in-person events, through door-knocking and phone-banking and texting, and through television and digital ads.

I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs. Your donations will truly make a difference in what is shaping up to be a close and competitive race. **[Our end of month deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and any donation you can make will help us reach the millions of undecided voters whose support we need to earn.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230227-1?refcode=em20230227-1&refcode2=18481_3422442_xczgcw&akid=18481%2E3422442%2Exczgcw)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230227-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF27_1_POLL_20230227_V1_F&refcode2=18481_3422442_xczgcw&akid=18481%2E3422442%2Exczgcw)**
Thanks so much for being a part of Team Porter. We can’t do this without you!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF27_1_POLL_20230227_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18481_3422442_xczgcw&akid=18481%2E3422442%2Exczgcw)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=18481%2E3422442%2Exczgcw)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

---
You’re probably wondering: _“Why do you need my support right now? Didn’t the election just happen?”_ You’re right, so let me take a minute to explain why your donations matter now more than ever.

I’m honored and humbled to wake up every day and go to work for the people of Pennsylvania. Serving as Governor is a responsibility I take seriously and don’t take for granted.

That’s why from day one, we got to work to make sure Pennsylvania is a place where everyone has the real freedom they deserve. We’ve taken real steps forward to open the doors of opportunity to workers, and we’ve fought to protect our fundamental civil rights.

I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished so far. But what we’re doing here in Pennsylvania couldn’t be more different than what we’re seeing Republicans try to do in DC. The new House Majority has already tried to restrict abortion rights, give tax breaks to the wealthy and some even want to gut Social Security and Medicare.

**[No matter what partisan fighting goes on in DC, I’ll always fight to make progress for the issues we care about. But Pennsylvania is always a battleground, and we need to do everything we can to make sure it stays blue for years to come. I need your continued support to keep up the fight here in Pennsylvania, and why your donation today is so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59381814/394034760/-2084059834?refcode=email_022723_eom1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjhmM2JhMi0wYWI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-vasOwzNLR3Sno_I3GZpDBUKdR6dAHnkE_q8rT6JTs=)**

Peter,

The second month of this new session of Congress is about to wrap up, and Kim has been hard at work fighting for Washingtonians. Here's just a bit of what Kim has accomplished since January:

⚡ Kim was elected Vice Ranking Member of the powerful Energy and Commerce Committee.

🖊️ She had her 16th bill, the bipartisan National Forest Remediation & Restoration Act, signed into law.

🩺 She introduced legislation to increase health care access for children.

🚜 She introduced bipartisan legislation to provide crucial support for Washington farmers.

🏛️ And, Kim held her 100th town hall!

While Democrats may no longer hold the majority in the House, Kim is still working hard and delivering results for the people of Washington's 8th District. But now, she needs your help to continue this work.

name: Sujan Sedhai
subject: A message from Team Wexton's new Political Director:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59367428/393973045/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230227EOM_EOM_SS_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUwNDAxYS1lMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5vQclGWlpOU7hUmiJmzmCD2fuL18XW08bHSvNk0tOJY=)
---
Hi friend, it's great to (e-)meet you! I'd like to tell you a bit about myself, and then I'll be asking for you to [**donate to Jennifer before our February deadline tomorrow.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59367429/393973046/-1786109964?refcode=EM_FR_230227EOM_EOM_SS_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUwNDAxYS1lMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5vQclGWlpOU7hUmiJmzmCD2fuL18XW08bHSvNk0tOJY=)

I recently came aboard the Wexton campaign after years of work in the non-profit sector. I worked to empower women's leadership and promote outreach among immigrant and marginalized communities and groups.

As a constituent of Jennifer's, I saw firsthand how effective at getting results she was. I was inspired by how she (as a working mom) represented a new image of what a politician could look like. And her strong advocacy for reproductive choice, gun safety laws, and domestic violence prevention pushed me to support her with more than just my vote.

Since I joined the campaign, I've been working hard to make sure we can scale up our outreach in communities that too often are left out of the political equation. Because as a Nepali-born immigrant, I know firsthand the struggles many communities of color face – [and continue to face.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59367430/393973047/575976696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzUwNDAxYS1lMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5vQclGWlpOU7hUmiJmzmCD2fuL18XW08bHSvNk0tOJY=&emci=316c4f8e-dab6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=3350401a-e2b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) The importance of breaking past language barriers, establishing substantive relationships, educating and empowering our communities to use their voices, and working to fight voter misinformation is just some of the work that we’ll be tackling this campaign cycle. But we have to start laying the groundwork early.

And we need your help. We're trying to hire organizers who can speak directly to our immigrant communities, who can overcome language gaps, and correct any misinformation (because the far right has wasted no time spreading their message). To put it bluntly, this will take a lot of resources.

When March begins, we'll be officially assessing how much we have in the budget to hire our first round of organizers. **That's why we're hoping to raise $3,944 more by tomorrow night.**

[**This is going to take a team effort, and grassroots donations from supporters like you really matter. clean_body: = Hi friend, it's great to (e-)meet you! I'd like to tell you a bit about myself, and then I'll be asking for you to = I recently came aboard the Wexton campaign after years of work in the non-profit sector. I worked to empower women's leadership and promote outreach among immigrant and marginalized communities and groups. As a constituent of Jennifer's, I saw firsthand how effective at getting results she was. I was inspired by how she (as a working mom) represented a new image of what a politician could look like. And her strong advocacy for reproductive choice, gun safety laws, and domestic violence prevention pushed me to support her with more than just my vote. Since I joined the campaign, I've been working hard to make sure we can scale up our outreach in communities that too often are left out of the political equation. Because as a Nepali-born immigrant, I know firsthand the struggles many communities of color face – The importance of breaking past language barriers, establishing substantive relationships, educating and empowering our communities to use their voices, and working to fight voter misinformation is just some of the work that we’ll be tackling this campaign cycle. But we have to start laying the groundwork early. And we need your help. We're trying to hire organizers who can speak directly to our immigrant communities, who can overcome language gaps, and correct any misinformation (because the far right has wasted no time spreading their message). To put it bluntly, this will take a lot of resources. When March begins, we'll be officially assessing how much we have in the budget to hire our first round of organizers. That's why we're hoping to raise $3,944 more by tomorrow night. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks so much — and I'm looking forward to talking more soon! It’s why Joe Biden is allowing everyone, even people on the terror watch list , into our country illegally through our southern border. But don’t worry. Claudia is already working with the Election Integrity Caucus to ban non-citizens and illegal immigrants from voting in our elections. | | | | Haven’t heard Claudia’s full story? She’s not your run-of-the-mill Republican. She’s a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people. Her election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT. At midnight on election day, she was ahead of her Democrat opponent by NEARLY 30,000 VOTES! Over the next 90 DAYS, she fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push her opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, Claudia was declared the winner by a slim109votes! From that moment on, she knew she needed to lead the election integrity effort.And that’s why she founded and leads the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress. But her fight didn’t stop there. Simultaneously, she was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. And she won. There are too many Republicans who talk a good game but never actually fight for YOU. Thank you,Digital Team,Claudia Tenney for Congress | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | P.O. | | Janet Protasiewicz is a true public servant & pro-choice champion.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59368425/393974365/-523229209?sourceid=1048690&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk5ZWNiYS1lMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ws5ftW7d4ktT918m43l4TDmX-_Uar_IP5sGfjU-an0=&emci=ceb999b4-e2b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a299ecba-e2b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Earlier this month, we proudly endorsed Judge Janet Protasiewicz for Wisconsin Supreme Court. And after an extremely strong showing last Tuesday (she earned over _200,000_ more votes than her leading anti-choice opponent), we're proud to say that Janet is now headed to a general election!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59368426/393974366/-523229209?sourceid=1048690&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk5ZWNiYS1lMmI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ws5ftW7d4ktT918m43l4TDmX-_Uar_IP5sGfjU-an0=&emci=ceb999b4-e2b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a299ecba-e2b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) It's difficult to overstate the importance of this race, which could tilt the balance of the Court. If Janet wins, conservatives will lose their anti-choice majority in the state Supreme Court — and their control of Wisconsin state politics.

The rights and freedoms of _millions_ of people are on the line here. Wisconsinites deserve a Court committed to protecting reproductive freedom, democracy, and voting rights.

And I couldn't be more confident that Janet Protasiewicz is the champion Wisconsin needs right now.

She's spent her entire career fighting for the rights of Wisconsinites, working first as an assistant district attorney and then as a circuit court judge. Over the past decade, she's earned a reputation for fairness and impartiality, community involvement, and a deep dedication to justice. ****Your contribution helps elect women like Janet all across the country. body:
dark money groups have already spent millions implementing their plan
|
---

Team, new reporting reveals where right-wing dark money groups have been investing ahead of 2024. **It’s alarming:** | **The Guardian:**

_“The advocacy arm of the Heritage Foundation, the powerful conservative thinktank based in Washington, spent more than $5m on lobbying in 2021 as it worked to block federal voting rights legislation and advance an ambitious plan to spread its far-right agenda calling for aggressive voter suppression measures in battleground states.”

“A private plan prepared by Heritage Action last year set out a two-year, $24m ‘election integrity’ strategy.”_
---
[**__Donate to help the NDRC fight voter suppression state-by-state across the country >>__**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59370655/393975613/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230227_FR_2N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNTg1OGM5LWUzYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VOEAmUbmyjZ_tRnEhxBlFVNm_cI6nOfkL72wBk2EbBU=)
**Since the 2020 election, Republican lawmakers have passed dozens of new voter suppression bills in nearly half of all states.** Now, it’s becoming clear that this wave of legislation was no coincidence, but instead a deliberate, targeted strategy funded by far-right mega-donors.

Honestly, we shouldn’t be surprised that Heritage is so active in this effort. After all, we are talking about an organization whose founder openly stated: **“I don’t want everybody to vote...Our leverage in the elections quite candidly goes up as the voting populace goes down.”**

[**_The GOP’s cynical, anti-democratic strategy ahead of 2024 is to _make it harder for Americans to vote_ , and we refuse to let them get away with it. Will you pitch in now to support the NDRC’s work to fight for fairness and defend voting rights?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59370658/393975614/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230227_FR_2N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNTg1OGM5LWUzYjYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VOEAmUbmyjZ_tRnEhxBlFVNm_cI6nOfkL72wBk2EbBU=)

Attorney General Eric Holder has warned that **“The right to vote is under attack and must be protected – our democracy is at stake.”**

That’s why the NDRC is working state-by-state across the country to mobilize communities, hold anti-democratic politicians accountable, and elect leaders who understand what’s at stake. **Will you support our grassroots movement with a donation of any amount today?**

clean_body: dark money groups have already spent millions implementing their plan | Team, new reporting reveals where right-wing dark money groups have been investing ahead of 2024. It’s alarming: | The Guardian: “The advocacy arm of the Heritage Foundation, the powerful conservative thinktank based in Washington, spent more than $5m on lobbying in 2021 as it worked to block federal voting rights legislation and advance an ambitious plan to spread its far-right agenda calling for aggressive voter suppression measures in battleground states.” “A private plan prepared by Heritage Action last year set out a two-year, $24m ‘election integrity’ strategy.” = Since the 2020 election, Republican lawmakers have passed dozens of new voter suppression bills in nearly half of all states. Now, it’s becoming clear that this wave of legislation was no coincidence, but instead a deliberate, targeted strategy funded by far-right mega-donors. Honestly, we shouldn’t be surprised that Heritage is so active in this effort. After all, we are talking about an organization whose founder openly stated: “I don’t want everybody to vote...Our leverage in the elections quite candidly goes up as the voting populace goes down.” = Attorney General Eric Holder has warned that “The right to vote is under attack and must be protected – our democracy is at stake.” That’s why the NDRC is working state-by-state across the country to mobilize communities, hold anti-democratic politicians accountable, and elect leaders who understand what’s at stake. Will you support our grassroots movement with a donation of any amount today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to **STOP** building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. Hi there, Peter. We’re only two months into Eric’s first term, and he’s already making good on his promise to hold Washington accountable and deliver for the people of Central and Northwest Illinois. In the past couple of weeks, Eric:
---
* **Joined the USDA in announcing high-speed internet to rural Illinois.** An $18 million investment will help thousands of rural Illinoisans access high-speed internet – critical to receiving an education and even accessing health care service.

* **Ensured IL-17 will have a voice in the next Farm Bill.** In case you missed it, Eric made his case and was appointed to the House Agriculture Committee. Negotiations over the 2023 Farm Bill will soon begin, and Eric’s prepared to fight for local farms and new investments in renewable energy.

* **Spearheaded efforts to remove George Santos from Congress.** After news broke that George Santos lied about losing four employees in the 2016 Pulse Shooting, Eric joined a cohort of LGBTQ Democrats in calling on Congress to expel Santos from Congress.

---
While Eric’s been busy working for the people, the bad news is that National Republicans have already listed Eric as one of their top targets to unseat in 2024. We’re stunned at how early they’re starting, and soon enough dark money will begin flowing into attacks against Eric. **** [**We’re closing in on our $30,000 end-of-month fundraising goal but still need some help. According to our math, a $5 donation from 5 people in 18326 could get us over the top. name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don’t need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster – a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration’s open border policies.

| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=a02358ea04b34f778362eb9ea3d6e5dd&_t=QAwtQHY2fMPxuwx4Y2ETq5ehKBry02YOEo77G9nov0IHes9-LF8iSYWArZJ0Ii0qrn0khq9LjETcVal8nqY-GR0HNNWHrSwpoy6wgziv10E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=a02358ea04b34f778362eb9ea3d6e5dd&_t=QAwtQHY2fMPxuwx4Y2ETq5ehKBry02YOEo77G9nov0IHes9-LF8iSYWArZJ0Ii0qrn0khq9LjETcVal8nqY-GR0HNNWHrSwpoy6wgziv10E%3D)

| It's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

**[Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a02358ea04b34f778362eb9ea3d6e5dd&_e=-iL_FsBdruy6L-8GBKa8ddysi_4KduM2L6t0b-gHbTMxpsVbI-GgA9VGK3gk8hBjHB_YBOTh2OAlSHltriygQ_Ni6iS9-55jQ5Z60IMDwqug2fzRGKr_W7_e0im14rizWCsQoCIZW9F2R5A89NEKigyU2OpErSrY6PeszEjcsXfklxkKjadC1XoTJm2MqC845V5mGygwhAkGn_OJu15NBtjF0A6xpyOjLjNlwMD9Bp-CfC0Uqq-AhoGcxuOIEaekMEqQSWBEI-RAEH6u78zGSZw7xDM-Vw3KMnEa1bXUAhyar6Da2zAC8isdjakaWTPn6Cou649spbFj0uGPBIQADr65pr25ammPY-cIRt1fqmsH3wne55kaqibGwuSVQJo3Pt14B9La9kuItqlHvEagkQ%3D%3D "Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?")**

Friend, I just need 3 minutes of your time.
---
Listen, the chips are down and I’m in danger of falling short of my goal before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline.
---
Democrats are looking for Republican weakness, and they would love nothing more than to flip a Conservative district like WI-01.
---

Let's get a few basic principles out of the way:
1. Corporations aren't people. They're corporations.
2. Money isn't speech. It's money.
3. Elections are for voters, not politicians or special interests.

In the ten years since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision, there's been an explosion of secret money in our elections, and it just keeps getting worse and worse.

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m a farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Can I explain something, folks?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59382021/394035680/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=0&refcode=jtk2381-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTEzNDAyZi0xMWI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YL29AWfXgyC4pfhuKJvo99NEPeySBbasz770V3rVEwQ=)
Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $ 5 between Jacky Rosen and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59382022/394035681/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2381-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTEzNDAyZi0xMWI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YL29AWfXgyC4pfhuKJvo99NEPeySBbasz770V3rVEwQ=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59382023/394035682/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2381-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTEzNDAyZi0xMWI3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YL29AWfXgyC4pfhuKJvo99NEPeySBbasz770V3rVEwQ=)
---
Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course).
— Jon
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=GR%2BNLbo7MWTrZsvyFzLyuiFDkwjiAI9oqj1%2F0hpfDKO9ZzwfZJR3Jc7jj1HXrGgGeSOz4EjoSztAjAHcWNDP2jX10oIWAPskKkvSnGMyWfuKVQ3n8PsF0UYtGB7LPTNWC287o3%2BUw98hB6iwtl1fL0xvE1v%2BF7ANaBrWPwLy5raFFOIY0%2Fa681Eqtr7LxoLhJT%2BSiYLfGFwTRUBmY9AO6dnklZrNnVuHzoo8IvYK9xZQsBO93hOCOPPytxRZGrFTyEdxUUy%2B%2FE2hB5o%2Bwoiusgcp9mh%2BjnmD6Bc6GiuOAsJTNQaFJJRBGncUfw8hBzYQqdWGWjTcHZXepshmAjsJt9cG7v40Vxe%2BkDQ818ROt7kubAEAvZShPCqbXoEryQxu191K2lvHXF%2FvcEXvvdkq1lu4kKQ9jMX4W2OBHmWgw%2FA%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59373277/393979680/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230227_FR_EOMFR_0_3MO_Jimmy_NA_NA_EOMFR1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNiYjg3Yi1lOGI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPAXPQ2p_pQ8eN3P_cmtF7NF_498ETzzd6Jb4i3ruHU=&emci=66b0d874-e8b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1c3bb87b-e8b6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

As we begin the 118th Congress in the new 19th Congressional District of California, I’ve been busy.

Here’s just an example of a few things that I’ve done in the past couple of weeks:
* Continued to ensure that the federal government plays its part in our local storm recovery efforts so FEMA, SBA, USDA, and other federal relief agencies follow through with assistance

* Put pressure on FEMA for their approval of backlogged reimbursements in their wildfire disaster response in the new part of my congressional district

* Secured $1 million in federal funding to establish wellness centers at our local public schools to increase our mental health services for our youth

* Secured $1.16 million in federal funding local police to deploy technology to help them gather intelligence, fight crime, and increase our public safety

* Secured $30 million in federal funding to expand Highway One between Watsonville and Santa Cruz to reduce traffic and our carbon output and increase our pedestrian and bike safety

* Secured $900,000 in federal funding to prevent roadway deaths, improve pedestrian, and cyclist safety

* Secured $500,000 in federal funding for ocean and climate research in Monterey Bay

* Held numerous town halls throughout the new parts of my congressional district to hear from new constituents

* Held office hours in the new parts of my congressional district to personally meet with new constituents

* Attended Farm Bill Listening Session to promote agricultural trade and increase global competitiveness for California farmers

* Relaunched the congressional caucus to eliminate the arbitrary cap on the harmful State and Local Tax deduction

* Reintroduced the Broadband Grant Tax Treatment Act to exempt small businesses from taxes on federal funding to deploy and expand broadband access

* Reintroduced my bipartisan, bicameral bill to honor Vietnam War POW Everett Alvarez, Jr. with the Congressional Gold Medal

As the U.S. Representative for the 19th Congressional District, it is my responsibility to deliver for our communities.

However, even while I serve my constituents, I must continue to ask for your support for my upcoming re-election campaign.

My end-of-month fundraising deadline is just around the corner and I wanted to ask if you could donate whatever you can to help us hit our fundraising goal.

[If you can, please chip in $10 or any amount to help us hit our $10,000 goal before midnight on February 28. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Peter, where’s Sinema?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter –did you see our petition? Kyrsten Sinema hasn’t held a real public townhall with constituents since becoming a Senator, but she has all the time in the world for dinner with Kevin McCarthy, lunch with Wall Street lobbyists, vacations in Paris, and getting weekly massages. If we get enough signatures demanding that Sinema hold a real town hall meeting with constituents, we’ll share the petition with Sinema’s office. **[Add your name](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn3qW0xTUTj3hQnaSC8jjcUkQNoyoKY0tUuyIjlMjYCKNsdR0cqw1YbC5nUxB88Ia9vVz0Ph1hbsIN67G_YiJWniyL0mGLUDqxpglbaJJT2OwDHhybdKgOVGn1RUqnwdQMAPW-0P9SDDzwloF8VeS4rUXL2nRYyZKNqW-kSKoUoMpfImQu9M6rt-f293btCcQ7CReO_66gDLQNx4r8kFXiwQgRoj8DMD3lWaNxAFgM7gZyUX2EuWJuzMEuYNRjz7ZjxqQcY508a7BWHXhQz7w12o2HIhHmRP6Q4xfLj3HlsyzQ3-bq6HEOEWrgU1wcPgd8WopcnXn4FlGWfViyW88vG/3u2/FX95s91nR2ejIGcZhdI1dQ/h0/jeJs6ISp1pJ7XDu79EoCRUS5370Zx-1GLXFPTJr1Shk), and then [forward this to a friend](mailto:?subject=Tell%20Sinema%20to%20hold%20a%20public%20town%20hall&body=Kyrsten%20Sinema%20hasn%E2%80%99t%20held%20a%20real%20public%20townhall%20with%20constituents%20since%20becoming%20a%20Senator%2C%20but%20she%20has%20all%20the%20time%20in%20the%20world%20for%20dinner%20with%20Kevin%20McCarthy%2C%20lunch%20with%20Wall%20Street%20lobbyists%2C%20vacations%20in%20Paris%2C%20and%20getting%20weekly%20massages.%0A%0AIf%20we%20get%20enough%20signatures%20demanding%20that%20Sinema%20hold%20a%20real%20town%20hall%20meeting%20with%20constituents%2C%20we%E2%80%99ll%20share%20the%20petition%20with%20Sinema%E2%80%99s%20office.%0A%0AAdd%20your%20name%20here%20and%20send%20this%20to%20a%20friend%20%3E%3E%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Factionnetwork.org%2Fpetitions%2Fsen-sinema-its-time-to-hold-a-public-town-hall-with-voters%3Fsource%3Ddirect_link%26) >> ** -Team Replace Sinema \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: **Replace Sinema** Date: Sunday, February 5, 2023 Subject: Did you sign our petition? Dinners with Kevin McCarthy.. lunches with private equity... donor spa retreats... trips to Switzerland... weekly massages: it seems like Kyrsten Sinema has all the time in the world for everyone except her own constituents. _That’s right: the mastermind behind our current crime wave is none other than far Left George Soros. _ **He’s been funneling millions of dollars into local prosecutor races across the country to replace rule-of-law prosecutors with liberal activists. ** These activists abandon victims of crime in the name of “social justice,” declining to prosecute crimes and setting violent criminals free. And guess what happens when prosecutors basically make crime legal? _You get more crime._ _[**Right now, 1 in 5 Americans are represented by a Soros-financed prosecutor. And unless we act now, that number will only grow.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5918965b813f4a12b4ea4a84afee97d4&_e=nFNmpaDSvIaEbAs3D1NfHmsphKxQxjxjywLmRVk4pNYJ_7G_smDt2D1YBw0iuMOaQk5erNSvmYvVaTbpKO_1y61Mtm2-OGfLdHtT4mZzHRtzwvjI-MG6RkYEgZQWbbBgQmM7jsTi18RuVB0TASjExvrl8w8tz23jK1jmm5l2PbwZAj77M8uURyEwEnj4mCQyEqSPHX77wzo-pI8nj-YBbD5-imhy0XE1wAutIkkGXG0W0J0glE8dsIRETAStD4a90HJoJ7dpZX7VbvKBr2VrKCZyHr3i5wH8TzukW2swpc_ZK2V5AUARxILSiOLVm58rFcwx-z9lr-vOnnRE3PT2ayvG8NApSRay_wNFucS7hpueJvgeYkWgnpGNjOTa82pMmEUnabeZdoynlz_6tFgJ3A%3D%3D)_ At Fair Courts America, we’re ready to fight back. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The fights ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
My team took a look at your file, Peter.
#
Peter,
It’s hard to believe that March is right around the corner! **We’re now hours away from our end of month deadline at 11:59pm tomorrow.**
Time is running out for us to reach our $70,000 fundraising goal. It’s critical that we build up our resources _now_ early in the cycle to be prepared for the future and all of the pivotal moments that lie ahead of us this year. The good news is, my team let me know that we’re getting close to reaching our goal -- **which means your support today is more important now than ever.**
We took a look at your supporter record, Peter -- here’s what we currently have on file for you:
**Peter's 2023 Supporter Record**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2023 Donor?:** No — not yet!**
****2022 Total:** $0
**Suggested donation:[$27](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38728?refcode=em20230227-2217&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)**

_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
Support from our grassroots supporters like you allow us to continue to fight on behalf of working people and their communities every day. I am hoping that you can help us out one more time/for the first time at this crucial moment. [**Will you invest in our movement to help provide us with the resources we’ll need in the months ahead? We need to raise $70,000 by midnight tomorrow and your donation will make a real difference for us.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38728?refcode=em20230227-2217&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38728?refcode=em20230227-2217&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)**
As our progressive coalition continues to deliver for our communities, we cannot allow the far-right GOP majority to reverse **_any**_ of the hard-fought progress our movement has campaigned and delivered on.
I know there will be many more fights ahead -- because reproductive justice, affordable healthcare, climate action, voting rights, and a federal living wage cannot wait. I have been fighting tooth and nail for our communities in Congress and you have my word that will not change -- but **now I need your support today, Peter.**
[**With one day to go, can we count on you to contribute to help us close the gap and reach our $70,000 end of the month goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38728?refcode=em20230227-2217&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/38728?refcode=em20230227-2217&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)**
**We’re in this together, and I am beyond grateful to have your continued support,**
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230227-2217-footer&t=24&refcode2=2217_420207_TPImga&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2217%2E420207%2ETPImga)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

** **
Peter, I’ll be blunt:
Top GOP Senator Ron Johnson just called Social Security a "Ponzi scheme."
Let me be clear:
Johnson and his Republican allies want to change the way programs like Social Security and Medicare are funded.
[**And if we don’t respond, Social Security for millions of seniors who’ve paid into it their entire lives will be at risk.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59373889/393981938/-1299222958?source=20230227_em_pet_b1_raja_30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ5MGExMi1lYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcUMz-mE-5Sjh0L_Y5Cab6hY71ymlcvKjhus_FVxKiM=&emci=189cec27-94b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f490a12-eab6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897)

[_**Before midnight: I need to gather 10,000 signatures in support of Social Security to send the loudest and most powerful message we can. Will you sign before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59373891/393981941/-1299222958?source=20230227_em_pet_b1_raja_30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ5MGExMi1lYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcUMz-mE-5Sjh0L_Y5Cab6hY71ymlcvKjhus_FVxKiM=&emci=189cec27-94b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f490a12-eab6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897)
Thank you,
Raja

Last week, I joined progressive leaders across Illinois to send a message that tells Republicans they cannot cut Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, Education, and other vital programs Americans rely on. So please, Peter, will you sign my emergency petition to make this message clear? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59373894/393981943/-1299222958?source=20230227_em_pet_b1_raja_30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ5MGExMi1lYWI2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcUMz-mE-5Sjh0L_Y5Cab6hY71ymlcvKjhus_FVxKiM=&emci=189cec27-94b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6f490a12-eab6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897)

subject: A Video Message from Sherrod’s Campaign Manager
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Watch before our next big deadline → |
---

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[ **Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. ** ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ada99c0fe91430086a343dbc2a24274&_e=--RixzePGRCYciTyYiK3bsB3b8rZbA8z6bdGiShCgkGHvZd1bLhUevmCnS-BqFJy7UZaEX0Sj3-owio2ttT4PYze-Ng-Ka_REJhGI15OLkwKS0gl49eLpEVmTxmMAvC-BskaV_rz1nIuKGENcVZo8xZHviKskt1_QtMM9mqVfchSRXkHLa2-nvOq38lo3CVoxJ7AKbPbMjAaA56dUO-RW7eMe5Vyw9X6lS-5XjYKdlLUUTyCaWzkPeB5huH6KaHhM52E_r36uopmLHD-elafGIIPI_GBk0S2khR6qCpQfTl2sb0smN8edKCY_EnhrFCbUXaR00psnY8TFDOOhiWHuBUkdTNpVQUHmZ7-y9OsKTA%3D)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

We’ve activated an EMERGENCY Triple-Impact Match to make sure we have the resources to compete with McConnell and his megadonors, but the match expires tomorrow, and we still don’t have your contribution on file! name: Team Fetterman
subject: Let’s run down how we got here:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re defending a narrow Democratic majority, and the same right-wing PACs and politicians are ready to spend million$ to see us fail.
#
Hey Derek, let's run down where we're at:
**FIRST:** We defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and elected John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate.
**THEN:** We got to work, standing up for working families in the fight for livable wages, common-sense gun safety + more.
**NOW:** We're defending a narrow Democratic majority, and the same right-wing PACs and politicians are ready to spend million$ to see us fail. That's why we need your support.
**[So Derek: Can you make a contribution of any amount to support John Fetterman's work before our upcoming February 28 fundraising deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230227-1?refcode=em20230227-1-8264&refcode2=8264_434096_QFcTy0&akid=8264%2E434096%2EQFcTy0)**

Every donation makes an impact, even when it's not an election year.
That's because instead of being funded by corporate PACs or ultra-wealthy donors, we were able to build a powerful movement in every corner of PA with thousands and thousands of folks chipping in $12.66, $5, or $100 at a time. 👥👥👥👥👥
We mean it when we say that your contribution, no matter the amount, matters, Derek. It's how we're able to support John's work + keep defending our Senate majority.
Our finance team has told us we're a little behind where we need to be to reach our February fundraising target. 😬 **[So before midnight TOMORROW, please consider chipping in $5 to help us catch up + continue growing our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230227-1?refcode=em20230227-1-8264&refcode2=8264_434096_QFcTy0&akid=8264%2E434096%2EQFcTy0)**

name: Dan Kildee
subject: for our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi there,

I ran for Congress to deliver for my hometown communities and the Heartland. That’s why I’m proud to have brought home new funding to invest nearly $2 million in extracurricular educational opportunities for young people in mid-Michigan.

**Helping our children learn and succeed is crucial, and one of the reasons I will work with anyone — Republicans, Democrats, and Independents — to deliver for working families.**

Last year, we won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race — and that made all the difference.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. **Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.**

**[February is a shorter month, so we have fewer days to hit our monthly fundraising goal. Will you chip in $15 or any amount to help us raise the last $4,000 we need to stay on track ahead of tomorrow’s deadline? We can get important work done together when we lower the temperature in Washington and focus on the issues. That’s what I’ve always done, and what I’ll always strive to do.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Unapologetic pursuit of excellence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA20ENKJeDlx6bVF95SAxjJjSMoLSPyxfWRRPKEASJT7mCCd7YrEcjzO8qjGWaiJu2dzsgtJnkQkG67ecKi0zsjEGv4qppTfrpb1FQm1-pl_bQi6ZKlzGoVhXwfiV-ae3-JHKoWrnMMkr0v60Ycl9uRCB8G2BlKmRU3jfaZ0B8MHJxDbjhBkWd0StO21XFn7a6bott5H6_tz26rT4tFx-HKV_VyeFX5r07lBs3JSvoAVVmDvNw_2iXDHnjMoNMX5WvFnnZoxWYG6BZnHK_Mx_1-enGwmSmLukYrO7dY76ZbQ1-5qRm1fQo1P050VFXzFsPkVIgxBuvj_TMRtlPV9dzfIbaOwgBWC2dE-VwdYN3bhPOxOuvLqvpTAzf-N5CroSFSw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA20ENKJeDlx6bVF95SAxjJjSMoLSPyxfWRRPKEASJT7mCCd7YrEcjzO8qjGWaiJu2dzsgtJnkQkG67ecKi0zsjEGv4qppTfrpb1FQm1-pl_bQi6ZKlzGoVhXwfiV-ae3-JHKoWrnMMkr0v60Ycl9uRCB8G2BlKmRU3jfaZ0B8MHJxDbjhBkWd0StO21XFn7a6bott5H6_tz26rT4tFx-HKV_VyeFX5r07lBs3JSvoAVVmKkrbrW0qu9_Djv1clZNHCu9xjzaT4-mtfK_Mz3TY1_TSqxAdSHvDOdxKZE9RiPeOz6EZ-IhBWpiuZqK4n-uFQvEgXaRXCmT5BkFH10ZFGApdI9OjJe430Iluz0ZJEEBsW6J3L3EefNlTIBcW2BoDUg%3D%3D)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA20ENKJeDlx6bVF95SAxjJjSMoLSPyxfWRRPKEASJT7mCCd7YrEcjzO8qjGWaiJu2dzsgtJnkQkG67ecKi0zsjEGv4qppTfrpb1FQm1-pl_bQi6ZKlzGoVhXwfiV-ae3-JHKoWrnMMkr0v60Ycl9uRCB8G2BlKmRU3jfaZ0B8MHJxDbjhBkWd0StO21XFn7a6bott5H6_tz26rT4tFx-HKV_VyeFX5r07lBs3JSvoAVVmm4sEYH9io639XmeJZoZauSRmUP6BCqcdVK1ZrxK86ZI8jr4q6i8-1dr2jf32Z53-pB5J_ockhoQ1_-f8GZGRZ8bXGx1v813gIoURAs5MEHGO-Vzn7EXPpbJGqqrmee7bMc4cycmujrlZayyjx8TqlA%3D%3D)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA20ENKJeDlx6bVF95SAxjJjSMoLSPyxfWRRPKEASJT7mCCd7YrEcjzO8qjGWaiJu2dzsgtJnkQkG67ecKi0zsjEGv4qppTfrpb1FQm1-pl_bQi6ZKlzGoVhXwfiV-ae3-JHKoWrnMMkr0v60Ycl9uRCB8G2BlKmRU3jfaZ0B8MHJxDbjhBkWd0StO21XFn7a6bott5H6_tz26rT4tFx-HKV_VyeFX5r07lBs3JSvoAVVm73a0DjTv0Z-4NUVydpBsZUW31dn6ZioUMlJkcfK9KQ1ubNg0lVFSXjmNrNqgkjpkmDc5Qkze6sGKJzoccNUKXfSK6TL60wJetv5_Roxw4JM_cfp4eb2sUfqYCQQwYCZdxgPFpUXM-AQZrzyxCnMoDw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA20ENKJeDlx6bVF95SAxjJjSMoLSPyxfWRRPKEASJT7mCCd7YrEcjzO8qjGWaiJu2dzsgtJnkQkG67ecKi0zsjEGv4qppTfrpb1FQm1-pl_bQi6ZKlzGoVhXwfiV-ae3-JHKoWrnMMkr0v60Ycl9uRCB8G2BlKmRU3jfaZ0B8MHJxDbjhBkWd0StO21XFn7a6bott5H6_tz26rT4tFx-HKV_VyeFX5r07lBs3JSvoAVVm4U-2pmYWoqMBsiHyaoKXrJL_a8p7cCcqIk7MiE3WFY3unAMXqvrZCp9irZsWd0h9N3X2TP7OmEPOy7SKVw2Vb5EhlzlzCXgyFnwLgEJsctIOGqMP4ReGf84z15MLRuQj7Y38ShWopTofMmOirSNX_g%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA20ENKJeDlx6bVF95SAxjJjSMoLSPyxfWRRPKEASJT7mCCd7YrEcjzO8qjGWaiJu2dzsgtJnkQkG67ecKi0zsjEGv4qppTfrpb1FQm1-pl_bQi6ZKlzGoVhXwfiV-ae3-JHKoWrnMMkr0v60Ycl9uRCB8G2BlKmRU3jfaZ0B8MHJxDbjhBkWd0StO21XFn7a6bott5H6_tz26rT4tFx-HKV_VyeFX5r07lBs3JSvoAVVmLpVE9-iLRFU-gTFObhpiAMsocyvc6wQY5DdKs0JeRVrizn1On_TYqSH9sOSEiehaeul9sAVo3loEP9-48sA-Mxq9dXAYh52EtsqQ2Xomfe-WLLHrFDrLpsVvcwRNYTpkAbItjyDyW-wM61hZO2ol0Q%3D%3D)

---

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA2yhlVJgWvS13Wra3v6D0jfNxIVfG4-UkEEbc_wflcdeDZrAVqLAkEc8YEXsaCcCQcD3McNFEWYU0qy3QTgmJWhnRKl1PI4AieZ6l0UCgXJ1FYIF5yN2bA7eNDTgnde_DxqA9oso6KEq6aunqKmXzIqdoZVr6lmkYQl5Mj4Wd8gBwoC3x7iTyCe9kQ-6ypJ8u9jNC3bExgdgntPu2TzPzPt4%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA25NO0-uPL0NBDrOwQ-EvJU1Y0RY0vKubNVf8E39jd6xF_T35Ah1fEudWn3cn-6UxlkimPC0iRn8OnBxNA2Zf0A5B_FMRe7KtZg6KS1OVJKQxqtTywZcEXqxFgrzIzX4o5_8hQsMT9jdfPLL2xR0KQd2r-xXhv3aObn9_0d5c7PyWhEAczLc3JNUM3cIMdPvwfQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af6ac7b1e75441f9b3500c5fa1bfd043&_e=8Fsy7ycgigkXqNrcTCAA2xsr80o2UEr2zPcWsmKVZdorINHQ7hOU_7VuQgtjzB0W4pMyCSkGJQ0RMpbTcQLrNH5jksAE4n1svvx1XyV1cZ7-0E5Dp077yeB8nFfsYTEgMXvYYWx7QLtMLNauiipgHLraUlk85PaycTX8g4-94F3DQdRE9PW32WYgriyKsaOoPCqtln-rpvpxTg1mq2vNb-YKhl-DY6ln1jJsfYZFHRY%3D)

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited.
